title: Weather & Seasons
description: Learn how to describe the weather and the four seasons.

dialogueSections.title: Today's Weather
dialogueSections.scene: Two friends discuss today's weather before going out.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 今天天氣怎麼樣？
lines.pinyin: jīn tiān tiān qì zěn me yàng?
lines.english: How is the weather today?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 早上是晴天，但是現在開始陰天了。
lines.pinyin: zǎo shang shì qíng tiān, dàn shì xiàn zài kāi shǐ yīn tiān le.
lines.english: It was sunny this morning, but now it's getting cloudy.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 天氣預報說今天會下雨嗎？
lines.pinyin: tiān qì yù bào shuō jīn tiān huì xià yǔ ma?
lines.english: Does the weather forecast say it will rain today?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 說下午可能會下雨，你帶傘了嗎？
lines.pinyin: shuō xià wǔ kě néng huì xià yǔ, nǐ dài sǎn le ma?
lines.english: It says it might rain in the afternoon, did you bring an umbrella?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我沒有帶傘。現在溫度幾度？
lines.pinyin: wǒ méi yǒu dài sǎn. xiàn zài wēn dù jǐ dù?
lines.english: I didn't bring an umbrella. What's the temperature now?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 現在大概二十五度，還算涼快。
lines.pinyin: xiàn zài dà gài èr shí wǔ dù, hái suàn liáng kuai.
lines.english: About 25 degrees now, still quite cool.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 台灣的夏天很熱吧？
lines.pinyin: táiwān de xià tiān hěn rè ba?
lines.english: Taiwan's summer is very hot, right?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 非常熱！有時候超過三十五度。
lines.pinyin: fēi cháng rè! yǒu shí hòu chāo guò sān shí wǔ dù.
lines.english: Very hot! Sometimes it exceeds 35 degrees.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 而且台灣的夏天很潮濕。
lines.pinyin: ér qiě táiwān de xià tiān hěn cháo shī.
lines.english: And Taiwan's summer is very humid.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對，又熱又潮濕，很不舒適。
lines.pinyin: duì, yòu rè yòu cháo shī, hěn bù shū shì.
lines.english: Right, both hot and humid, very uncomfortable.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那哪個季節最舒適？
lines.pinyin: nà nǎ gè jì jié zuì shū shì?
lines.english: Which season is the most comfortable?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我覺得秋天最舒適，涼快又乾燥。
lines.pinyin: wǒ jué de qiū tiān zuì shū shì, liáng kuai yòu gān zào.
lines.english: I think autumn is the most comfortable, cool and dry.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我喜歡春天，天氣溫暖，花很漂亮。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xǐ huan chūn tiān, tiān qì wēn nuǎn, huā hěn piào liang.
lines.english: I like spring, the weather is warm and flowers are beautiful.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 春天也不錯，但是有時候會下雨。
lines.pinyin: chūn tiān yě bú cuò, dàn shì yǒu shí hòu huì xià yǔ.
lines.english: Spring is also nice, but sometimes it rains.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 冬天你們這裡會下雪嗎？
lines.pinyin: dōng tiān nǐ men zhè lǐ huì xià xuě ma?
lines.english: Does it snow here in winter?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 台北很少下雪，但是山上會下雪。
lines.pinyin: táiběi hěn shǎo xià xuě, dàn shì shān shàng huì xià xuě.
lines.english: It rarely snows in Taipei, but it snows on the mountains.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 太好了！我很想看雪。
lines.pinyin: tài hǎo le! wǒ hěn xiǎng kàn xuě.
lines.english: That's great! I really want to see snow.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我們可以去陽明山，那裡有時候會下雪。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men kě yǐ qù yáng míng shān, nà lǐ yǒu shí hòu huì xià xuě.
lines.english: We can go to Yangmingshan, it sometimes snows there.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好！我們今天先去，但是要帶傘。
lines.pinyin: hǎo! wǒ men jīn tiān xiān qù, dàn shì yào dài sǎn.
lines.english: Okay! Let's go today, but we need to bring umbrellas.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 沒問題，我有兩把傘，給你一把。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, wǒ yǒu liǎng bǎ sǎn, gěi nǐ yī bǎ.
lines.english: No problem, I have two umbrellas, I'll give you one.

dialogueSections.title: Favorite Season
dialogueSections.scene: Students discuss their favorite seasons and why.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你最喜歡哪個季節？
lines.pinyin: nǐ zuì xǐ huan nǎ gè jì jié?
lines.english: What is your favorite season?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我最喜歡冬天，你呢？
lines.pinyin: wǒ zuì xǐ huan dōng tiān, nǐ ne?
lines.english: I like winter the most, how about you?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 為什麼喜歡冬天？冬天很冷啊！
lines.pinyin: wèi shén me xǐ huan dōng tiān? dōng tiān hěn lěng a!
lines.english: Why do you like winter? Winter is very cold!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 因為冬天可以喝熱飲，也可以看雪。
lines.pinyin: yīn wèi dōng tiān kě yǐ hē rè yǐn, yě kě yǐ kàn xuě.
lines.english: Because in winter you can drink hot drinks and also see snow.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我比較喜歡夏天，可以去游泳。
lines.pinyin: wǒ bǐ jiào xǐ huan xià tiān, kě yǐ qù yóu yǒng.
lines.english: I prefer summer, I can go swimming.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 夏天不是很熱嗎？太陽很大。
lines.pinyin: xià tiān bù shì hěn rè ma? tài yáng hěn dà.
lines.english: Isn't it very hot in summer? The sun is very strong.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我喜歡熱的天氣，不怕熱。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xǐ huan rè de tiān qì, bù pà rè.
lines.english: I like hot weather, I'm not afraid of heat.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 台灣夏天的氣候很特別，又熱又潮濕。
lines.pinyin: táiwān xià tiān de qì hòu hěn tè bié, yòu rè yòu cháo shī.
lines.english: Taiwan's summer climate is special, both hot and humid.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是啊，而且雨季在夏天，常常下雨。
lines.pinyin: shì a, ér qiě yǔ jì zài xià tiān, cháng cháng xià yǔ.
lines.english: Yes, and the rainy season is in summer, it often rains.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我最怕颱風，台灣夏天常有颱風。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zuì pà tái fēng, táiwān xià tiān cháng yǒu tái fēng.
lines.english: I'm most afraid of typhoons, Taiwan often has typhoons in summer.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 颱風來的時候很危險，刮大風下大雨。
lines.pinyin: tái fēng lái de shí hòu hěn wēi xiǎn, guā dà fēng xià dà yǔ.
lines.english: It's very dangerous when typhoons come, with strong winds and heavy rain.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 所以我覺得秋天更好，天晴又涼快。
lines.pinyin: suǒ yǐ wǒ jué de qiū tiān gèng hǎo, tiān qíng yòu liáng kuai.
lines.english: So I think autumn is better, clear skies and cool.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 秋天的溫度最舒適，大概二十度。
lines.pinyin: qiū tiān de wēn dù zuì shū shì, dà gài èr shí dù.
lines.english: Autumn's temperature is the most comfortable, about 20 degrees.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對，不冷不熱，很完美。
lines.pinyin: duì, bù lěng bù rè, hěn wán měi.
lines.english: Right, neither cold nor hot, very perfect.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 春天的天氣怎麼樣？
lines.pinyin: chūn tiān de tiān qì zěn me yàng?
lines.english: How is the weather in spring?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 春天溫暖，但是有時候會下雨和刮風。
lines.pinyin: chūn tiān wēn nuǎn, dàn shì yǒu shí hòu huì xià yǔ hé guā fēng.
lines.english: Spring is warm, but sometimes it rains and gets windy.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 不管哪個季節，台灣的天氣都很特別。
lines.pinyin: bù guǎn nǎ gè jì jié, táiwān de tiān qì dōu hěn tè bié.
lines.english: Regardless of the season, Taiwan's weather is always special.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是啊，這也是台灣很有趣的地方。
lines.pinyin: shì a, zhè yě shì táiwān hěn yǒu qù de dì fāng.
lines.english: Yes, that's also what makes Taiwan interesting.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你在家鄉的氣候跟台灣一樣嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ zài jiā xiāng de qì hòu gēn táiwān yī yàng ma?
lines.english: Is the climate in your hometown like Taiwan?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 不一樣，我的家鄉冬天下很多雪。
lines.pinyin: bù yī yàng, wǒ de jiā xiāng dōng tiān xià hěn duō xuě.
lines.english: No, my hometown has lots of snow in winter.

dialogueSections.title: Weather Forecast Discussion
dialogueSections.scene: Two people discuss the weather forecast for the weekend.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你看了週末的天氣預報嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ kàn le zhōu mò de tiān qì yù bào ma?
lines.english: Did you check the weekend weather forecast?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 看了，週六晴天，週日可能下雨。
lines.pinyin: kàn le, zhōu liù qíng tiān, zhōu rì kě néng xià yǔ.
lines.english: Yes, Saturday is sunny, Sunday it might rain.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 溫度大概幾度？
lines.pinyin: wēn dù dà gài jǐ dù?
lines.english: What's the approximate temperature?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 週六白天大概二十八度，晚上涼一點。
lines.pinyin: zhōu liù bái tiān dà gài èr shí bā dù, wǎn shang liáng yī diǎn.
lines.english: Saturday daytime about 28 degrees, cooler in the evening.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 二十八度感覺有點熱。
lines.pinyin: èr shí bā dù gǎn jué yǒu diǎn rè.
lines.english: 28 degrees feels a bit hot.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 但是會有風，感覺會涼快一些。
lines.pinyin: dàn shì huì yǒu fēng, gǎn jué huì liáng kuai yī xiē.
lines.english: But there will be wind, so it'll feel a bit cooler.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那週日的天氣呢？
lines.pinyin: nà zhōu rì de tiān qì ne?
lines.english: What about Sunday's weather?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 週日陰天，下午有雨，溫度比較低，只有二十三度。
lines.pinyin: zhōu rì yīn tiān, xià wǔ yǒu yǔ, wēn dù bǐ jiào dī, zhǐ yǒu èr shí sān dù.
lines.english: Sunday is cloudy, rain in the afternoon, lower temperature, only 23 degrees.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我週六想去爬山，天晴應該不錯。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zhōu liù xiǎng qù pá shān, tiān qíng yīng gāi bú cuò.
lines.english: I want to go hiking Saturday, clear sky should be nice.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是個好主意！要帶夠水，因為天氣熱。
lines.pinyin: shì gè hǎo zhǔ yì! yào dài gòu shuǐ, yīn wèi tiān qì rè.
lines.english: That's a good idea! Bring enough water because of the hot weather.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 對，我也要穿涼一點的衣服。
lines.pinyin: duì, wǒ yě yào chuān liáng yī diǎn de yī fu.
lines.english: Right, I should also wear cooler clothes.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 週日你做什麼？要帶傘嗎？
lines.pinyin: zhōu rì nǐ zuò shén me? yào dài sǎn ma?
lines.english: What are you doing Sunday? Do I need to bring an umbrella?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 週日在家休息，反正要下雨。
lines.pinyin: zhōu rì zài jiā xiū xi, fǎn zhèng yào xià yǔ.
lines.english: Staying home to rest Sunday, since it's going to rain.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我週日有個約會，希望雨不要太大。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zhōu rì yǒu gè yuē huì, xī wàng yǔ bù yào tài dà.
lines.english: I have a date Sunday, hope the rain won't be too heavy.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你一定要帶傘，還有穿溫暖一點。
lines.pinyin: nǐ yī dìng yào dài sǎn, hái yǒu chuān wēn nuǎn yī diǎn.
lines.english: You must bring an umbrella, and dress a bit warmer.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好的，謝謝你提醒我。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, xiè xie nǐ tí xǐng wǒ.
lines.english: Okay, thanks for reminding me.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 台灣的天氣有時候很難預測。
lines.pinyin: táiwān de tiān qì yǒu shí hòu hěn nán yù cè.
lines.english: Taiwan's weather is sometimes hard to predict.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是啊，早上晴天，下午可能突然下雨。
lines.pinyin: shì a, zǎo shang qíng tiān, xià wǔ kě néng tū rán xià yǔ.
lines.english: Yes, sunny in the morning, then sudden rain in the afternoon.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 所以最好每天都帶傘出門。
lines.pinyin: suǒ yǐ zuì hǎo měi tiān dōu dài sǎn chū mén.
lines.english: So it's best to bring an umbrella every day you go out.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你說得對！傘是台灣人的必備物品。
lines.pinyin: nǐ shuō de duì! sǎn shì táiwān rén de bì bèi wù pǐn.
lines.english: You're right! An umbrella is a must-have for people in Taiwan.

text.zh: 一年有四個季節：春夏秋冬。
text.pinyin: yì nián yǒu sì gè jì jié: chūn xià qiū dōng.
text.english: A year has four seasons: spring, summer, autumn, and winter.

text.zh: 每個季節的天氣都不一樣。
text.pinyin: měi gè jì jié de tiān qì dōu bù yī yàng.
text.english: The weather in each season is different.

text.zh: 你可以在不同的季節做不同的活動。
text.pinyin: nǐ kě yǐ zài bù tóng de jì jié zuò bù tóng de huó dòng.
text.english: You can do different activities in different seasons.

comprehension.question: How many seasons are in a year?
comprehension.questionZh: 一年有幾個季節？

comprehension.question: Is the weather the same in every season?
comprehension.questionZh: 每個季節的天氣都一樣嗎？
options: 只有夏天一樣 Only summer is same

comprehension.question: What can you do in different seasons?
comprehension.questionZh: 在不同季節可以做什麼？
options: 什麼都不能做 Can't do anything

questions.question: What do you do if it's going to rain?

title: Hobbies & Interests
description: Learn how to talk about what you like to do in your free time.

dialogueSections.title: Weekend Hobbies
dialogueSections.scene: Two friends share what they like to do on weekends.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你週末通常做什麼？
lines.pinyin: nǐ zhōu mò tōng cháng zuò shén me?
lines.english: What do you usually do on weekends?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我喜歡在家看書或是聽音樂。你呢？
lines.pinyin: wǒ xǐ huan zài jiā kàn shū huò shì tīng yīn yuè. nǐ ne?
lines.english: I like to read books or listen to music at home. And you?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我喜歡運動，週末去跑步或游泳。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xǐ huan yùn dòng, zhōu mò qù pǎo bù huò yóu yǒng.
lines.english: I like sports, on weekends I go running or swimming.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你每週都去游泳嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ měi zhōu dōu qù yóu yǒng ma?
lines.english: Do you go swimming every week?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 差不多，游泳是我最喜歡的運動。
lines.pinyin: chà bù duō, yóu yǒng shì wǒ zuì xǐ huan de yùn dòng.
lines.english: More or less, swimming is my favorite sport.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我不太會游泳，我比較喜歡打球。
lines.pinyin: wǒ bù tài huì yóu yǒng, wǒ bǐ jiào xǐ huan dǎ qiú.
lines.english: I'm not very good at swimming, I prefer playing ball sports.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你打什麼球？
lines.pinyin: nǐ dǎ shén me qiú?
lines.english: What ball sports do you play?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我打籃球，也喜歡打羽毛球。
lines.pinyin: wǒ dǎ lán qiú, yě xǐ huan dǎ yǔ máo qiú.
lines.english: I play basketball, and I also like badminton.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 除了運動，你還有什麼愛好？
lines.pinyin: chú le yùn dòng, nǐ hái yǒu shén me ài hào?
lines.english: Besides sports, what other hobbies do you have?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我很喜歡攝影，每次旅遊都帶相機。
lines.pinyin: wǒ hěn xǐ huan shè yǐng, měi cì lǚ yóu dōu dài xiàng jī.
lines.english: I really like photography, I always bring a camera when traveling.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那你一定拍了很多漂亮的照片！
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ yī dìng pāi le hěn duō piào liang de zhào piàn!
lines.english: You must have taken many beautiful photos!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是的！旅遊是我最大的興趣。你呢？
lines.pinyin: shì de! lǚ yóu shì wǒ zuì dà de xìng qù. nǐ ne?
lines.english: Yes! Travel is my greatest interest. What about you?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我除了游泳，還喜歡烹飪。
lines.pinyin: wǒ chú le yóu yǒng, hái xǐ huan pēng rèn.
lines.english: Besides swimming, I also like cooking.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 哇！你會做什麼菜？
lines.pinyin: wā! nǐ huì zuò shén me cài?
lines.english: Wow! What dishes can you make?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我會做中式和日式料理，也喜歡烤蛋糕。
lines.pinyin: wǒ huì zuò zhōng shì hé rì shì liào lǐ, yě xǐ huan kǎo dàn gāo.
lines.english: I can make Chinese and Japanese cuisine, and I also like baking cakes.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 真厲害！你有沒有其他才藝？
lines.pinyin: zhēn lì hài! nǐ yǒu méi yǒu qí tā cái yì?
lines.english: Impressive! Do you have any other talents?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我會彈鋼琴，從小就學了。
lines.pinyin: wǒ huì tán gāng qín, cóng xiǎo jiù xué le.
lines.english: I can play piano, I've been learning since I was young.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那你的興趣真的很多！
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ de xìng qù zhēn de hěn duō!
lines.english: You really have many interests!

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 對，我覺得有興趣愛好，生活更豐富。
lines.pinyin: duì, wǒ jué de yǒu xìng qù ài hào, shēng huó gèng fēng fù.
lines.english: Right, I think having hobbies makes life more enriching.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我同意！下週我們一起去爬山怎麼樣？
lines.pinyin: wǒ tóng yì! xià zhōu wǒ men yì qǐ qù pá shān zěn me yàng?
lines.english: I agree! How about we go hiking together next week?

dialogueSections.title: Joining a Club
dialogueSections.scene: A student considers joining a school club.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你在學校有參加什麼社團嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ zài xué xiào yǒu cān jiā shén me shè tuán ma?
lines.english: Have you joined any clubs at school?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有，我參加了攝影社和籃球社。
lines.pinyin: yǒu, wǒ cān jiā le shè yǐng shè hé lán qiú shè.
lines.english: Yes, I joined the photography club and basketball club.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 聽起來很有趣！你喜歡哪一個？
lines.pinyin: tīng qǐ lái hěn yǒu qù! nǐ xǐ huan nǎ yī gè?
lines.english: That sounds fun! Which one do you like?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 兩個都喜歡！攝影社讓我學到很多技術。
lines.pinyin: liǎng gè dōu xǐ huan! shè yǐng shè ràng wǒ xué dào hěn duō jì shù.
lines.english: I like both! The photography club taught me many techniques.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我也想加入一個社團，你有推薦嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě xiǎng jiā rù yī gè shè tuán, nǐ yǒu tuī jiàn ma?
lines.english: I also want to join a club, do you have any recommendations?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你喜歡什麼？音樂、運動還是藝術？
lines.pinyin: nǐ xǐ huan shén me? yīn yuè, yùn dòng hái shì yì shù?
lines.english: What do you like? Music, sports, or art?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我喜歡音樂，特別是唱歌。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xǐ huan yīn yuè, tè bié shì chàng gē.
lines.english: I like music, especially singing.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那你可以加入合唱團！他們週三練習。
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ kě yǐ jiā rù hé chàng tuán! tā men zhōu sān liàn xí.
lines.english: Then you can join the choir! They practice on Wednesdays.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 合唱團！我一直想學，但是不知道自己唱得好不好。
lines.pinyin: hé chàng tuán! wǒ yī zhí xiǎng xué, dàn shì bù zhī dào zì jǐ chàng de hǎo bù hǎo.
lines.english: The choir! I've always wanted to learn, but don't know if I sing well enough.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你可以先去聽聽看，不需要立刻決定加入。
lines.pinyin: nǐ kě yǐ xiān qù tīng tīng kàn, bù xū yào lì kè jué dìng jiā rù.
lines.english: You can go listen first, no need to decide immediately.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好主意！那你有沒有舞蹈社？
lines.pinyin: hǎo zhǔ yì! nà nǐ yǒu méi yǒu wǔ dǎo shè?
lines.english: Good idea! Is there a dance club?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有，舞蹈社很受歡迎，很多同學想加入。
lines.pinyin: yǒu, wǔ dǎo shè hěn shòu huān yíng, hěn duō tóng xué xiǎng jiā rù.
lines.english: Yes, the dance club is very popular, many students want to join.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我也很喜歡跳舞，尤其是現代舞。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě hěn xǐ huan tiào wǔ, yóu qí shì xiàn dài wǔ.
lines.english: I also really like dancing, especially modern dance.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那你可以同時加入合唱團和舞蹈社！
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ kě yǐ tóng shí jiā rù hé chàng tuán hé wǔ dǎo shè!
lines.english: Then you can join both the choir and dance club at the same time!

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 兩個都加入，時間夠嗎？
lines.pinyin: liǎng gè dōu jiā rù, shí jiān gòu ma?
lines.english: Joining both, will there be enough time?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 只要安排好時間，應該沒問題。
lines.pinyin: zhǐ yào ān pái hǎo shí jiān, yīng gāi méi wèn tí.
lines.english: As long as you manage your time well, it should be fine.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 社團活動對學生有很多好處，對嗎？
lines.pinyin: shè tuán huó dòng duì xué shēng yǒu hěn duō hǎo chù, duì ma?
lines.english: Club activities have many benefits for students, right?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對！可以結交朋友，也可以發展才藝。
lines.pinyin: duì! kě yǐ jié jiāo péng you, yě kě yǐ fā zhǎn cái yì.
lines.english: Right! You can make friends and also develop your talents.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 還有放鬆心情，不讓學習太緊張。
lines.pinyin: hái yǒu fàng sōng xīn qíng, bù ràng xué xí tài jǐn zhāng.
lines.english: Also to relax, so studying isn't too stressful.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 說得對！我明天帶你去看社團介紹。
lines.pinyin: shuō de duì! wǒ míng tiān dài nǐ qù kàn shè tuán jiè shào.
lines.english: Well said! I'll take you to see the club introductions tomorrow.

dialogueSections.title: Comparing Hobbies
dialogueSections.scene: Two people discuss and compare their different hobbies and interests.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你對什麼有興趣？
lines.pinyin: nǐ duì shén me yǒu xìng qù?
lines.english: What are you interested in?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我對藝術很有興趣，特別是畫畫。
lines.pinyin: wǒ duì yì shù hěn yǒu xìng qù, tè bié shì huà huà.
lines.english: I'm very interested in art, especially drawing.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你畫什麼？風景還是人物？
lines.pinyin: nǐ huà shén me? fēng jǐng hái shì rén wù?
lines.english: What do you draw? Landscapes or people?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 兩種都畫，不過我比較喜歡畫風景。
lines.pinyin: liǎng zhǒng dōu huà, bù guò wǒ bǐ jiào xǐ huan huà fēng jǐng.
lines.english: Both, but I prefer drawing landscapes.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那你平時有去上繪畫課嗎？
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ píng shí yǒu qù shàng huì huà kè ma?
lines.english: Do you take drawing classes?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有，我每週六去上興趣班。
lines.pinyin: yǒu, wǒ měi zhōu liù qù shàng xìng qù bān.
lines.english: Yes, I go to an interest class every Saturday.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 除了畫畫，你還有什麼休閒活動？
lines.pinyin: chú le huà huà, nǐ hái yǒu shén me xiū xián huó dòng?
lines.english: Besides drawing, what other leisure activities do you have?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我喜歡看電影，也喜歡玩遊戲. 你呢？
lines.pinyin: wǒ xǐ huan kàn diàn yǐng, yě xǐ huan wán yóu xì. nǐ ne?
lines.english: I like watching movies, and I also like playing games. What about you?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我的興趣是學語言，現在在學日文。
lines.pinyin: wǒ de xìng qù shì xué yǔ yán, xiàn zài zài xué rì wén.
lines.english: My interest is learning languages, I'm currently learning Japanese.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 哇，學語言需要很多耐心。
lines.pinyin: wā, xué yǔ yán xū yào hěn duō nài xīn.
lines.english: Wow, learning languages requires a lot of patience.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是的，但是很有成就感！
lines.pinyin: shì de, dàn shì hěn yǒu chéng jiù gǎn!
lines.english: Yes, but it's very satisfying!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你還學什麼語言？
lines.pinyin: nǐ hái xué shén me yǔ yán?
lines.english: What other languages do you learn?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我在學中文和日文，以後想學韓文。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zài xué zhōng wén hé rì wén, yǐ hòu xiǎng xué hán wén.
lines.english: I'm learning Chinese and Japanese, and want to learn Korean in the future.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你的學習能力很強！你有參加比賽嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ de xué xí néng lì hěn qiáng! nǐ yǒu cān jiā bǐ sài ma?
lines.english: You have a strong learning ability! Have you participated in any competitions?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 有，上個月參加了語言比賽，獲得第三名。
lines.pinyin: yǒu, shàng gè yuè cān jiā le yǔ yán bǐ sài, huò dé dì sān míng.
lines.english: Yes, last month I participated in a language competition and got third place.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 恭喜你！那你的興趣幫助了你的學習。
lines.pinyin: gōng xǐ nǐ! nà nǐ de xìng qù bāng zhù le nǐ de xué xí.
lines.english: Congratulations! Your interests helped with your studies.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 對，有興趣就有動力學習。
lines.pinyin: duì, yǒu xìng qù jiù yǒu dòng lì xué xí.
lines.english: Right, having interest gives you the motivation to learn.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我也想找到一個讓我有動力的興趣。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě xiǎng zhǎo dào yī gè ràng wǒ yǒu dòng lì de xìng qù.
lines.english: I also want to find an interest that motivates me.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 多嘗試，你一定可以找到！
lines.pinyin: duō cháng shì, nǐ yī dìng kě yǐ zhǎo dào!
lines.english: Try more things, you'll definitely find it!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 謝謝你的鼓勵！那我先去試試書法班。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie nǐ de gǔ lì! nà wǒ xiān qù shì shì shū fǎ bān.
lines.english: Thank you for the encouragement! Then I'll try a calligraphy class first.

text.zh: 有愛好的人生活會更精彩。
text.pinyin: yǒu ài hào de rén shēng huó huì gèng jīng cǎi.
text.english: People with hobbies have more wonderful lives.

text.zh: 無論是運動還是藝術，都能讓人快樂。
text.pinyin: wú lùn shì yùn dòng hái shì yì shù, dōu néng ràng rén kuài lè.
text.english: Whether it's sports or art, it can make people happy.

text.zh: 你可以在週末和朋友一起分享你的興趣。
text.pinyin: nǐ kě yǐ zài zhōu mò hé péng you yì qǐ fēn xiǎng nǐ de xìng qù.
text.english: You can share your interests with friends on weekends.

comprehension.question: Why is having a hobby good?
comprehension.questionZh: 為什麼有愛好很好？
options: 可以賺錢 Can make money
生活會更精彩 Life will be more wonderful
不用上學 No need for school

comprehension.question: What can make people happy?
comprehension.questionZh: 什麼可以讓人快樂？
options: 運動與藝術 Sports and art

comprehension.question: When can you share interests with friends?
comprehension.questionZh: 什麼時候可以跟朋友分享興趣？

questions.question: If someone 學語言, they are...

title: Health & Body
description: Learn basic body parts and how to talk about health.

dialogueSections.title: Not Feeling Well
dialogueSections.scene: A student tells their teacher they are sick.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 老師，我今天不太舒服。
lines.pinyin: lǎo shī, wǒ jīn tiān bù tài shū fu.
lines.english: Teacher, I'm not feeling well today.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你怎麼了？哪裡不舒服？
lines.pinyin: nǐ zěn me le? nǎ lǐ bù shū fu?
lines.english: What's wrong? Where do you feel unwell?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我頭很疼，喉嚨也不舒服。
lines.pinyin: wǒ tóu hěn téng, hóu lóng yě bù shū fu.
lines.english: My head hurts a lot and my throat is also uncomfortable.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你有沒有發燒？
lines.pinyin: nǐ yǒu méi yǒu fā shāo?
lines.english: Do you have a fever?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 不知道，我沒有量體溫。
lines.pinyin: bù zhī dào, wǒ méi yǒu liáng tǐ wēn.
lines.english: I don't know, I haven't taken my temperature.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你的臉色不好，看起來像感冒了。
lines.pinyin: nǐ de liǎn sè bù hǎo, kàn qǐ lái xiàng gǎn mào le.
lines.english: Your complexion doesn't look good, it looks like you have a cold.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是的，昨天晚上我就開始覺得不舒服。
lines.pinyin: shì de, zuó tiān wǎn shang wǒ jiù kāi shǐ jué de bù shū fu.
lines.english: Yes, last night I started feeling unwell.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你有沒有吃藥？
lines.pinyin: nǐ yǒu méi yǒu chī yào?
lines.english: Did you take any medicine?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 沒有，我家裡沒有感冒藥。
lines.pinyin: méi yǒu, wǒ jiā lǐ méi yǒu gǎn mào yào.
lines.english: No, I don't have cold medicine at home.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那你應該去看醫生，去掛號就診。
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ yīng gāi qù kàn yī shēng, qù guà hào jiù zhěn.
lines.english: Then you should go see a doctor, go register and get treated.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好的，醫院的門診幾點開始？
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, yī yuàn de mén zhěn jǐ diǎn kāi shǐ?
lines.english: Okay, what time does the hospital's outpatient clinic open?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 早上八點開始，下午一點半也有。
lines.pinyin: zǎo shang bā diǎn kāi shǐ, xià wǔ yī diǎn bàn yě yǒu.
lines.english: It opens at 8 AM, there's also afternoon at 1:30.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那我先回去休息，下午去看病。
lines.pinyin: nà wǒ xiān huí qù xiū xi, xià wǔ qù kàn bìng.
lines.english: Then I'll go home to rest first, then see the doctor in the afternoon.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好，多喝水，好好休息。
lines.pinyin: hǎo, duō hē shuǐ, hǎo hǎo xiū xi.
lines.english: Okay, drink more water, get good rest.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝老師。我明天如果恢復了就來上課。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie lǎo shī. wǒ míng tiān rú guǒ huī fù le jiù lái shàng kè.
lines.english: Thank you teacher. If I recover tomorrow I'll come to class.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 不用急，健康最重要。
lines.pinyin: bù yòng jí, jiàn kāng zuì zhòng yào.
lines.english: Don't rush, health is the most important thing.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 對，我明白了。我肚子也有一點不舒服。
lines.pinyin: duì, wǒ míng bái le. wǒ dù zi yě yǒu yī diǎn bù shū fu.
lines.english: Right, I understand. My stomach is also a bit uncomfortable.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那更要快點去看醫生，不要拖。
lines.pinyin: nà gèng yào kuài diǎn qù kàn yī shēng, bù yào tuō.
lines.english: Then you need to go see the doctor even sooner, don't delay.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好的，我馬上去。謝謝老師關心。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, wǒ mǎ shàng qù. xiè xie lǎo shī guān xīn.
lines.english: Okay, I'll go right away. Thank you for caring, teacher.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 保重，希望你快點好起來！
lines.pinyin: bǎo zhòng, xī wàng nǐ kuài diǎn hǎo qǐ lái!
lines.english: Take care, I hope you recover quickly!

dialogueSections.title: At the Doctor's Office
dialogueSections.scene: A patient talks to a doctor at the clinic.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 醫生，您好。我最近身體不太好。
lines.pinyin: yī shēng, nín hǎo. wǒ zuì jìn shēn tǐ bù tài hǎo.
lines.english: Doctor, hello. I haven't been feeling well recently.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你好，請坐。你有什麼症狀？
lines.pinyin: nǐ hǎo, qǐng zuò. nǐ yǒu shén me zhèng zhuàng?
lines.english: Hello, please sit. What symptoms do you have?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我頭疼、發燒，喉嚨也很疼。
lines.pinyin: wǒ tóu téng, fā shāo, hóu lóng yě hěn téng.
lines.english: I have a headache, fever, and my throat is very sore.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 從什麼時候開始的？
lines.pinyin: cóng shén me shí hòu kāi shǐ de?
lines.english: When did it start?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 大概三天前開始，越來越嚴重。
lines.pinyin: dà gài sān tiān qián kāi shǐ, yuè lái yuè yán zhòng.
lines.english: It started about three days ago and is getting worse.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我先量一下你的體溫。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiān liáng yī xià nǐ de tǐ wēn.
lines.english: Let me take your temperature first.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好的。我有過敏，對花粉過敏。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de. wǒ yǒu guò mǐn, duì huā fěn guò mǐn.
lines.english: Okay. I have an allergy, I'm allergic to pollen.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 知道了。你的體溫是三十八度五，有發燒。
lines.pinyin: zhī dào le. nǐ de tǐ wēn shì sān shí bā dù wǔ, yǒu fā shāo.
lines.english: I see. Your temperature is 38.5°C, you have a fever.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我的肩膀和脖子也很疼。
lines.pinyin: wǒ de jiān bǎng hé bó zi yě hěn téng.
lines.english: My shoulders and neck also hurt.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我看一下你的喉嚨。張開嘴巴說「啊」。
lines.pinyin: wǒ kàn yī xià nǐ de hóu lóng. zhāng kāi zuǐ ba shuō 'ā'.
lines.english: Let me look at your throat. Open your mouth and say 'ah'.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Ahhh...

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 喉嚨有發炎，你應該是感冒了。
lines.pinyin: hóu lóng yǒu fā yán, nǐ yīng gāi shì gǎn mào le.
lines.english: Your throat is inflamed, you likely have a cold.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 需要打針嗎？
lines.pinyin: xū yào dǎ zhēn ma?
lines.english: Do I need an injection?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 不需要，我給你開藥就好了。
lines.pinyin: bù xū yào, wǒ gěi nǐ kāi yào jiù hǎo le.
lines.english: No need, I'll just prescribe medicine for you.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 要吃幾天的藥？
lines.pinyin: yào chī jǐ tiān de yào?
lines.english: How many days of medicine do I need?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 吃三天，每天三次，飯後服用。
lines.pinyin: chī sān tiān, měi tiān sān cì, fàn hòu fú yòng.
lines.english: Take it for three days, three times a day, after meals.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好的，需要再來複診嗎？
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, xū yào zài lái fù zhěn ma?
lines.english: Okay, do I need to come back for a follow-up?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 如果三天後還沒好，再來看我。
lines.pinyin: rú guǒ sān tiān hòu hái méi hǎo, zài lái kàn wǒ.
lines.english: If you haven't recovered after three days, come see me again.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我要多休息嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ yào duō xiū xi ma?
lines.english: Should I rest more?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是的，多休息、多喝水、不要吹冷氣。
lines.pinyin: shì de, duō xiū xi, duō hē shuǐ, bù yào chuī lěng qì.
lines.english: Yes, rest more, drink more water, and avoid air conditioning.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝醫生，我希望快點恢復健康。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie yī shēng, wǒ xī wàng kuài diǎn huī fù jiàn kāng.
lines.english: Thank you doctor, I hope to recover my health quickly.

dialogueSections.title: Staying Healthy
dialogueSections.scene: Friends discuss how to stay healthy.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你看起來氣色很好，你怎麼保持健康？
lines.pinyin: nǐ kàn qǐ lái qì sè hěn hǎo, nǐ zěn me bǎo chí jiàn kāng?
lines.english: You look very healthy, how do you stay healthy?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我每天運動、早睡早起，飲食也很均衡。
lines.pinyin: wǒ měi tiān yùn dòng, zǎo shuì zǎo qǐ, yǐn shí yě hěn jūn héng.
lines.english: I exercise every day, sleep and wake up early, and my diet is balanced.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你每天做什麼運動？
lines.pinyin: nǐ měi tiān zuò shén me yùn dòng?
lines.english: What exercise do you do every day?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 早上跑步三十分鐘，晚上做瑜珈。
lines.pinyin: zǎo shang pǎo bù sān shí fēn zhōng, wǎn shang zuò yú jiā.
lines.english: Morning run for 30 minutes, evening yoga.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我的身體最近不太好，常常感冒。
lines.pinyin: wǒ de shēn tǐ zuì jìn bù tài hǎo, cháng cháng gǎn mào.
lines.english: My health hasn't been good recently, I often get colds.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那你一定要多注意身體，多休息。
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ yī dìng yào duō zhù yì shēn tǐ, duō xiū xi.
lines.english: Then you definitely need to take better care of yourself and rest more.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我眼睛也常常疼，因為用電腦太多。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yǎn jīng yě cháng cháng téng, yīn wèi yòng diàn nǎo tài duō.
lines.english: My eyes often hurt too, because I use the computer too much.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那你要讓眼睛休息，每隔一小時看遠一點。
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ yào ràng yǎn jīng xiū xi, měi gé yī xiǎo shí kàn yuǎn yī diǎn.
lines.english: Then you need to let your eyes rest, look into the distance every hour.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 對，我的肩膀和背也常常疼。
lines.pinyin: duì, wǒ de jiān bǎng hé bèi yě cháng cháng téng.
lines.english: Right, my shoulders and back often hurt too.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那你需要做一些伸展運動，放鬆肌肉。
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ xū yào zuò yī xiē shēn zhǎn yùn dòng, fàng sōng jī ròu.
lines.english: Then you need to do some stretching exercises to relax your muscles.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你有沒有去看過醫生？
lines.pinyin: nǐ yǒu méi yǒu qù kàn guò yī shēng?
lines.english: Have you ever gone to see a doctor?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我一年去一次，做健康檢查。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yī nián qù yī cì, zuò jiàn kāng jiǎn chá.
lines.english: I go once a year for a health checkup.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 健康檢查很重要，你都檢查哪些？
lines.pinyin: jiàn kāng jiǎn chá hěn zhòng yào, nǐ dōu jiǎn chá nǎ xiē?
lines.english: Health checkups are important, what do you check?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 血壓、血糖、視力還有一般的身體检查。
lines.pinyin: xuè yā, xuè táng, shì lì hái yǒu yī bān de shēn tǐ jiǎn chá.
lines.english: Blood pressure, blood sugar, vision, and general physical examination.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我也應該去做一次，我很久沒檢查了。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě yīng gāi qù zuò yī cì, wǒ hěn jiǔ méi jiǎn chá le.
lines.english: I should also go for one, I haven't had a checkup for a long time.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 健康是最重要的財富！
lines.pinyin: jiàn kāng shì zuì zhòng yào de cái fù!
lines.english: Health is the most important wealth!

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 說得對！我決定從今天開始運動。
lines.pinyin: shuō de duì! wǒ jué dìng cóng jīn tiān kāi shǐ yùn dòng.
lines.english: Well said! I've decided to start exercising from today.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 太棒了！你可以先從走路開始。
lines.pinyin: tài bàng le! nǐ kě yǐ xiān cóng zǒu lù kāi shǐ.
lines.english: Excellent! You can start with walking first.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好，每天走三十分鐘。謝謝你的建議！
lines.pinyin: hǎo, měi tiān zǒu sān shí fēn zhōng. xiè xie nǐ de jiàn yì!
lines.english: Okay, walk for 30 minutes every day. Thank you for your advice!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 加油！希望你的身體越來越好。
lines.pinyin: jiā yóu! xī wàng nǐ de shēn tǐ yuè lái yuè hǎo.
lines.english: Keep it up! I hope your health gets better and better.

text.zh: 健康是最好的財富。
text.pinyin: jiàn kāng shì zuì hǎo de cái fù.
text.english: Health is the best wealth.

text.zh: 我們要多運動，也要吃健康的食物。
text.pinyin: wǒ men yào duō yùn dòng, yě yào chī jiàn kāng de shí wu.
text.english: We should exercise more and also eat healthy food.

text.zh: 生病時要聽醫生的話，好好休息。
text.pinyin: shēng bìng shí yào tīng yī shēng de huà, hǎo hǎo xiū xi.
text.english: When sick, listen to the doctor and rest well.

comprehension.question: What is the best wealth?
comprehension.questionZh: 什麼是最好的財富？

comprehension.question: What should we do to be healthy?
comprehension.questionZh: 為了健康我們應該做什麼？
options: 多運動與吃健康食物 Exercise more and eat healthy

comprehension.question: What should you do when sick?
comprehension.questionZh: 生病時該怎麼辦？
options: 聽醫生的話並休息 Listen to doctor and rest

questions.answer: Rest more and drink more water

If you have 過敏, you have...

Which body part is 肩膀?

title: Meeting Friends
description: Learn how to make plans and catch up with friends.

text.zh: 好朋友需要經常聯繫。我們可以打電話或是傳訊息分享生活。
text.pinyin: hǎo péng you xū yào jīng cháng lián xì. wǒ men kě yǐ dǎ diàn huà huò shì chuán xùn xí fēn xiǎng shēng huó.
text.english: Good friends need to stay in touch often. We can call or message to share our lives.

text.zh: 放假的時候一起出去聚會，能讓感情更好。
text.pinyin: fàng jià de shí hou yì qǐ chū qù jù huì, néng ràng gǎn qíng gèng hǎo.
text.english: Going out for a gathering during holidays can strengthen the relationship.

text.zh: 準時參加約會是對朋友的基本尊重。
text.pinyin: zhǔn shí cān jiā yuē huì shì duì péng you de jī běn zūn zhòng.
text.english: Being on time for a date is a basic sign of respect for friends.

comprehension.question: What is a way to stay in touch with friends?
comprehension.questionZh: 聯繫朋友的一種方式是什麼？
options: 打電話或傳訊息 Call or message

comprehension.question: What can make friendships better?
comprehension.questionZh: 什麼可以讓友情更好？

comprehension.question: What does being on time show?
comprehension.questionZh: 準時代表什麼？

dialogueSections.title: Planning a Catch-up
dialogueSections.scene: Two old friends discuss meeting up after a long time.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 喂，好久不見！最近過得怎麼樣？
lines.pinyin: wéi, hǎo jiǔ bú jiàn! zuì jìn guò de zěn me yàng?
lines.english: Hey, long time no see! How have you been recently?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 真的很久沒聯繫了！我一切都很順利。
lines.pinyin: zhēn de hěn jiǔ méi lián xì le! wǒ yī qiè dōu hěn shùn lì.
lines.english: It's really been a long time since we contacted! Everything is going smoothly for me.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 太好了。我們找個時間見面聊天吧？
lines.pinyin: tài hǎo le. wǒ men zhǎo gè shí jiān jiàn miàn liáo tiān ba?
lines.english: Great. Should we find a time to meet and chat?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好啊！你有什麼打算？
lines.pinyin: hǎo a! nǐ yǒu shén me dǎ suàn?
lines.english: Sure! What are your plans?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這週末你有空嗎？我想邀請你來我家聚餐。
lines.pinyin: zhè zhōu mò nǐ yǒu kòng ma? wǒ xiǎng yāo qǐng nǐ lái wǒ jiā jù cān.
lines.english: Are you free this weekend? I'd like to invite you to my house for a group meal.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 週末我有空。幾點開始？
lines.pinyin: zhōu mò wǒ yǒu kòng. jǐ diǎn kāi shǐ?
lines.english: I'm free this weekend. What time does it start?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 晚上六點。我會準備一些驚喜！
lines.pinyin: wǎn shang liù diǎn. wǒ huì zhǔn bèi yī xiē jīng xǐ!
lines.english: 6 PM. I'll prepare some surprises!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 驚喜？我很期待！需要我帶什麼嗎？
lines.pinyin: jīng xǐ? wǒ hěn qī dài! xū yào wǒ dài shén me ma?
lines.english: Surprises? I'm looking forward to it! Do I need to bring anything?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 不用帶禮物，只要準時到就好了。
lines.pinyin: bù yòng dài lǐ wù, zhǐ yào zhǔn shí dào jiù hǎo le.
lines.english: No need to bring a gift, just being on time is fine.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 沒問題，我一定準時。還有誰會去？
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, wǒ yī dìng zhǔn shí. hái yǒu shéi huì qù?
lines.english: No problem, I'll definitely be on time. Who else is going?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我還邀請了一些以前的同學。
lines.pinyin: wǒ hái yāo qǐng le yī xiē yǐ qián de tóng xué.
lines.english: I've also invited some former classmates.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那太好了，可以跟大家聚會。
lines.pinyin: nà tài hǎo le, kě yǐ gēn dà jiā jù huì.
lines.english: That's great, we can have a gathering with everyone.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 對啊，大家很久沒見面了。
lines.pinyin: duì a, dà jiā hěn jiǔ méi jiàn miàn le.
lines.english: Right, everyone hasn't seen each other in a long time.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 如果你需要幫忙安排，隨時告訴我。
lines.pinyin: rú guǒ nǐ xū yào bāng máng ān pái, suí shí gào sù wǒ.
lines.english: If you need help arranging, let me know anytime.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝你的建議。我決定先去買菜。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie nǐ de jiàn yì. wǒ jué dìng xiān qù mǎi cài.
lines.english: Thanks for the suggestion. I've decided to go grocery shopping first.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好，那我們週末見！
lines.pinyin: hǎo, nà wǒ men zhōu mò jiàn!
lines.english: Okay, see you this weekend then!

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 週末見，保持聯絡！
lines.pinyin: zhōu mò jiàn, bǎo chí lián luò!
lines.english: See you this weekend, keep in touch!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好的，拜拜。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, bái bái.
lines.english: Okay, bye.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 拜拜。
lines.pinyin: bái bái.
lines.english: Bye.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對了，如果有訊息變動，記得傳訊息給我。
lines.pinyin: duì le, rú guǒ yǒu xùn xī biàn dòng, jì de chuán xùn xī gěi wǒ.
lines.english: By the way, if there are any message changes, remember to message me.

dialogueSections.title: The Party Surprise
dialogueSections.scene: At the gathering, friends are having fun and chatting.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 歡迎大家！今天我很開心能見到你們。
lines.pinyin: huān yíng dà jiā! jīn tiān wǒ hěn kāi xīn néng jiàn dào nǐ men.
lines.english: Welcome everyone! I'm very happy to see you all today.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 抱歉我遲到了一點，剛才路上有點堵車。
lines.pinyin: bào qiàn wǒ chí dào le yī diǎn, gāng cái lù shàng yǒu diǎn dǔ chē.
lines.english: Sorry I'm a bit late, there was some traffic just now.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 沒關係，聚會才剛開始。
lines.pinyin: méi guān xi, jù huì cái gāng kāi shǐ.
lines.english: It's okay, the gathering just started.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 這是給你的生日禮物，祝你生日快樂！
lines.pinyin: zhè shì gěi nǐ de shēng rì lǐ wù, zhù nǐ shēng rì kuài lè!
lines.english: This is a birthday gift for you, happy birthday!

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 哇！這真是個大驚喜！謝謝你們。
lines.pinyin: wā! zhè zhēn shì gè dà jīng xǐ! xiè xie nǐ men.
lines.english: Wow! This is a big surprise! Thank you guys.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我們打算這餐一起慶祝。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men dǎ suàn zhè cān yì qǐ qìng zhù.
lines.english: We plan to celebrate together during this meal.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我太感動了。快坐下來聊天吧。
lines.pinyin: wǒ tài gǎn dòng le. kuài zuò xià lái liáo tiān ba.
lines.english: I'm so moved. Quickly sit down and chat.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 大家最近都在忙什麼？
lines.pinyin: dà jiā zuì jìn dōu zài máng shén me?
lines.english: What has everyone been busy with recently?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我在一家科技公司工作，挺忙的。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zài yī jiā kē jì gōng sī gōng zuò, tǐng máng de.
lines.english: I'm working at a tech company, quite busy.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 我剛換了新工作，還在適應中。
lines.pinyin: wǒ gāng huàn le xīn gōng zuò, hái zài shì yìng zhōng.
lines.english: I just changed to a new job, still adapting.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 希望一切都能順利。
lines.pinyin: xī wàng yī qiè dōu néng shùn lì.
lines.english: Hope everything goes smoothly.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 這家餐廳的安排真不錯，食物很好吃。
lines.pinyin: zhè jiā cān tīng de ān pái zhēn bú cuò, shí wù hěn hǎo chī.
lines.english: This restaurant's arrangement is really nice, the food is delicious.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是吧？這是我朋友介紹的。
lines.pinyin: shì ba? zhè shì wǒ péng you jiè shào de.
lines.english: Right? My friend introduced it to me.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 我們下次再一起出來聚餐吧？
lines.pinyin: wǒ men xià cì zài yì qǐ chū lái jù cān ba?
lines.english: Should we come out for a group meal together again next time?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好主意！我們一定要經常聯繫。
lines.pinyin: hǎo zhǔ yì! wǒ men yī dìng yào jīng cháng lián xì.
lines.english: Good idea! We must contact each other frequently.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 沒錯，大家都很忙，但朋友很重要。
lines.pinyin: méi cuò, dà jiā dōu hěn máng, dàn péng you hěn zhòng yào.
lines.english: Exactly, everyone is busy, but friends are important.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 時間過得真快，派對要結束了。
lines.pinyin: shí jiān guò de zhēn kuài, pài duì yào jié shù le.
lines.english: Time really flies, the party is about to end.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是啊，很高興今天大家能來。
lines.pinyin: shì a, hěn gāo xìng jīn tiān dà jiā néng lái.
lines.english: Yes, so happy everyone could come today.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那我們先告別了，下次見！
lines.pinyin: nà wǒ men xiān gào bié le, xià cì jiàn!
lines.english: Then we'll say goodbye first, see you next time!

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 再見！保持聯絡！
lines.pinyin: zài jiàn! bǎo chí lián luò!
lines.english: Goodbye! Keep in touch!

dialogueSections.title: A New Introduction
dialogueSections.scene: A brings a new friend to the gathering and introduces them.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 各位，我想向大家介紹一位新朋友。
lines.pinyin: gè wèi, wǒ xiǎng xiàng dà jiā jiè shào yī wèi xīn péng you.
lines.english: Everyone, I'd like to introduce a new friend to you all.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 大家好，我是大衛，很高興認識你們。
lines.pinyin: dà jiā hǎo, wǒ shì dà wèi, hěn gāo xìng rèn shi nǐ men.
lines.english: Hello everyone, I'm David, very glad to meet you all.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 你好，大衛！歡迎加入我們的聚會。
lines.pinyin: nǐ hǎo, dà wèi! huān yíng jiā rù wǒ men de jù huì.
lines.english: Hello, David! Welcome to our gathering.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 謝謝！這裡氣氛真熱鬧。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie! zhè lǐ qì fēn zhēn rè nào.
lines.english: Thank you! The atmosphere here is really lively.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 大衛是我以前的同事，他最近剛搬來這座城市。
lines.pinyin: dà wèi shì wǒ yǐ qián de tóng shì, tā zuì jìn gāng bān lái zhè zuò chéng shì.
lines.english: David is a former colleague of mine; he just moved to this city recently.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 是嗎？在這裡生活還習慣嗎？
lines.pinyin: shì ma? zài zhè lǐ shēng huó hái xí guàn ma?
lines.english: Is that so? Are you used to living here yet?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 還在適應，不過這裡的人都很友善。
lines.pinyin: hái zài shì yìng, bù guò zhè lǐ de rén dōu hěn yǒu shàn.
lines.english: Still adapting, but people here are very friendly.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我建議大衛多參加一些活動，多交朋友。
lines.pinyin: wǒ jiàn yì dà wèi duō cān jiā yī xiē huó dòng, duō jiāo péng you.
lines.english: I suggested David participate in more activities and make more friends.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 沒錯！我們常有聚餐和派對，你一定要來。
lines.pinyin: méi cuò! wǒ men cháng yǒu jù cān hé pài duì, nǐ yī dìng yào lái.
lines.english: Exactly! We often have group meals and parties; you must come.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 太好了，我一定會準時參加。
lines.pinyin: tài hǎo le, wǒ yī dìng huì zhǔn shí cān jiā.
lines.english: Great, I will definitely participate on time.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我們剛才正在聊最近的工作。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men gāng cái zhèng zài liáo zuì jìn de gōng zuò.
lines.english: We were just chatting about work recently.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我現在在找工作，希望一切順利。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiàn zài zài zhǎo gōng zuò, xī wàng yī qiè shùn lì.
lines.english: I'm looking for a job now, hope everything goes smoothly.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 別擔心，這裡機會很多。你有什麼打算？
lines.pinyin: bié dān xīn, zhè lǐ jī huì hěn duō. nǐ yǒu shén me dǎ suàn?
lines.english: Don't worry, there are many opportunities here. What are your plans?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我決定先投簡歷，然後準備面試。
lines.pinyin: wǒ jué dìng xiān tóu jiǎn lì, rán hòu zhǔn bèi miàn shì.
lines.english: I've decided to send out resumes first, then prepare for interviews.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 如果你需要幫忙，隨時傳訊息給我。
lines.pinyin: rú guǒ nǐ xū yào bāng máng, suí shí chuán xùn xī gěi wǒ.
lines.english: If you need help, message me anytime.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 我們大家都會支持你的。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men dà jiā dōu huì zhī chí nǐ de.
lines.english: We will all support you.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 謝謝你們，認識你們真開心。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie nǐ men, rèn shi nǐ men zhēn kāi xīn.
lines.english: Thank you guys, it's really happy to meet you.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好了，我們先去吃點東西吧。
lines.pinyin: hǎo le, wǒ men xiān qù chī diǎn dōng xī ba.
lines.english: Alright, let's go get something to eat first.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 走吧，不要遲到，好吃的很快就沒了！
lines.pinyin: zǒu ba, bù yào chí dào, hǎo chī de kuài jiù méi le!
lines.english: Let's go, don't be late, the good food will be gone soon!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 哈哈，好的，我來了。
lines.pinyin: hā hā, hǎo de, wǒ lái le.
lines.english: Haha, okay, I'm coming.

title: Ordering at a Restaurant
description: Learn advanced ordering skills, including dietary preferences and complaints.

text.zh: 在台灣餐廳吃飯，有時候會收一成的服務費。
text.pinyin: zài tái wān cān tīng chī fàn, yǒu shí hou huì shōu yì chéng de fú wù fèi.
text.english: When eating at restaurants in Taiwan, sometimes a 10% service charge is collected.

text.zh: 如果你有過敏或忌口，點餐時一定要清楚告訴服務員。
text.pinyin: rú guǒ nǐ yǒu guò mǐn huò jì kǒu, diǎn cān shí yí dìng yào qīng chǔ gào sù fú wù yuán.
text.english: If you have allergies or dietary restrictions, you must tell the waiter clearly when ordering.

text.zh: 現在很多餐廳也提供外帶和打包服務，減少浪費。
text.pinyin: xiàn zài hěn duō cān tīng yě tí gōng wài dài hé dǎ bāo fú wù, jiǎn shǎo làng fèi.
text.english: Many restaurants now also provide takeout and leftover packing services to reduce waste.

comprehension.question: What is the common service charge in Taiwan?
comprehension.questionZh: 台灣餐廳通常收多少服務費？

comprehension.question: What should you do if you have an allergy?
comprehension.questionZh: 如果你過敏該怎麼辦？
options: 清楚告訴服務員 Tell waiter clearly

comprehension.question: Why is packing leftovers good?
comprehension.questionZh: 打包剩菜有什麼好處？
options: 可以多付錢 Can pay more
讓廚師高興 Make chef happy

dialogueSections.title: Booking a Table
dialogueSections.scene: A customer calls a restaurant to make a reservation.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 喂，您好！我想訂位。
lines.pinyin: wéi, nín hǎo! wǒ xiǎng dìng wèi.
lines.english: Hello! I'd like to book a table.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 好的，請問您幾位？什麼時候來？
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, qǐng wèn nín jǐ wèi? shén me shí hòu lái?
lines.english: Sure, how many people? When will you be coming?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 我們一共四位，今天晚上七點。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men yī gòng sì wèi, jīn tiān wǎn shang qī diǎn.
lines.english: Four people in total, 7 PM tonight.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 好的，請問您的姓氏和電話？
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, qǐng wèn nín de xìng shì hé diàn huà?
lines.english: Okay, your surname and phone number?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.pinyin: wǒ xìng lín, diàn huà shì 0912-345-678.
lines.english: My surname is Lin, phone is 0912-345-678.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 林先生，已經幫您訂好了。還有其他要求嗎？
lines.pinyin: lín xiān sheng, yǐ jīng bāng nín dìng hǎo le. hái yǒu qí tā yāo qiú ma?
lines.english: Mr. Lin, it's booked for you. Any other requirements?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 我們其中一位對海鮮過敏，請注意。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men qí zhōng yī wèi duì hǎi xiān guò mǐn, qǐng zhù yì.
lines.english: One of us is allergic to seafood, please take note.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 好的，我們會提醒廚師。期待您的光臨。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, wǒ men huì tí xǐng chú shī. qī dài nín de guāng lín.
lines.english: Okay, we will remind the chef. Looking forward to your visit.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 謝謝，再見。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie, zài jiàn.
lines.english: Thank you, goodbye.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 再見。
lines.pinyin: zài jiàn.
lines.english: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: (At the restaurant) 你好，我訂了七點的位子，姓林。
lines.pinyin: (At the restaurant) nǐ hǎo, wǒ dìng le qī diǎn de wèi zi, xìng lín.
lines.english: (At the restaurant) Hello, I booked a table for 7:00, surname Lin.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 林先生，這邊請。這是菜單。
lines.pinyin: lín xiān sheng, zhè biān qǐng. zhè shì cài dān.
lines.english: Mr. Lin, this way please. Here is the menu.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 謝謝。你們有什麼推薦的菜嗎？
lines.pinyin: xiè xie. nǐ men yǒu shén me tuī jiàn de cài ma?
lines.english: Thank you. Do you have any recommended dishes?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 我們的牛肉和蔬菜都很受歡迎。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men de niú ròu hé shū cài dōu hěn shòu huān yíng.
lines.english: Our beef and vegetables are very popular.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 味道怎麼樣？會很辣嗎？
lines.pinyin: wèi dào zěn me yàng? huì hěn là ma?
lines.english: How is the taste? Is it very spicy?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 牛肉有一點點辣，蔬菜很清淡。
lines.pinyin: niú ròu yǒu yī diǎn diǎn là, shū cài hěn qīng dàn.
lines.english: The beef is a tiny bit spicy, the vegetables are very light.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 好，我們先點這兩個。還要四碗米飯。
lines.pinyin: hǎo, wǒ men xiān diǎn zhè liǎng gè. hái yào sì wǎn mǐ fàn.
lines.english: Okay, we'll start with these two. Also four bowls of rice.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 好的，需要飲料嗎？
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, xū yào yǐn liào ma?
lines.english: Okay, any beverages?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 我們要一壺熱茶。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men yào yī hú rè chá.
lines.english: We want a pot of hot tea.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 沒問題，請稍等。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, qǐng shāo děng.
lines.english: No problem, please wait a moment.

dialogueSections.title: Dietary Restrictions
dialogueSections.scene: A group of diners discusses their dietary needs with the waiter.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 服務員，我們想點菜。
lines.pinyin: fú wù yuán, wǒ men xiǎng diǎn cài.
lines.english: Waiter, we'd like to order.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 來了。請問有什麼忌口嗎？
lines.pinyin: lái le. qǐng wèn yǒu shén me jì kǒu ma?
lines.english: Coming. Are there any dietary restrictions?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我不吃豬肉，有海鮮嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ bù chī zhū ròu, yǒu hǎi xiān ma?
lines.english: I don't eat pork, is there seafood?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 有的，我們的蝦和魚都很新鮮。
lines.pinyin: yǒu de, wǒ men de xiā hé yú dōu hěn xīn xiān.
lines.english: Yes, our shrimp and fish are very fresh.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我對海鮮過敏，不能吃蝦。
lines.pinyin: wǒ duì hǎi xiān guò mǐn, bù néng chī xiā.
lines.english: I'm allergic to seafood, I can't eat shrimp.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 明白了。那您要試試雞肉嗎？
lines.pinyin: míng bái le. nà nín yào shì shì jī ròu ma?
lines.english: Understood. Then would you like to try the chicken?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好，我要一份宮保雞丁，不要太辣。
lines.pinyin: hǎo, wǒ yào yī fèn gōng bǎo jī dīng, bù yào tài là.
lines.english: Okay, I'll have Kung Pao Chicken, not too spicy.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 沒問題，可以做微辣。您呢？
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, kě yǐ zuò wēi là. nín ne?
lines.english: No problem, we can make it mild. And you?

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 我喜歡吃鹹一點的，有沒有牛肉？
lines.pinyin: wǒ xǐ huan chī xián yī diǎn de, yǒu méi yǒu niú ròu?
lines.english: I like things a bit salty, is there beef?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 有蔥爆牛肉，味道比較重。
lines.pinyin: yǒu cōng bào niú ròu, wèi dào bǐ jiào zhòng.
lines.english: There's scallion beef, it has a stronger flavor.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 太好了，我點那個。不要太油膩。
lines.pinyin: tài hǎo le, wǒ diǎn nà gè. bù yào tài yóu nì.
lines.english: Great, I'll order that. Not too greasy.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我想要一些清淡的蔬菜。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng yào yī xiē qīng dàn de shū cài.
lines.english: I'd like some light vegetables.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 炒青菜很清淡，也很健康。
lines.pinyin: chǎo qīng cài hěn qīng dàn, yě hěn jiàn kāng.
lines.english: Stir-fried greens are very light and healthy.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好，點一份炒青菜。
lines.pinyin: hǎo, diǎn yī fèn chǎo qīng cài.
lines.english: Okay, one order of stir-fried greens.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 甜點想試試我們的酸甜排骨嗎？
lines.pinyin: tián diǎn xiǎng shì shì wǒ men de suān tián pái gǔ ma?
lines.english: For dessert, would you like to try our sweet and sour ribs?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 排骨是豬肉吧？我不吃。
lines.pinyin: pái gǔ shì zhū ròu ba? wǒ bù chī.
lines.english: Ribs are pork, right? I don't eat them.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 抱歉，我忘了。那有甜的芒果布丁。
lines.pinyin: bào qiàn, wǒ wàng le. nà yǒu tián de máng guǒ bù dīng.
lines.english: Sorry, I forgot. Then there's sweet mango pudding.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 芒果布丁聽起來不錯！
lines.pinyin: máng guǒ bù dīng tīng qǐ lái bú cuò!
lines.english: Mango pudding sounds good!

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 好的，一共三道菜，一份甜點。請稍等。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, yī gòng sān dào cài, yī fèn tián diǎn. qǐng shāo děng.
lines.english: Okay, three dishes in total, one dessert. Please wait a moment.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie.
lines.english: Thank you.

dialogueSections.title: Settling the Bill
dialogueSections.scene: The meal is finished, and the customers are paying the bill.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 服務員，買單！
lines.pinyin: fú wù yuán, mǎi dān!
lines.english: Waiter, the bill please!

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 好的，這是您的帳單。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, zhè shì nín de zhàng dān.
lines.english: Okay, here is your bill.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我們一共多少錢？
lines.pinyin: wǒ men yī gòng duō shǎo qián?
lines.english: How much is it in total?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 一共是一千五百塊。
lines.pinyin: yī gòng shì yī qiān wǔ bǎi kuài.
lines.english: It's 1,500 in total.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 請問可以分開付嗎？
lines.pinyin: qǐng wèn kě yǐ fēn kāi fù ma?
lines.english: Can we pay separately?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 可以，請問怎麼分？
lines.pinyin: kě yǐ, qǐng wèn zěn me fēn?
lines.english: Yes, how would you like to split it?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我和他一起付，他自己付。
lines.pinyin: wǒ hé tā yì qǐ fù, tā zì jǐ fù.
lines.english: He and I will pay together, and he will pay for himself.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 沒問題。您用現金還是信用卡？
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí. nín yòng xiàn jīn hái shì xìn yòng kǎ?
lines.english: No problem. Will you use cash or a credit card?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我用信用卡。可以開發票嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ yòng xìn yòng kǎ. kě yǐ kāi fā piào ma?
lines.english: I'll use a credit card. Can I get an invoice?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 可以，請給我您的統編或是手機載具。
lines.pinyin: kě yǐ, qǐng gěi wǒ nín de tǒng biān huò shì shǒu jī zài jù.
lines.english: Yes, please give me your tax ID or mobile carrier bar code.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我用現金付。這是五百塊。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yòng xiàn jīn fù. zhè shì wǔ bǎi kuài.
lines.english: I'll pay with cash. Here is 500.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 收您五百，不用找錢了，這有小費嗎？
lines.pinyin: shōu nín wǔ bǎi, bù yòng zhǎo qián le, zhè yǒu xiǎo fèi ma?
lines.english: Received 500, no change needed, is this include a tip?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 在台灣通常不用給小費，對吧？
lines.pinyin: zài táiwān tōng cháng bù yòng gěi xiǎo fèi, duì ba?
lines.english: In Taiwan, you usually don't need to tip, right?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 對，我們已經收了百分之十的服務費。
lines.pinyin: duì, wǒ men yǐ jīng shōu le bǎi fēn zhī shí de fú wù fèi.
lines.english: Right, we've already included a 10% service charge.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 服務費已經在帳單裡了。
lines.pinyin: fú wù fèi yǐ jīng zài zhàng dān lǐ le.
lines.english: The service fee is already in the bill.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 是的。這是您的收據，請收好。
lines.pinyin: shì de. zhè shì nín de shōu jù, qǐng shōu hǎo.
lines.english: Yes. Here is your receipt, please keep it safely.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝。你們的服務我們很滿意。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie. nǐ men de fú wù wǒ men hěn mǎn yì.
lines.english: Thank you. We are very satisfied with your service.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 謝謝誇獎。歡迎下次再來。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie kuā jiǎng. huān yíng xià cì zài lái.
lines.english: Thank you for the compliment. Welcome to come again next time.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好的，再見。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, zài jiàn.
lines.english: Okay, goodbye.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 再見，慢走。
lines.pinyin: zài jiàn, màn zǒu.
lines.english: Goodbye, take care.

questions.question: Which of these is NOT a meat?
If someone is a 'staff/waiter', they are...

title: Work & Career
description: Learn how to talk about your job, duties, and workplace interactions.

text.zh: 在忙碌的工作中，保持工作與生活的平衡非常重要。
text.pinyin: zài máng lù de gōng zuò zhōng, bǎo chí gōng zuò yǔ shēng huó de píng héng fēi cháng zhòng yào.
text.english: In busy work, maintaining a balance between work and life is very important.

text.zh: 適當的休息能提高工作效率，也能讓身體更健康。
text.pinyin: shì dàng de xiū xi néng tí gāo gōng zuò xiào lǜ, yě néng ràng shēn tǐ gèng jiàn kāng.
text.english: Proper rest can improve work efficiency and make the body healthier.

text.zh: 找一個自己感興趣的職業，工作起來會更有動力。
text.pinyin: zhǎo yí gè zì jǐ gǎn xìng qù de zhí yè, gōng zuò qǐ lái huì gèng yǒu dòng lì.
text.english: Finding a profession that interests you will give you more motivation at work.

comprehension.question: What is important to maintain?
comprehension.questionZh: 保持什麼很重要？
options: 工作與生活平衡 Work-life balance
只玩遊戲 Just play games

comprehension.question: What can proper rest improve?
comprehension.questionZh: 適當的休息可以提高什麼？

comprehension.question: What makes you more motivated at work?
comprehension.questionZh: 什麼能讓工作更有動力？
options: 感興趣的職業 Interesting profession
每天加班 Overtime every day

dialogueSections.title: The Job Interview
dialogueSections.scene: A job seeker is being interviewed by a manager.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 你好，請坐。請先介紹一下你自己。
lines.pinyin: nǐ hǎo, qǐng zuò. qǐng xiān jiè shào yī xià nǐ zì jǐ.
lines.english: Hello, please sit. Please introduce yourself first.

lines.speaker: Applicant
lines.zh: 您好。我是李華，畢業於國立大學。
lines.pinyin: nín hǎo. wǒ shì lǐ huá, bì yè yú guó lì dà xué.
lines.english: Hello. I'm Li Hua, graduated from National University.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 你看起來很有經驗。你以前做過什麼工作？
lines.pinyin: nǐ kàn qǐ lái hěn yǒu jīng yàn. nǐ yǐ qián zuò guò shén me gōng zuò?
lines.english: You look very experienced. What work have you done before?

lines.speaker: Applicant
lines.zh: 我以前在一家貿易公司實習，後來做了兩年銷售。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yǐ qián zài yī jiā mào yì gōng sī shí xí, hòu lái zuò le liǎng nián xiāo shòu.
lines.english: I interned at a trading company before, and then did sales for two years.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 為什麼想來我們公司面試？
lines.pinyin: wèi shén me xiǎng lái wǒ men gōng sī miàn shì?
lines.english: Why do you want to interview with our company?

lines.speaker: Applicant
lines.zh: 貴公司的專業水平很高，我希望能有更多學習機會。
lines.pinyin: guì gōng sī de zhuān yè shuǐ píng hěn gāo, wǒ xī wàng néng yǒu duō xué xí jī huì.
lines.english: Your company's professional level is high; I hope to have more learning opportunities.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 我們的工作壓力很大，有時候需要加班。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men de gōng zuò yā lì hěn dà, yǒu shí hòu xū yào jiā bān.
lines.english: Our work pressure is high, and sometimes overtime is required.

lines.speaker: Applicant
lines.zh: 沒問題，我效率很高，可以應付壓力。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, wǒ xiào lǜ hěn gāo, kě yǐ yìng fu yā lì.
lines.english: No problem, I'm very efficient and can handle pressure.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 關於薪水和福利，你有什麼要求嗎？
lines.pinyin: guān yú xīn shuǐ hé fú lì, nǐ yǒu shén me yāo qiú ma?
lines.english: Regarding salary and benefits, do you have any requirements?

lines.speaker: Applicant
lines.zh: 我期待合理的薪水，還有基本的醫療保險。
lines.pinyin: wǒ qī dài hé lǐ de xīn shuǐ, hái yǒu jī běn de yī liáo bǎo xiǎn.
lines.english: I expect a reasonable salary, as well as basic medical insurance.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 我們提供不錯的獎金和年度旅遊。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men tí gōng bú cuò de jiǎng jīn hé nián dù lǚ yóu.
lines.english: We provide good bonuses and annual travel.

lines.speaker: Applicant
lines.zh: 那聽起來很棒。我也希望能出差。
lines.pinyin: nà tīng qǐ lái hěn bàng. wǒ yě xī wàng néng chū chāi.
lines.english: That sounds great. I also hope to go on business trips.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 如果有會議，有時候確實需要出差。
lines.pinyin: rú guǒ yǒu huì yì, yǒu shí hòu què shí xū yào chū chāi.
lines.english: If there are meetings, sometimes business trips are indeed necessary.

lines.speaker: Applicant
lines.zh: 我明白了。這是我的最新簡歷。
lines.pinyin: wǒ míng bái le. zhè shì wǒ de zuì xīn jiǎn lì.
lines.english: I understand. Here is my latest resume.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 好的，我們會在一週內通知你是否錄用。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, wǒ men huì zài yī zhōu nèi tōng zhī nǐ shì fǒu lù yòng.
lines.english: Okay, we will notify you within a week whether you are hired.

lines.speaker: Applicant
lines.zh: 謝謝經理給我這次機會。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie jīng lǐ gěi wǒ zhè cì jī huì.
lines.english: Thank you, Manager, for giving me this opportunity.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 不客氣。今天辛苦了。
lines.pinyin: bù kè qì. jīn tiān xīn kǔ le.
lines.english: You're welcome. Thanks for your hard work today.

lines.speaker: Applicant
lines.zh: 謝謝，再見。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie, zài jiàn.
lines.english: Thank you, goodbye.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 再見。
lines.pinyin: zài jiàn.
lines.english: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Applicant
lines.zh: (Thinking) 希望面試成功！
lines.pinyin: (Thinking) xī wàng miàn shì chéng gōng!
lines.english: (Thinking) Hope the interview is a success!

dialogueSections.title: First Day at the Office
dialogueSections.scene: A newly hired employee meets their colleagues.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 大家早上好！這是我第一天上班。
lines.pinyin: dà jiā zǎo shang hǎo! zhè shì wǒ dì yī tiān shàng bān.
lines.english: Good morning everyone! This is my first day at work.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 歡迎！我叫張明，是你的同事。
lines.pinyin: huān yíng! wǒ jiào zhāng míng, shì nǐ de tóng shì.
lines.english: Welcome! My name is Zhang Ming, I'm your colleague.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你好，張明。我負責哪部分工作？
lines.pinyin: nǐ hǎo, zhāng míng. wǒ fù zé nǎ bù fèn gōng zuò?
lines.english: Hello, Zhang Ming. Which part of the work am I responsible for?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你主要負責寫市場報告和處理郵件。
lines.pinyin: nǐ zhǔ yào fù zé xiě shì chǎng bào gào hé chǔ lǐ yóu jiàn.
lines.english: You are mainly responsible for writing market reports and handling emails.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好的。我的辦公室在哪裡？
lines.pinyin: hǎo de. wǒ de bàn gōng shì zài nǎ lǐ?
lines.english: Okay. Where is my office?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 就在經理辦公室對面。你的電腦已經準備好了。
lines.pinyin: jiù zài jīng lǐ bàn gōng shì duì miàn. nǐ de diàn nǎo yǐ jīng zhǔn bèi hǎo le.
lines.english: Right across from the manager's office. Your computer is already prepared.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝。老闆在辦公室嗎？
lines.pinyin: xiè xie. lǎo bǎn zài bàn gōng shì ma?
lines.english: Thank you. Is the boss in the office?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 他在開會，一會兒就出來了。
lines.pinyin: tā zài kāi huì, yī huì r jiù chū lái le.
lines.english: He's in a meeting; he'll be out in a while.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 聽說公司的工作效率很高？
lines.pinyin: tīng shuō gōng sī de gōng zuò xiào lǜ hěn gāo?
lines.english: I heard the company's work efficiency is very high?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是的，我們非常重視效率，也鼓勵大家交流。
lines.pinyin: shì de, wǒ men fēi cháng zhòng shì xiào lǜ, yě gǔ lì dà jiā jiāo liú.
lines.english: Yes, we value efficiency greatly and encourage everyone to communicate.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 中午大家一起吃午餐嗎？
lines.pinyin: zhōng wǔ dà jiā yì qǐ chī wǔ cān ma?
lines.english: Does everyone have lunch together at noon?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 通常是的，公司附近有很多好餐廳。
lines.pinyin: tōng cháng shì de, gōng sī fù jìn yǒu hěn duō hǎo cān tīng.
lines.english: Usually, yes; there are many good restaurants near the company.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 太好了。我覺得這裡的氛圍很好。
lines.pinyin: tài hǎo le. wǒ jué de zhè lǐ de fēn wéi hěn hǎo.
lines.english: Great. I think the atmosphere here is very good.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 如果你有什麼不懂的，隨時問我。
lines.pinyin: rú guǒ nǐ yǒu shén me bù dǒng de, suí shí wèn wǒ.
lines.english: If there's anything you don't understand, ask me anytime.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝你的幫忙。我會努力工作的。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie nǐ de bāng máng. wǒ huì nǔ lì gōng zuò de.
lines.english: Thanks for your help. I will work hard.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 加油！今天下午三點有個全體會議。
lines.pinyin: jiā yóu! jīn tiān xià wǔ sān diǎn yǒu gè quán tǐ huì yì.
lines.english: Keep it up! There's a general meeting at 3 PM today.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好的，我會準時參加。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, wǒ huì zhǔn shí cān jiā.
lines.english: Okay, I will participate on time.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對了，入職合同你簽了嗎？
lines.pinyin: duì le, rù zhí hé tong nǐ qiān le ma?
lines.english: By the way, did you sign the employment contract?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 還沒，經理說一會兒拿給我。
lines.pinyin: hái méi, jīng lǐ shuō yī huì r ná gěi wǒ.
lines.english: Not yet; the manager said he'd bring it to me in a while.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好的，再次歡迎你加入我們。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, zài cì huān yíng nǐ jiā rù wǒ men.
lines.english: Okay, welcome once again to join us.

dialogueSections.title: A Future Plan
dialogueSections.scene: Two colleagues discuss their future career paths and retirement.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 老王，你打算什麼時候退休？
lines.pinyin: lǎo wáng, nǐ dǎ suàn shén me shí hòu tuì xiū?
lines.english: Old Wang, when do you plan to retire?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我打算再做五年，然後就退休回家。
lines.pinyin: wǒ dǎ suàn zài zuò wǔ nián, rán hòu jiù tuì xiū huí jiā.
lines.english: I plan to work for five more years, then retire and go home.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那挺好的。你退休以後想做什麼？
lines.pinyin: nà tǐng hǎo de. nǐ tuì xiū yǐ hòu xiǎng zuò shén me?
lines.english: That's quite good. What do you want to do after you retire?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我想去旅遊，看看世界。你呢？
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng qù lǚ yóu, kàn kàn shì jiè. nǐ ne?
lines.english: I want to travel and see the world. And you?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我還年輕，還想再拼幾年事業。
lines.pinyin: wǒ hái nián qīng, hái xiǎng zài pīn jǐ nián shì yè.
lines.english: I'm still young; I want to strive for my career for a few more years.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 事業固然重要，但也要注意身體健康。
lines.pinyin: shì yè gù rán zhòng yào, dàn yě yào zhù yì shēn tǐ jiàn kāng.
lines.english: Career is important, of course, but you must also pay attention to your health.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我知道。但我希望能當上經理。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zhī dào. dàn wǒ xī wàng néng dāng shàng jīng lǐ.
lines.english: I know. But I hope to become a manager.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你有這個能力，只要肯努力，機會很多。
lines.pinyin: nǐ yǒu zhè gè néng lì, zhǐ yào kěn nǔ lì, jī huì hěn duō.
lines.english: You have the ability; as long as you're willing to work hard, there are many opportunities.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝你的鼓勵。最近公司在招聘新員工。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie nǐ de gǔ lì. zuì jìn gōng sī zài zhāo pìn xīn yuán gōng.
lines.english: Thanks for your encouragement. Recently the company is recruiting new employees.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對，我們需要更多專業的人才。
lines.pinyin: duì, wǒ men xū yào duō gèng zhuān yè de rén cái.
lines.english: Right, we need more professional talents.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 如果你要辭職，老闆一定會很難過。
lines.pinyin: rú guǒ nǐ yào cí zhí, lǎo bǎn yī dìng huì hěn nán guò.
lines.english: If you were to resign, the boss would definitely be very sad.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 哈哈，我不是辭職，是光榮退休！
lines.pinyin: hā hā, wǒ bú shì cí zhí, shì guāng róng tuì xiū!
lines.english: Haha, I'm not resigning; it's an honorable retirement!

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 對對對，是退休。我也希望以後能像你一樣。
lines.pinyin: duì duì duì, shì tuì xiū. wǒ yě xī wàng yǐ hòu néng xiàng nǐ yī yàng.
lines.english: Right, right, right, retirement. I also hope to be like you in the future.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那就好好工作，存點錢。
lines.pinyin: nà jiù hǎo hǎo gōng zuò, cún diǎn qián.
lines.english: Then work hard and save some money.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 沒錯，薪水和獎金都很重要。
lines.pinyin: méi cuò, xīn shuǐ hé jiǎng jīn dōu hěn zhòng yào.
lines.english: Exactly, salary and bonuses are both important.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 還有公司的福利和保險也要看清楚。
lines.pinyin: hái yǒu gōng sī de fú lì hé bǎo xiǎn yě yào kàn qīng chu.
lines.english: Also, you need to check the company's benefits and insurance clearly.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我會的。謝謝你的經驗分享。
lines.pinyin: wǒ huì de. xiè xie nǐ de jīng yàn fēn xiǎng.
lines.english: I will. Thanks for sharing your experience.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 不客氣。我們去喝杯咖啡吧。
lines.pinyin: bù kè qì. wǒ men qù hē bēi kā fēi ba.
lines.english: You're welcome. Let's go have a cup of coffee.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好啊，我請客！
lines.pinyin: hǎo a, wǒ qǐng kè!
lines.english: Sure, my treat!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那我就不客氣了。
lines.pinyin: nà wǒ jiù bù kè qì le.
lines.english: Then I won't be polite.

questions.question: You have a job interview. What do you bring?
How do you say 'I'm very busy today'?
If you work extra hours, you are...
What is the head of a company called?
If you are stressed at work, you feel...
