title: At the Bank
description: Learn how to open an account, exchange currency, and handle banking transactions.

text.zh: 在國外生活，開一個當地的銀行帳戶很有用。
text.pinyin: zài guó wài shēng huó, kāi yí gè dāng dì de yín háng zhàng hù hěn yǒu yòng.
text.english: When living abroad, opening a local bank account is very useful.

text.zh: 你可以用提款卡在ATM領錢，也可以用手機銀行轉帳。
text.pinyin: nǐ kě yǐ yòng tí kuǎn kǎ zài ATM lǐng qián, yě kě yǐ yòng shǒu jī yín háng zhuǎn zhàng.
text.english: You can use an ATM card to withdraw money at an ATM, or use mobile banking to transfer money.

text.zh: 注意匯率的變化，可以幫你省下一些換錢的費用。
text.pinyin: zhù yì huì lǜ de biàn huà, kě yǐ bāng nǐ shěng xià yì xiē huàn qián de fèi yòng.
text.english: Paying attention to exchange rate changes can help you save some money exchange costs.

comprehension.question: What is useful when living abroad?
comprehension.questionZh: 在國外生活什麼很有用？
options: 買很多衣服 Buy many clothes
開當地銀行帳戶 Open local bank account

comprehension.question: Where can you withdraw money with an ATM card?
comprehension.questionZh: 提款卡可以在哪裡領錢？

comprehension.question: What can help save money on currency exchange?
comprehension.questionZh: 什麼可以幫你省下換錢的費用？
options: 注意匯率變化 Watch exchange rate

dialogueSections.title: Opening an Account
dialogueSections.scene: A customer visits the bank to open a new savings account.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 你好，我想開戶。
lines.pinyin: nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng kāi hù.
lines.english: Hello, I'd like to open an account.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 好的。請先在這邊排隊。輪到您時請去三號窗口。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de. qǐng xiān zài zhè biān pái duì. lún dào nín shí qǐng qù sān hào chuāng kǒu.
lines.english: Okay. Please queue here first. When it's your turn, please go to window number three.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 好的，謝謝。需要帶什麼證件嗎？
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, xiè xie. xū yào dài shén me zhèng jiàn ma?
lines.english: Okay, thanks. Do I need to bring any identification?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 需要您的護照或是身份證。
lines.pinyin: xū yào nín de hù zhào huò shì shēn fèn zhèng.
lines.english: Your passport or ID card is required.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: (At the window) 你好，我要開戶。
lines.pinyin: (At the window) nǐ hǎo, wǒ yào kāi hù.
lines.english: (At the window) Hello, I want to open an account.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 請填寫這份表單。這裡是您的名字，這裡是帳戶類型。
lines.pinyin: qǐng tián xiě zhè fèn biǎo dān. zhè lǐ shì nín de míng zi, zhè lǐ shì zhàng hù lèi xíng.
lines.english: Please fill in this form. Here is your name, and here is the account type.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 好了，填好了。請看一下。
lines.pinyin: hǎo le, tián hǎo le. qǐng kàn yī xià.
lines.english: Okay, it's filled in. Please take a look.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 謝謝。請在這裡簽名。然後請設置您的密碼。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie. qǐng zài zhè lǐ qiān míng. rán hòu qǐng shè zhì nín de mì mǎ.
lines.english: Thank you. Please sign here. Then please set your password.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 密碼要在哪裡輸入？
lines.pinyin: mì mǎ yào zài nǎ lǐ shū rù?
lines.english: Where should I input the password?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 在這個機器上。請輸入六位數字。
lines.pinyin: zài zhè gè jī qì shàng. qǐng shū rù liù wèi shù zì.
lines.english: On this machine. Please enter six digits.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 輸入好了。現在可以存錢了嗎？
lines.pinyin: shū rù hǎo le. xiàn zài kě yǐ cún qián le ma?
lines.english: Entered. Can I deposit money now?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 可以。您想存多少錢？
lines.pinyin: kě yǐ. nín xiǎng cún duō shǎo qián?
lines.english: Yes. How much would you like to deposit?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 我想存一萬塊台幣。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng cún yī wàn kuài tái bì.
lines.english: I'd like to deposit 10,000 NTD.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 好的。存好了，這是您的存摺和金融卡。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de. cún hǎo le, zhè shì nín de cún zhé hé jīn róng kǎ.
lines.english: Okay. Deposited, here is your passbook and debit card.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 餘額要在哪裡查看？
lines.pinyin: yú é yào zài nǎ lǐ chá kàn?
lines.english: Where can I check the balance?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 您可以去提款機查看，或是用網路銀行。
lines.pinyin: nín kě yǐ qù tí kuǎn jī chá kàn, huò shì yòng wǎng lù yín háng.
lines.english: You can check at an ATM or use online banking.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 匯款的手續費是多少？
lines.pinyin: huì kuǎn de shǒu xù fèi shì duō shǎo?
lines.english: What is the service charge for transfers?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 國內匯款是十五塊，國際匯款比較貴。
lines.pinyin: guó nèi huì kuǎn shì shí wǔ kuài, guó jì huì kuǎn bǐ jiào guì.
lines.english: Domestic transfer is 15; international is more expensive.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 好的，我知道了。謝謝！
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, wǒ zhī dào le. xiè xie!
lines.english: Okay, I see. Thank you!

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 不客氣，慢走。
lines.pinyin: bù kè qì, màn zǒu.
lines.english: You're welcome, take care.

dialogueSections.title: Currency Exchange
dialogueSections.scene: A traveler wants to exchange foreign currency for local currency.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 你好，我想換錢。
lines.pinyin: nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng huàn qián.
lines.english: Hello, I'd like to exchange money.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 您好。請問您想換什麼幣種？
lines.pinyin: nín hǎo. qǐng wèn nín xiǎng huàn shén me bì zhǒng?
lines.english: Hello. What currency would you like to exchange?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 我想用美金換台幣。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng yòng měi jīn huàn tái bì.
lines.english: I want to exchange US Dollars for NTD.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 今天的匯率是一比三十二點五。
lines.pinyin: jīn tiān de huì lǜ shì yī bǐ sān shí èr diǎn wǔ.
lines.english: Today's exchange rate is 1 to 32.5.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 好的。我要換五百美金。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de. wǒ yào huàn wǔ bǎi měi jīn.
lines.english: Okay. I want to exchange 500 USD.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 請出示您的護照。
lines.pinyin: qǐng chū shì nín de hù zhào.
lines.english: Please show your passport.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 這是我的護照。
lines.pinyin: zhè shì wǒ de hù zhào.
lines.english: Here is my passport.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 請稍等，我算一下金額。
lines.pinyin: qǐng shāo děng, wǒ suàn yī xià jīn é.
lines.english: Please wait a moment while I calculate the amount.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 需要付手續費嗎？
lines.pinyin: xū yào fù shǒu xù fèi ma?
lines.english: Is there a service fee?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 換錢不需要額外的手續費。
lines.pinyin: huàn qián bù xū yào é wài de shǒu xù fèi.
lines.english: Currency exchange doesn't require an extra service fee.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 那就好。歐元和人民幣的匯率呢？
lines.pinyin: nà jiù hǎo. ōu yuán hé rén mín bì de huì lǜ ne?
lines.english: That's good. What about the Euro and RMB exchange rates?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 歐元是一比三十五，人民幣是一比四點五。
lines.pinyin: ōu yuán shì yī bǐ sān shí wǔ, rén mín bì shì yī bǐ sì diǎn wǔ.
lines.english: Euro is 1 to 35; RMB is 1 to 4.5.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 台幣最近升值了嗎？
lines.pinyin: tái bì zuì jìn shēng zhí le ma?
lines.english: Has NTD appreciated recently?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 有一點。這是您的台幣，一共是一萬六千二百五十塊。
lines.pinyin: yǒu yī diǎn. zhè shì nín de tái bì, yī gòng shì yī wàn liù qiān èr bǎi wǔ shí kuài.
lines.english: A little bit. Here is your NTD, a total of 16,250.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 謝謝。請給我一些零錢。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie. qǐng gěi wǒ yī xiē líng qián.
lines.english: Thank you. Please give me some small change.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 沒問題。這是您的單據，請簽名。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí. zhè shì nín de dān jù, qǐng qiān míng.
lines.english: No problem. Here is your document, please sign.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 好的，簽好了。這附近有提款機嗎？
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, qiān hǎo le. zhè fù jìn yǒu tí kuǎn jī ma?
lines.english: Okay, signed. Is there an ATM nearby?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 門口左轉就有一個提款機。
lines.pinyin: mén kǒu zuǒ zhuǎn jiù yǒu yī gè tí kuǎn jī.
lines.english: There's an ATM if you turn left at the entrance.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 太好了，謝謝！
lines.pinyin: tài hǎo le, xiè xie!
lines.english: Great, thanks!

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 祝您旅途愉快！
lines.pinyin: zhù nín lǚ tú yú kuài!
lines.english: Wish you a pleasant trip!

dialogueSections.title: Lost Bank Card
dialogueSections.scene: A worried customer reports a lost credit card.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 不好意思，我的信用卡不見了！
lines.pinyin: bù hǎo yì si, wǒ de xìn yòng kǎ bú jiàn le!
lines.english: Excuse me, my credit card is missing!

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 別擔心，請提供您的身份證號碼或是帳戶。
lines.pinyin: bié dān xīn, qǐng tí gōng nín de shēn fèn zhèng hào mǎ huò shì zhàng hù.
lines.english: Don't worry, please provide your ID number or account.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 我現在只能記得名字，證件也在錢包裡丟了。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiàn zài zhǐ néng jì de míng zi, zhèng jiàn yě zài qián bāo lǐ diū le.
lines.english: I only remember my name now; my ID was also in the wallet I lost.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 那請告訴我您的電話號碼，我幫您查詢。
lines.pinyin: nà qǐng gào sù wǒ nín de diàn huà hào mǎ, wǒ bāng nín chá xún.
lines.english: Then please tell me your phone number; I'll check for you.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.pinyin: wǒ de diàn huà shì 0988-777-666.
lines.english: My phone is 0988-777-666.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 查到了，是張先生吧？我們已經幫您凍結了帳戶。
lines.pinyin: chá dào le, shì zhāng xiān sheng ba? wǒ men yǐ jīng bāng nín dòng jié le zhàng hù.
lines.english: Found it, Mr. Zhang, right? We've already frozen your account for you.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 太好了，這樣我的錢就安全了吧？
lines.pinyin: tài hǎo le, zhè yàng wǒ de qián jiù ān quán le ba?
lines.english: Great, my money is safe now, right?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 是的，現在不能取錢或是消費了。
lines.pinyin: shì de, xiàn zài bù néng qǔ qián huò shì xiāo fèi le.
lines.english: Yes, money cannot be withdrawn or spent now.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 我需要補辦新卡嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ xū yào bǔ bàn xīn kǎ ma?
lines.english: Do I need to apply for a replacement card?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 需要。請您先去警察局報案，然後帶證明過來。
lines.pinyin: xū yào. qǐng nín xiān qù jǐng chá jú bào àn, rán hòu dài zhèng míng guò lái.
lines.english: Yes. Please go to the police station to report it first, then bring the proof here.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 補辦新卡要多久？
lines.pinyin: bǔ bàn xīn kǎ yào duō jiǔ?
lines.english: How long does it take to replace the card?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 大約需要五到七個工作天。
lines.pinyin: dà yuē xū yào wǔ dào qī gè gōng zuò tiān.
lines.english: It takes about five to seven working days.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 那這段時間我可以取錢嗎？
lines.pinyin: nà zhè duàn shí jiān wǒ kě yǐ qǔ qián ma?
lines.english: Can I withdraw money during this time?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 您可以帶護照來窗口人工取錢。
lines.pinyin: nín kě yǐ dài hù zhào lái chuāng kǒu rén gōng qǔ qián.
lines.english: You can bring your passport to the counter to withdraw money manually.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 好的，我知道了。真的很謝謝你。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, wǒ zhī dào le. zhēn de hěn xiè xie nǐ.
lines.english: Okay, I see. Thank you very much.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 不用客氣。請注意您的財物安全。
lines.pinyin: bù yòng kè qì. qǐng zhù yì nín de cái wù ān quán.
lines.english: You're welcome. Please pay attention to the safety of your belongings.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 我以後會更小心的。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yǐ hòu huì gèng xiǎo xīn de.
lines.english: I'll be more careful in the future.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 還有其他問題嗎？
lines.pinyin: hái yǒu qí tā wèn tí ma?
lines.english: Any other questions?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 沒有了，再見。
lines.pinyin: méi yǒu le, zài jiàn.
lines.english: No, goodbye.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 再見。
lines.pinyin: zài jiàn.
lines.english: Goodbye.

title: Travel & Booking
description: Learn how to book a hotel, buy tickets, and plan a trip.

text.zh: 台灣有很多美麗的風景和好吃的食物。
text.pinyin: tái wān yǒu hěn duō měi lì de fēng jǐng hé hǎo chī de shí wu.
text.english: Taiwan has many beautiful sceneries and delicious food.

text.zh: 你可以坐高鐵快速去不同的城市，也可以租車自助旅行。
text.pinyin: nǐ kě yǐ zuò gāo tiě kuài sù qù bù tóng de chéng shì, yě kě yǐ zū chē zì zhù lǚ xíng.
text.english: You can take the High Speed Rail to go to different cities quickly, or rent a car for a self-guided trip.

text.zh: 提前在網路上預訂酒店，通常可以得到比較好的價格。
text.pinyin: tí qián zài wǎng lù shàng yù dìng jiǔ diàn, tōng cháng kě yǐ dé dào bǐ jiào hǎo de jià gé.
text.english: Booking hotels online in advance usually gets you better prices.

comprehension.question: What does Taiwan have many of?
comprehension.questionZh: 台灣有很多什麼？
options: 美麗風景和美食 Beautiful scenery and food

comprehension.question: How can you travel quickly between cities?
comprehension.questionZh: 怎麼快速去不同的城市？
options: 騎腳踏車 Ride a bike

comprehension.question: What is the benefit of booking hotels online in advance?
comprehension.questionZh: 提前網路訂房有什麼好處？
options: 比較好的價格 Better prices

dialogueSections.title: Hotel Check-in
dialogueSections.scene: A traveler checks into their reserved hotel room.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 你好，我想辦理入住。
lines.pinyin: nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng bàn lǐ rù zhù.
lines.english: Hello, I'd like to check in.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 您好，請問有預訂嗎？
lines.pinyin: nín hǎo, qǐng wèn yǒu yù dìng ma?
lines.english: Hello, do you have a reservation?

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 有的，我姓王，預訂了三晚。
lines.pinyin: yǒu de, wǒ xìng wáng, yù dìng le sān wǎn.
lines.english: Yes, my surname is Wang, I booked for three nights.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 請稍等，我確認一下。王先生，您預訂的是雙人房。
lines.pinyin: qǐng shāo děng, wǒ què rèn yī xià. wáng xiān sheng, nín yù dìng de shì shuāng rén fáng.
lines.english: Please wait a moment while I confirm. Mr. Wang, you booked a double room.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 對。請問包含早餐嗎？
lines.pinyin: duì. qǐng wèn bāo hán zǎo cān ma?
lines.english: Right. Does it include breakfast?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 是的，早餐在二樓，早上七點到十點。
lines.pinyin: shì de, zǎo cān zài èr lóu, zǎo shang qī diǎn dào shí diǎn.
lines.english: Yes, breakfast is on the second floor, from 7 AM to 10 AM.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 太好了。這是我的護照。
lines.pinyin: tài hǎo le. zhè shì wǒ de hù zhào.
lines.english: Great. Here is my passport.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 謝謝。請在這裡簽名。這是您的房卡，在六樓六零五室。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie. qǐng zài zhè lǐ qiān míng. zhè shì nín de fáng kǎ, zài liù lóu liù líng wǔ shì.
lines.english: Thank you. Please sign here. This is your room card, room 605 on the 6th floor.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 謝謝。我的行李在哪裡拿？
lines.pinyin: xiè xie. wǒ de xíng li zài nǎ lǐ ná?
lines.english: Thank you. Where do I get my luggage?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 服務員會幫您送到房間。需要叫計程車嗎？
lines.pinyin: fú wù yuán huì bāng nín sòng dào fáng jiān. xū yào jiào jì chéng chē ma?
lines.english: The bellhop will help deliver it to your room. Do you need a taxi?

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 現在不需要，我打算先休息一下。
lines.pinyin: xiàn zài bù xū yào, wǒ dǎ suàn xiān xiū xi yī xià.
lines.english: Not now, I plan to rest for a bit first.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 好的。退房時間是中午十二點前。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de. tuì fáng shí jiān shì zhōng wǔ shí èr diǎn qián.
lines.english: Okay. Check-out time is before 12 noon.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 知道了。這附近有什麼好玩的景點嗎？
lines.pinyin: zhī dào le. zhè fù jìn yǒu shén me hǎo wán de jǐng diǎn ma?
lines.english: I see. Are there any fun scenic spots nearby?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 您可以去名勝古蹟看看，離這裡只有十分鐘行程。
lines.pinyin: nín kě yǐ qù míng shèng gǔ jì kàn kàn, lí zhè lǐ zhǐ yǒu shí fēn zhōng xíng chéng.
lines.english: You can go see the historical sites; they're only 10 minutes away.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 有地圖嗎？我想了解一下交通。
lines.pinyin: yǒu dì tú ma? wǒ xiǎng liǎo jiě yī xià jiāo tōng.
lines.english: Is there a map? I'd like to learn about the transportation.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 有的，給您一份旅遊地圖。
lines.pinyin: yǒu de, gěi nín yī fèn lǚ yóu dì tú.
lines.english: Yes, here is a tourist map for you.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 太謝謝了。如果我要取消明天的預訂怎麼辦？
lines.pinyin: tài xiè xie le. rú guǒ wǒ yào qǔ xiāo míng tiān de yù dìng zěn me bàn?
lines.english: Thank you very much. What if I want to cancel tomorrow's reservation?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 請在二十四小時前通知我們，否則會扣費。
lines.pinyin: qǐng zài èr shí sì xiǎo shí qián tōng zhī wǒ men, fǒu zé huì kòu fèi.
lines.english: Please notify us 24 hours in advance; otherwise, there's a charge.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 好的，我明白了。祝你工作愉快。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, wǒ míng bái le. zhù nǐ gōng zuò yú kuài.
lines.english: Okay, I understand. Wish you a pleasant work day.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 謝謝，祝您旅遊愉快！
lines.pinyin: xiè xie, zhù nín lǚ yóu yú kuài!
lines.english: Thank you, wish you a pleasant trip!

dialogueSections.title: Sightseeing with a Guide
dialogueSections.scene: A group of tourists is being guided through a famous scenic spot.

lines.speaker: Guide
lines.zh: 各位旅客，大家早上好！我是你們的導遊。
lines.pinyin: gè wèi lǚ kè, dà jiā zǎo shang hǎo! wǒ shì nǐ men de dǎo yóu.
lines.english: Good morning travelers! I am your tour guide.

lines.speaker: Tourist A
lines.zh: 你好！我們今天的行程是什麼？
lines.pinyin: nǐ hǎo! wǒ men jīn tiān de xíng chéng shì shén me?
lines.english: Hello! What is our itinerary for today?

lines.speaker: Guide
lines.zh: 我們今天會參觀三個景點，首先是這座古老的建築。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men jīn tiān huì cān guān sān gè jǐng diǎn, shǒu xiān shì zhè zuò gǔ lǎo de jiàn zhù.
lines.english: We'll visit three scenic spots today, starting with this ancient building.

lines.speaker: Tourist B
lines.zh: 這裡風景真美，可以拍照嗎？
lines.pinyin: zhè lǐ fēng jǐng zhēn měi, kě yǐ pāi zhào ma?
lines.english: The scenery here is really beautiful, can I take photos?

lines.speaker: Guide
lines.zh: 當然可以，這裡是非常有名的拍照地點。
lines.pinyin: dāng rán kě yǐ, zhè lǐ shì fēi cháng yǒu míng de pāi zhào dì diǎn.
lines.english: Of course, this is a very famous spot for photos.

lines.speaker: Tourist A
lines.zh: 參觀這裡需要門票嗎？
lines.pinyin: cān guān zhè lǐ xū yào mén piào ma?
lines.english: Do we need entrance tickets to visit here?

lines.speaker: Guide
lines.zh: 門票已經包含在旅遊費裡了。
lines.pinyin: mén piào yǐ jīng bāo hán zài lǚ yóu fèi lǐ le.
lines.english: Tickets are already included in the tour fee.

lines.speaker: Tourist B
lines.zh: 這座名勝古蹟有多少年的歷史了？
lines.pinyin: zhè zuò míng shèng gǔ jì yǒu duō shǎo nián de lì shǐ le?
lines.english: How many years of history does this historical site have?

lines.speaker: Guide
lines.zh: 大約有五百年的歷史了。
lines.pinyin: dà yuē yǒu wǔ bǎi nián de lì shǐ le.
lines.english: It has about five hundred years of history.

lines.speaker: Tourist A
lines.zh: 下一站我們怎麼去？坐巴士嗎？
lines.pinyin: xià yī zhàn wǒ men zěn me qù? zuò bā shì ma?
lines.english: How do we get to the next stop? By bus?

lines.speaker: Guide
lines.zh: 是的，我們的交通工具在門口等大家。
lines.pinyin: shì de, wǒ men de jiāo tōng gōng jù zài mén kǒu děng dà jiā.
lines.english: Yes, our transportation is waiting for everyone at the entrance.

lines.speaker: Tourist B
lines.zh: 我們有時間買紀念品嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ men yǒu shí jiān mǎi jì niàn pǐn ma?
lines.english: Do we have time to buy souvenirs?

lines.speaker: Guide
lines.zh: 有的，最後一個景點附近有很多小商店。
lines.pinyin: yǒu de, zuì hòu yī gè jǐng diǎn fù jìn yǒu hěn duō xiǎo shāng diàn.
lines.english: Yes, there are many small shops near the last scenic spot.

lines.speaker: Tourist A
lines.zh: 我忘了帶地圖，可以再給我一份嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ wàng le dài dì tú, kě yǐ zài gěi wǒ yī fèn ma?
lines.english: I forgot to bring a map; can I have another one?

lines.speaker: Guide
lines.zh: 沒問題，這是一份新的地圖。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, zhè shì yī fèn xīn de dì tú.
lines.english: No problem, here is a new map.

lines.speaker: Tourist B
lines.zh: 我們什麼時候回酒店？
lines.pinyin: wǒ men shén me shí hòu huí jiǔ diàn?
lines.english: When are we going back to the hotel?

lines.speaker: Guide
lines.zh: 大約下午五點左右會到達酒店。
lines.pinyin: dà yuē xià wǔ wǔ diǎn zuǒ yòu huì dào dá jiǔ diàn.
lines.english: We'll arrive back at the hotel around 5 PM.

lines.speaker: Tourist A
lines.zh: 謝謝導遊，今天的安排非常充實。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie dǎo yóu, jīn tiān de ān pái fēi cháng chōng shí.
lines.english: Thanks guide, today's arrangement is very fulfilling.

lines.speaker: Guide
lines.zh: 大家客氣了，希望你們玩得愉快。
lines.pinyin: dà jiā kè qì le, xī wàng nǐ men wán de yú kuài.
lines.english: You're welcome, I hope you have a great time.

lines.speaker: Tourist B
lines.zh: 一定的，這裡真的很美。
lines.pinyin: yī dìng de, zhè lǐ zhēn de hěn měi.
lines.english: Definitely, it's really beautiful here.

dialogueSections.title: Booking a Flight
dialogueSections.scene: A traveler is at a travel agency booking a flight and asking about visas.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 你好，我想預訂下個月去日本的飛機票。
lines.pinyin: nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng yù dìng xià gè yuè qù rì běn de fēi jī piào.
lines.english: Hello, I'd like to book a flight to Japan for next month.

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.zh: 沒問題。請問您想出發的日期是？
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí. qǐng wèn nín xiǎng chū fā de rì qī shì?
lines.english: No problem. What is your intended departure date?

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 下個月十五號出發，二十五號回來。
lines.pinyin: xià gè yuè shí wǔ hào chū fā, èr shí wǔ hào huí lái.
lines.english: Departing on the 15th next month, returning on the 25th.

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.zh: 請稍等，我查一下航班。有早上的也有晚上的。
lines.pinyin: qǐng shāo děng, wǒ chá yī xià háng bān. yǒu zǎo shang de yě yǒu wǎn shang de.
lines.english: Please wait a moment while I check the flights. There are morning and evening ones.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 我想要早上的飛機，這樣到達那裡比較早。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng yào zǎo shang de fēi jī, zhè yàng dào dá nà lǐ bǐ jiào zǎo.
lines.english: I want a morning flight so I can arrive there earlier.

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.zh: 好的。早上的票價是兩萬塊台幣。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de. zǎo shang de piào jià shì liǎng wàn kuài tái bì.
lines.english: Okay. The morning ticket price is 20,000 NTD.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 好的，請幫我確認。需要簽證嗎？
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, qǐng bāng wǒ què rèn. xū yào qiān zhèng ma?
lines.english: Okay, please confirm it for me. Do I need a visa?

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.zh: 如果您持護照旅遊，目前是不需要的。
lines.pinyin: rú guǒ nín chí hù zhào lǚ yóu, mù qián shì bù xū yào de.
lines.english: If you are traveling with a passport, currently it's not required.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 那就太方便了。我可以帶多少行李？
lines.pinyin: nà jiù tài fāng biàn le. wǒ kě yǐ dài duō shǎo xíng li?
lines.english: That's very convenient. How much luggage can I bring?

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.zh: 經濟艙可以帶二十公斤的托運行李。
lines.pinyin: jīng jì cāng kě yǐ dài èr shí gōng jīn de tuō yùn xíng li.
lines.english: Economy class allows 20kg of checked luggage.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 如果行李超重怎麼辦？
lines.pinyin: rú guǒ xíng li chāo zhòng zěn me bàn?
lines.english: What if my luggage is overweight?

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.zh: 超重需要另外付費。您還想預訂火車票嗎？
lines.pinyin: chāo zhòng xū yào lìng wài fù fèi. nín hái xiǎng yù dìng huǒ chē piào ma?
lines.english: Overweight requires an extra fee. Would you also like to book train tickets?

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 暂时不用，我到那裡再打算。
lines.pinyin: zàn shí bù yòng, wǒ dào nà lǐ zài dǎ suàn.
lines.english: Not for now; I'll decide once I get there.

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.zh: 好的。請提供您的護照影本以便出票。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de. qǐng tí gōng nín de hù zhào yǐng běn yǐ biàn chū piào.
lines.english: Okay. Please provide a copy of your passport for ticket issuance.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 我現在就給您。可以刷卡嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiàn zài jiù gěi nín. kě yǐ shuā kǎ ma?
lines.english: I'll give it to you now. Can I pay by card?

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.zh: 可以。請在這裡確認行程並簽名。
lines.pinyin: kě yǐ. qǐng zài zhè lǐ què rèn xíng chéng bìng qiān míng.
lines.english: Yes. Please confirm the itinerary and sign here.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 好的，都確認好了。謝謝。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, dōu què rèn hǎo le. xiè xie.
lines.english: Okay, all confirmed. Thank you.

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.zh: 票會寄到您的電子郵件。祝您行程愉快。
lines.pinyin: piào huì jì dào nín de diàn zǐ yóu jiàn. zhù nín xíng chéng yú kuài.
lines.english: The ticket will be sent to your email. Have a pleasant trip.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 謝謝，再見。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie, zài jiàn.
lines.english: Thank you, goodbye.

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.zh: 再見。
lines.pinyin: zài jiàn.
lines.english: Goodbye.

questions.question: If you see a 📸 icon, it means...

title: School Life
description: Learn about school subjects, exams, and student activities.

text.zh: 學校不僅是學習知識的地方，也是認識朋友的地方。
text.pinyin: xué xiào bù jǐn shì xué xí zhī shi de dì fang, yě shì rèn shi péng you de dì fang.
text.english: School is not only a place to learn knowledge, but also a place to meet friends.

text.zh: 參加社團活動可以培養不同的興趣和能力。
text.pinyin: cān jiā shè tuán huó dòng kě yǐ péi yǎng bù tóng de xìng qù hé néng lì.
text.english: Participating in club activities can cultivate different interests and abilities.

text.zh: 面對考試，努力準備是成功的關鍵。
text.pinyin: miàn duì kǎo shì, nǔ lì zhǔn bèi shì chéng gōng de guān jiàn.
text.english: When facing exams, diligent preparation is the key to success.

comprehension.question: What can you do at school besides learning?
comprehension.questionZh: 在學校除了學習還可以做什麼？

comprehension.question: What is the benefit of club activities?
comprehension.questionZh: 社團活動有什麼好處？
options: 培養興趣和能力 Cultivate interests and abilities

comprehension.question: What is the key to success in exams?
comprehension.questionZh: 考試成功的關鍵是什麼？

dialogueSections.title: Exam Review
dialogueSections.scene: Two students are in the library discussing their upcoming exams.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 明天的數學考試你複習了嗎？
lines.pinyin: míng tiān de shù xué kǎo shì nǐ fù xí le ma?
lines.english: Have you reviewed for tomorrow's math exam?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 還沒呢，我覺得數學太難了。
lines.pinyin: hái méi ne, wǒ jué de shù xué tài nán le.
lines.english: Not yet, I think math is too difficult.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我也是，尤其是幾何部分。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě shì, yóu qí shì jǐ hé bù fèn.
lines.english: Me too, especially the geometry part.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我們一起討論一下作業吧。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men yì qǐ tǎo lùn yí xià zuò yè ba.
lines.english: Let's discuss the homework together.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好主意，圖書館現在很安靜。
lines.pinyin: hǎo zhǔ yì, tú shū guǎn xiàn zài hěn ān jìng.
lines.english: Good idea, the library is very quiet now.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你科學成績怎麼樣？
lines.pinyin: nǐ kē xué chéng jī zěn me yàng?
lines.english: How are your science grades?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 還不錯，上次及格了。
lines.pinyin: hái bú cuò, shàng cì jí gé le.
lines.english: Not bad, I passed last time.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我希望這次數學也能及格。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xī wàng zhè cì shù xué yě néng jí gé.
lines.english: I hope I can pass math this time too.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 別擔心，你平時很努力。
lines.pinyin: bié dān xīn, nǐ píng shí hěn nǔ lì.
lines.english: Don't worry, you work hard usually.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對了，你的歷史報告寫完了嗎？
lines.pinyin: duì le, nǐ de lì shǐ bào gào xiě wán le ma?
lines.english: By the way, have you finished your history report?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 寫完了，我昨天在宿舍熬夜寫的。
lines.pinyin: xiě wán le, wǒ zuó tiān zài sù shè áo yè xiě de.
lines.english: Finished it, I stayed up late in the dorm yesterday to write it.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你太拚了！要注意休息。
lines.pinyin: nǐ tài pīn le! yào zhù yì xiū xi.
lines.english: You're working too hard! You need to rest.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我知道。考完試我們去校園走走吧。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zhī dào. kǎo wán shì wǒ men qù xiào yuán zǒu zǒu ba.
lines.english: I know. Let's walk around campus after the exam.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好啊，順便去食堂吃頓好的。
lines.pinyin: hǎo a, shùn biàn qù shí táng chī dùn hǎo de.
lines.english: Sure, and let's have a good meal at the cafeteria while we're at it.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 沒問題。我們現在開始複習吧。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí. wǒ men xiàn zài kāi shǐ fù xí ba.
lines.english: No problem. Let's start reviewing now.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好，我們先看第一章。
lines.pinyin: hǎo, wǒ men xiān kàn dì yī zhāng.
lines.english: Okay, let's look at Chapter 1 first.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這部分的公式很重要。
lines.pinyin: zhè bù fèn de gōng shì hěn zhòng yào.
lines.english: The formulas in this part are very important.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我記下來了。謝謝你幫我。
lines.pinyin: wǒ jì xià lái le. xiè xie nǐ bāng wǒ.
lines.english: I've noted them down. Thanks for helping me.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 不客氣，我們是好朋友嘛。
lines.pinyin: bú kè qi, wǒ men shì hǎo péng you ma.
lines.english: You're welcome, we're good friends after all.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 加油！祝我們明天都好運。
lines.pinyin: jiā yóu! zhù wǒ men míng tiān dōu hǎo yùn.
lines.english: Good luck! Wish us both good luck tomorrow.

dialogueSections.title: Club Activities
dialogueSections.scene: Students are discussing school clubs and upcoming competitions.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你參加了什麼社團？
lines.pinyin: nǐ cān jiā le shén me shè tuán?
lines.english: What club did you join?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我參加了攝影社，你呢？
lines.pinyin: wǒ cān jiā le shè yǐng shè, nǐ ne?
lines.english: I joined the photography club, and you?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我參加了籃球社，下週有比賽。
lines.pinyin: wǒ cān jiā le lán qiú shè, xià zhōu yǒu bǐ sài.
lines.english: I joined the basketball club, there's a game next week.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 哇，那祝你們贏得比賽！
lines.pinyin: wā, nà zhù nǐ men yíng dé bǐ sài!
lines.english: Wow, good luck winning the game!

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝！你們社團有什麼活動？
lines.pinyin: xiè xie! nǐ men shè tuán yǒu shén me huó dòng?
lines.english: Thanks! What activities does your club have?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我們週末要去山區拍照。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men zhōu mò yào qù shān qū pāi zhào.
lines.english: We're going to the mountains to take photos this weekend.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 聽起來很有趣。校園生活真充實。
lines.pinyin: tīng qǐ lái hěn yǒu qù. xiào yuán shēng huó zhēn chōng shí.
lines.english: Sounds interesting. Campus life is really fulfilling.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是啊，不過學業壓力也挺大的。
lines.pinyin: shì a, bú guò xué yè yā lì yě tǐng dà de.
lines.english: Yes, but academic pressure is also quite heavy.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 對了，聽說你申請了獎學金？
lines.pinyin: duì le, tīng shuō nǐ shēn qǐng le jiǎng xué jīn?
lines.english: By the way, I heard you applied for a scholarship?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是的，我的成績還不錯，想試試看。
lines.pinyin: shì de, wǒ de chéng jī hái bú cuò, xiǎng shì shì kàn.
lines.english: Yes, my grades are decent, so I wanted to try.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你一定可以拿到的。你這麼努力。
lines.pinyin: nǐ yí dìng kě yǐ ná dào de. nǐ zhè me nǔ lì.
lines.english: You'll definitely get it. You work so hard.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 借你吉言。畢業後你有什麼打算？
lines.pinyin: jiè nǐ jí yán. bì yè hòu nǐ yǒu shén me dǎ suàn?
lines.english: From your lips to God's ears. What are your plans after graduation?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我想繼續讀研究生，做學術研究。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng jì xù dú yán jiū shēng, zuò xué shù yán jiū.
lines.english: I want to continue as a graduate student and do academic research.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那很適合你。我想先去實習。
lines.pinyin: nà hěn shì hé nǐ. wǒ xiǎng xiān qù shí xí.
lines.english: That suits you. I want to do an internship first.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 實習經驗對找工作很有幫助。
lines.pinyin: shí xí jīng yàn duì zhǎo gōng zuò hěn yǒu bāng zhù.
lines.english: Internship experience is very helpful for finding a job.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 沒錯。我們先去喝杯咖啡吧。
lines.pinyin: méi cuò. wǒ men xiān qù hē bēi kā fēi ba.
lines.english: Exactly. Let's go grab a coffee first.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好啊，順便聊聊招新活動。
lines.pinyin: hǎo a, shùn biàn liáo liáo zhāo xīn huó dòng.
lines.english: Sure, and let's talk about the recruitment activities while we're at it.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我們社團最近確實在招新。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men shè tuán zuì jìn què shí zài zhāo xīn.
lines.english: Our club is indeed recruiting new members recently.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 希望能招到更多感興趣的同學。
lines.pinyin: xī wàng néng zhāo dào gèng duō gǎn xìng qù de tóng xué.
lines.english: Hope to recruit more interested students.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 一定的。我們走吧。
lines.pinyin: yí dìng de. wǒ men zǒu ba.
lines.english: Definitely. Let's go.

dialogueSections.title: Class Schedule
dialogueSections.scene: A student is checking their schedule and asking for leave.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 老師，我想請假。
lines.pinyin: jiào shòu, wǒ xiǎng qǐng jià.
lines.english: Professor, I'd like to ask for leave.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 怎麼了？為什麼要請假？
lines.pinyin: zěn me le? wèi shén me yào qǐng jià?
lines.english: What's wrong? Why do you need leave?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我明天身體不太舒服，想去醫院。
lines.pinyin: wǒ míng tiān shēn tǐ bú tài shū fu, xiǎng qù yī yuàn.
lines.english: I'm not feeling well tomorrow and want to go to the hospital.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 沒問題，身體最重要。你的課表上有什麼課？
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, shēn tǐ zuì zhòng yào. nǐ de kè biǎo shàng yǒu shén me kè?
lines.english: No problem, health is most important. What classes are on your schedule?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 明天下午有您的地理課。
lines.pinyin: míng tiān xià wǔ yǒu nín de dì lǐ kè.
lines.english: Tomorrow afternoon has your geography class.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 知道了。我會幫你登記。
lines.pinyin: zhī dào le. wǒ huì bāng nǐ dēng jì.
lines.english: I see. I'll register it for you.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝教授。我會找同學複習內容的。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie jiào shòu. wǒ huì zhǎo tóng xué fù xí nèi róng de.
lines.english: Thank you, Professor. I'll find a classmate to review the content.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好。別忘了下週要交作業。
lines.pinyin: hǎo. bié wàng le xià zhōu yào jiāo zuò yè.
lines.english: Good. Don't forget the homework is due next week.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我記得了，我會準時交的。
lines.pinyin: wǒ jì dé le, wǒ huì zhǔn shí jiāo de.
lines.english: I remember, I'll submit it on time.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你有沒有及格的壓力？
lines.pinyin: nǐ yǒu méi yǒu jí gé de yā lì?
lines.english: Do you have pressure about passing?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 有一點，因為這門課很難。
lines.pinyin: yǒu yì diǎn, yīn wèi zhè mén kè hěn nán.
lines.english: A little bit, because this course is difficult.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 只要按時複習，及格沒問題。
lines.pinyin: zhǐ yào àn shí fù xí, jí gé méi wèn tí.
lines.english: As long as you review on time, passing won't be a problem.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我會努力的。圖書館有相關資料嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ huì nǔ lì de. tú shū guǎn yǒu xiāng guān zī liào ma?
lines.english: I'll try my best. Does the library have relevant materials?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有的，你可以去借幾本參考書。
lines.pinyin: yǒu de, nǐ kě yǐ qù jiè jǐ běn cān kǎo shū.
lines.english: Yes, you can borrow a few reference books.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好的，我一會兒就去借書。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, wǒ yì huì r jiù qù jiè shū.
lines.english: Okay, I'll go borrow books in a while.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 記得及時還書，不然要罰款。
lines.pinyin: jì dé jí shí huán shū, bù rán yào fá kuǎn.
lines.english: Remember to return them on time, otherwise there's a fine.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我知道。謝謝教授的建議。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zhī dào. xiè xie jiào shòu de jiàn yì.
lines.english: I know. Thanks for the suggestion, Professor.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 不客氣。早日康復。
lines.pinyin: bú kè qi. zǎo rì kāng fù.
lines.english: You're welcome. Recover soon.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝。再見。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie. zài jiàn.
lines.english: Thank you. Goodbye.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 再見。
lines.pinyin: zài jiàn.
lines.english: Goodbye.

To get a degree, you must...
What do you do if you don't understand a topic?
Which word describes the study of the earth?
If you are late for class, you are...

questions.question: If you study together, you are...

title: Bargaining & Markets
description: Learn how to negotiate prices and shop at traditional markets.

text.zh: 在傳統市場或夜市，討價還價是一種樂趣。
text.pinyin: zài chuán tǒng shì chǎng huò yè shì, tǎo jià huán jià shì yì zhǒng lè qù.
text.english: In traditional markets or night markets, bargaining is a kind of fun.

text.zh: 你可以試著提出比較低的價格，但也要尊重老闆。
text.pinyin: nǐ kě yǐ shì zhe tí chū bǐ jiào dī de jià gé, dàn yě yào zūn zhòng lǎo bǎn.
text.english: You can try to suggest a lower price, but you should also respect the shopkeeper.

text.zh: 買多一點通常比較容易得到折扣。
text.pinyin: mǎi duō yì diǎn tōng cháng bǐ jiào róng yì dé dào zhé kòu.
text.english: Buying a bit more usually makes it easier to get a discount.

comprehension.question: Where is bargaining common?
comprehension.questionZh: 在哪裡討價還價很常見？
options: 傳統市場或夜市 Traditional market or night market

comprehension.question: What should you do while bargaining?
comprehension.questionZh: 討價還價時應該做什麼？
options: 大聲吵架 Shout and fight
尊重老闆 Respect the boss
直接拿走 Just take it

comprehension.question: How can you get a discount more easily?
comprehension.questionZh: 怎麼做比較容易得到折扣？
options: 不買東西 Don't buy anything

dialogueSections.title: At the Fruit Market
dialogueSections.scene: A customer is buying fruit and bargaining with the seller.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 老闆，這蘋果怎麼賣？
lines.pinyin: lǎo bǎn, zhè píng guǒ zěn me mài?
lines.english: Boss, how do you sell these apples?

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 一斤十塊，非常新鮮。
lines.pinyin: yì jīn shí kuài, fēi cháng xīn xiān.
lines.english: 10 bucks a catty, very fresh.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 有點貴，能不能便宜點？
lines.pinyin: yǒu diǎn guì, néng bù néng pián yi diǎn?
lines.english: A bit expensive, can you make it cheaper?

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 這可是特價了，質量保證。
lines.pinyin: zhè kě shì tè jià le, zhì liàng bǎo zhèng.
lines.english: This is already a special price, quality guaranteed.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 我要買五斤，給打個折吧？
lines.pinyin: wǒ yào mǎi wǔ jīn, gěi dǎ gè zhé ba?
lines.english: I'll buy 5 catties, give me a discount?

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 好吧，買五斤給你打九折。
lines.pinyin: hǎo ba, mǎi wǔ jīn gěi nǐ dǎ jiǔ zhé.
lines.english: Okay, buy 5 catties and I'll give you 10% off.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 八折行不行？我常來這兒買。
lines.pinyin: bā zhé xíng bù xíng? wǒ cháng lái zhèr mǎi.
lines.english: How about 20% off? I often come here to buy.

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 不行啊，八折就虧本了。
lines.pinyin: bù xíng a, bā zhé jiù kuī běn le.
lines.english: No, I'd lose money at 20% off.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 那送我兩個橘子吧？
lines.pinyin: nà sòng wǒ liǎng gè jú zi ba?
lines.english: Then give me two oranges for free?

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 行，給你送兩個。一共四十五塊。
lines.pinyin: xíng, gěi nǐ sòng liǎng gè. yí gòng sì shí wǔ kuài.
lines.english: Fine, I'll give you two. Total is 45 bucks.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 給你五十塊。
lines.pinyin: gěi nǐ wǔ shí kuài.
lines.english: Here is 50.

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 找您五塊。拿好您的水果。
lines.pinyin: zhǎo nín wǔ kuài. ná hǎo nín de shuǐ guǒ.
lines.english: Change of 5. Take your fruit.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 謝謝老闆。下次再來。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie lǎo bǎn. xià cì zài lái.
lines.english: Thanks, boss. I'll come back next time.

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 好，慢走！
lines.pinyin: hǎo, màn zǒu!
lines.english: Okay, take care!

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 這市場的環境還不錯。
lines.pinyin: zhè shì chǎng de huán jìng hái bú cuò.
lines.english: The environment of this market is not bad.

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 那是，我們這兒的水果最出名。
lines.pinyin: nà shì, wǒ men zhèr de shuǐ guǒ zuì chū míng.
lines.english: Of course, our fruit here is the most famous.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 我看那邊的香蕉也挺好。
lines.pinyin: wǒ kàn nà biān de xiāng jiāo yě tǐng hǎo.
lines.english: I see the bananas over there are also quite good.

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 那是進口的，今天剛到。
lines.pinyin: nà shì jìn kǒu de, jīn tiān gāng dào.
lines.english: Those are imported, just arrived today.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 下次再買，今天拿不動了。
lines.pinyin: xià cì zài mǎi, jīn tiān ná bú dòng le.
lines.english: I'll buy next time, can't carry any more today.

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 沒問題，慢走。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, màn zǒu.
lines.english: No problem, take care.

dialogueSections.title: Bargaining for Clothes
dialogueSections.scene: A customer is at a clothing stall in a night market.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 這件上衣多少錢？
lines.pinyin: zhè jiàn shàng yī duō shǎo qián?
lines.english: How much is this top?

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 這件兩百塊，純棉的。
lines.pinyin: zhè jiàn liǎng bǎi kuài, chún mián de.
lines.english: This one is 200, it's pure cotton.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 可以試穿一下嗎？
lines.pinyin: kě yǐ shì chuān yí xià ma?
lines.english: Can I try it on?

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 可以，試衣間在後面。
lines.pinyin: kě yǐ, shì yī jiān zài hòu miàn.
lines.english: Yes, the fitting room is in the back.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: (After trying) 大小合適，但顏色太深了。
lines.pinyin: (After trying) dà xiǎo hé shì, dàn yán sè tài shēn le.
lines.english: (After trying) The size is right, but the color is too dark.

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 我們還有淺藍色的，你要試試嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ men hái yǒu qiǎn lán sè de, nǐ yào shì shì ma?
lines.english: We also have light blue, want to try?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 好。這件價格能便宜點嗎？
lines.pinyin: hǎo. zhè jiàn jià gé néng pián yi diǎn ma?
lines.english: Okay. Can the price be cheaper for this one?

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 一百八，最便宜了。
lines.pinyin: yì bǎi bā, zuì pián yi le.
lines.english: 180, lowest price.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 一百五行不行？合適我就買了。
lines.pinyin: yì bǎi wǔ xíng bù xíng? hé shì wǒ jiù mǎi le.
lines.english: Is 150 okay? If so, I'll buy it.

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 行吧，看你這麼喜歡，一百五給你。
lines.pinyin: xíng ba, kàn nǐ zhè me xǐ huan, yì bǎi wǔ gěi nǐ.
lines.english: Fine, since you like it so much, 150 for you.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 可以用手機掃碼付費嗎？
lines.pinyin: kě yǐ yòng shǒu jī sǎo mǎ fù fèi ma?
lines.english: Can I pay by scanning a QR code with my phone?

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 可以，掃這個二維碼就行。
lines.pinyin: kě yǐ, sǎo zhè gè èr wéi mǎ jiù xíng.
lines.english: Yes, just scan this QR code.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 付好了。如果回去發現有問題可以退貨嗎？
lines.pinyin: fù hǎo le. rú guǒ huí qù fā xiàn yǒu wèn tí kě yǐ tuì huò ma?
lines.english: Paid. If I find a problem after going back, can I return it?

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 七天內可以換貨，但不能退貨。
lines.pinyin: qī tiān nèi kě yǐ huàn huò, dàn bù néng tuì huò.
lines.english: Can exchange within 7 days, but no returns.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 好吧，那我也看看那雙鞋子。
lines.pinyin: hǎo ba, nà wǒ yě kàn kàn nà shuāng xié zi.
lines.english: Alright, I'll also take a look at those shoes.

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 那雙鞋現在打五折，非常划算。
lines.pinyin: nà shuāng xié xiàn zài dǎ wǔ zhé, fēi cháng huá suàn.
lines.english: Those shoes are 50% off now, a very good deal.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 款式不錯，但我只要這件衣服。
lines.pinyin: kuǎn shì bú cuò, dàn wǒ zhǐ yào zhè jiàn yī fu.
lines.english: The style is good, but I only want this top.

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 沒問題。慢走。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí. màn zǒu.
lines.english: No problem. Take care.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 謝謝，再見。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie, zài jiàn.
lines.english: Thanks, goodbye.

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 再見。
lines.pinyin: zài jiàn.
lines.english: Goodbye.

dialogueSections.title: Buying Souvenirs
dialogueSections.scene: A traveler is buying souvenirs for friends at a local shop.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 你好，我想買一些紀念品送給朋友。
lines.pinyin: nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng mǎi yì xiē jì niàn pǐn sòng gěi péng you.
lines.english: Hello, I want to buy some souvenirs for my friends.

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 歡迎！我們這裡有很多特色的工藝品。
lines.pinyin: huān yíng! wǒ men zhè lǐ yǒu hěn duō tè sè de gōng yì pǐn.
lines.english: Welcome! We have many unique handicrafts here.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 這個扇子多少錢一把？
lines.pinyin: zhè gè shàn zi duō shǎo qián yì bǎ?
lines.english: How much is this fan?

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 五十塊。手工畫的。
lines.pinyin: wǔ shí kuài. shǒu gōng huà de.
lines.english: 50 bucks. Hand-painted.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 我要買十把，能不能多打點折？
lines.pinyin: wǒ yào mǎi shí bǎ, néng bù néng duō dǎ diǎn zhé?
lines.english: I want to buy ten, can you give me a bigger discount?

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 買十把的話，算你四十塊一把。
lines.pinyin: mǎi shí bǎ de huà, suàn nǐ sì shí kuài yì bǎ.
lines.english: If you buy ten, I'll count them as 40 each.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 三十塊行不行？我還要買別的東西。
lines.pinyin: sān shí kuài xíng bù xíng? wǒ hái yào mǎi bié de dōng xi.
lines.english: Is 30 okay? I also want to buy other things.

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 三十五塊吧，這已經是半價促銷了。
lines.pinyin: sān shí wǔ kuài ba, zhè yǐ jīng shì bàn jià cù xiāo le.
lines.english: Let's say 35, this is already a half-price promotion.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 好吧。那這些茶葉呢？
lines.pinyin: hǎo ba. nà zhè xiē chá yè ne?
lines.english: Alright. What about these tea leaves?

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 這是一級烏龍茶，兩百塊一盒。
lines.pinyin: zhè shì yī jí wū lóng chá, liǎng bǎi kuài yì hé.
lines.english: This is grade-A Oolong tea, 200 a box.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 買兩盒，一共多少錢？
lines.pinyin: mǎi liǎng hé, yí gòng duō shǎo qián?
lines.english: Buying two boxes, how much in total?

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 加上扇子，一共七百五十塊。
lines.pinyin: jiā shàng shàn zi, yí gòng qī bǎi wǔ shí kuài.
lines.english: Including the fans, total is 750.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 七百塊行嗎？整數比較方便。
lines.pinyin: qī bǎi kuài xíng ma? zhěng shù bǐ jiào fāng biàn.
lines.english: Is 700 okay? Even numbers are more convenient.

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 行行行，看在你是遊客的分上。
lines.pinyin: xíng xíng xíng, kàn zài nǐ shì yóu kè de fèn shàng.
lines.english: Alright, since you're a tourist.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 可以用信用卡嗎？
lines.pinyin: kě yǐ yòng xìn yòng kǎ ma?
lines.english: Can I use a credit card?

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 可以，刷卡在那邊。
lines.pinyin: kě yǐ, shuā kǎ zài nà biān.
lines.english: Yes, swipe the card over there.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 幫我包裝漂亮一點，好嗎？
lines.pinyin: bāng wǒ bāo zhuāng piào liang yì diǎn, hǎo ma?
lines.english: Could you wrap them nicely for me?

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 沒問題，我給你用禮盒裝。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, wǒ gěi nǐ yòng lǐ hé zhuāng.
lines.english: No problem, I'll use gift boxes for you.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 謝謝老闆，祝你生意興隆。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie lǎo bǎn, zhù nǐ shēng yì xīng lóng.
lines.english: Thanks boss, wish you a prosperous business.

lines.speaker: Seller
lines.zh: 謝謝！歡迎再來。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie! huān yíng zài lái.
lines.english: Thanks! Welcome back anytime.

questions.sentence: 請幫我___一下，我想看看合不合適。

questions.question: If someone is 'selling' something, they are...

title: Emergency & Help
description: Learn how to ask for help and describe emergencies.

text.zh: 在台灣，遇到緊急情況時，打110可以叫警察。
text.pinyin: zài tái wān, yù dào jǐn jí qíng kuàng shí, dǎ yì yì líng kě yǐ jiào jǐng chá.
text.english: In Taiwan, when encountering an emergency, dial 110 to call the police.

text.zh: 如果你需要救護車或遇到火災，請撥打119。
text.pinyin: rú guǒ nǐ xū yào jiù hù chē huò yù dào huǒ zāi, qǐng bō dǎ yì yì jiǔ.
text.english: If you need an ambulance or encounter a fire, please dial 119.

text.zh: 保持冷靜並清楚說明你的位置，是求助的最重要步驟。
text.pinyin: bǎo chí lěng jìng bìng qīng chǔ shuō míng nǐ de wèi zhì, shì qiú zhù de zuì zhòng yào bù zhòu.
text.english: Staying calm and clearly stating your location is the most important step in seeking help.

comprehension.question: What number should you dial for the police?
comprehension.questionZh: 警察的緊急電話是多少？

comprehension.question: What number should you dial for an ambulance?
comprehension.questionZh: 救護車的緊急電話是多少？

comprehension.question: What is the most important step in seeking help?
comprehension.questionZh: 求助時最重要的一步是什麼？
options: 保持冷靜並說明位置 Stay calm and state location

dialogueSections.title: Lost Wallet
dialogueSections.scene: A traveler realizes their wallet is missing and seeks help.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 糟糕！我的錢包不見了！
lines.pinyin: zāo gāo! wǒ de qián bāo bú jiàn le!
lines.english: Oh no! My wallet is gone!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你最後一次見到它是什麼時候？
lines.pinyin: nǐ zuì hòu yí cì jiàn dào tā shì shén me shí hòu?
lines.english: When was the last time you saw it?

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 大概半小時前，在咖啡館。我想它是被盜了。
lines.pinyin: dà gài bàn xiǎo shí qián, zài kā fēi guǎn. wǒ xiǎng tā shì bèi dào le.
lines.english: About half an hour ago, at the cafe. I think it was stolen.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 裡面有什麼重要的東西嗎？
lines.pinyin: lǐ miàn yǒu shén me zhòng yào de dōng xi ma?
lines.english: Was there anything important inside?

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 有現金、信用卡，還有我的護照！
lines.pinyin: yǒu xiàn jīn, xìn yòng kǎ, hái yǒu wǒ de hù zhào!
lines.english: There was cash, credit cards, and my passport!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 這很緊急，我們應該立刻報警。
lines.pinyin: zhè hěn jǐn jí, wǒ men yīng gāi lì kè bào jǐng.
lines.english: This is urgent, we should report to the police immediately.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 哪裡有警察局？
lines.pinyin: nǎ lǐ yǒu jǐng chá jú?
lines.english: Where is a police station?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 就在附近，走五分鐘就到了。
lines.pinyin: jiù zài fù jìn, zǒu wǔ fēn zhōng jiù dào le.
lines.english: It's nearby, just a 5-minute walk.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: （At the police station）我想報案，我的錢包丟了。
lines.pinyin: (At the police station) wǒ xiǎng bào àn, wǒ de qián bāo diū le.
lines.english: (At the police station) I want to report a case, I lost my wallet.

lines.speaker: Police
lines.zh: 請冷靜，請提供您的姓名和聯繫方式。
lines.pinyin: qǐng lěng jìng, qǐng tí gōng nín de xìng míng hé lián xì fāng shì.
lines.english: Please stay calm, please provide your name and contact information.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 我叫馬克，這是我的聯繫人電話。
lines.pinyin: wǒ jiào mǎ kè, zhè shì wǒ de lián xì rén diàn huà.
lines.english: I'm Mark, here is my contact's phone number.

lines.speaker: Police
lines.zh: 您記得小偷的樣子嗎？
lines.pinyin: nín jì dé xiǎo tōu de yàng zi ma?
lines.english: Do you remember what the thief looked like?

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 沒看清楚，當時人很多。
lines.pinyin: méi kàn qīng chu, dāng shí rén hěn duō.
lines.english: I didn't see clearly, there were many people then.

lines.speaker: Police
lines.zh: 好的。我們會給您一份報案證明。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de. wǒ men huì gěi nín yí fèn bào àn zhèng míng.
lines.english: Okay. We will give you a case report certificate.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 這份證明可以用來補辦護照嗎？
lines.pinyin: zhè fèn zhèng míng kě yǐ yòng lái bǔ bàn hù zhào ma?
lines.english: Can this certificate be used to replace my passport?

lines.speaker: Police
lines.zh: 是的，您需要帶這份證明去大使館。
lines.pinyin: shì de, nín xū yào dài zhè fèn zhèng míng qù dà shǐ guǎn.
lines.english: Yes, you need to take this certificate to the embassy.

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 謝謝警察。這真的很麻煩。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie jǐng chá. zhè zhēn de hěn má fán.
lines.english: Thanks, officer. This is really troublesome.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 別擔心，我們會幫你的。你的錢包有保險嗎？
lines.pinyin: bié dān xīn, wǒ men huì bāng nǐ de. nǐ de qián bāo yǒu bǎo xiǎn ma?
lines.english: Don't worry, we'll help you. Did your wallet have insurance?

lines.speaker: Traveler
lines.zh: 幸好有旅遊保險。我現在就聯繫保險公司。
lines.pinyin: xìng hǎo yǒu lǚ yóu bǎo xiǎn. wǒ xiàn zài jiù lián xì bǎo xiǎn gōng sī.
lines.english: Luckily I have travel insurance. I'll contact the insurance company now.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好的，祝一切順利。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, zhù yí qiè shùn lì.
lines.english: Okay, wish everything goes smoothly.

dialogueSections.title: Medical Emergency
dialogueSections.scene: Someone has collapsed on the street, and bystanders are helping.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 救命！有人暈倒了！
lines.pinyin: jiù mìng! yǒu rén yūn dǎo le!
lines.english: Help! Someone has fainted!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 快過來幫忙！他好像受傷了。
lines.pinyin: kuài guò lái bāng máng! tā hǎo xiàng shòu shāng le.
lines.english: Quick, come help! He seems to be injured.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 誰有手機？快打電話叫救護車！
lines.pinyin: shéi yǒu shǒu jī? kuài dǎ diàn huà jiào jiù hù chē!
lines.english: Who has a phone? Quick, call an ambulance!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我已經在打了。喂，這裡有人需要救助。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yǐ jīng zài dǎ le. wéi, zhè lǐ yǒu rén xū yào qiú zhù.
lines.english: I'm already calling. Hello, someone here needs help.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 請告訴救護車這裡的地址。
lines.pinyin: qǐng gào sù jiù hù chē zhè lǐ de dì zhǐ.
lines.english: Please tell the ambulance the address here.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 地址是在中山路和南京路口。
lines.pinyin: dì zhǐ shì zài zhōng shān lù hé nán jīng lù kǒu.
lines.english: The address is at the intersection of Zhongshan Road and Nanjing Road.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 他還有呼吸嗎？請保持冷靜。
lines.pinyin: tā hái yǒu hū xī ma? qǐng bǎo chí lěng jìng.
lines.english: Is he still breathing? Please stay calm.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有呼吸，但意識不清楚。
lines.pinyin: yǒu hū xī, dàn yì shí bù qīng chu.
lines.english: He's breathing, but unconscious.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 救護車幾分鐘能到？
lines.pinyin: jiù hù chē jǐ fēn zhōng néng dào?
lines.english: How many minutes until the ambulance arrives?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 他們說五分鐘內就會到達。
lines.pinyin: tā men shuō wǔ fēn zhōng nèi jiù huì dào dá.
lines.english: They said they'll arrive within five minutes.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 大家讓開一點，給他一點空間。
lines.pinyin: dà jiā ràng kāi yì diǎn, gěi tā yì diǎn kōng jiān.
lines.english: Everyone step back a bit, give him some space.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 附近有醫生或是藥局嗎？
lines.pinyin: fù jìn yǒu yī shēng huò shì yào jú ma?
lines.english: Is there a doctor or pharmacy nearby?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 對面就有一個社區診所。
lines.pinyin: duì miàn jiù yǒu yí gè shè qū zhěn suǒ.
lines.english: There's a community clinic right across.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我去請醫生過來！
lines.pinyin: wǒ qù qǐng yī shēng guò lái!
lines.english: I'll go get the doctor!

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好的，快去。我們在這邊陪著他。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, kuài qù. wǒ men zài zhè biān péi zhe tā.
lines.english: Okay, go quickly. We'll stay here with him.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: (Returns with doctor) 醫生來了！
lines.pinyin: (Returns with doctor) yī shēng lái le!
lines.english: (Returns with doctor) The doctor is here!

lines.speaker: Doctor
lines.zh: 大家別慌。我先檢查一下他的情況。
lines.pinyin: dà jiā bié huāng. wǒ xiān jiǎn chá yí xià tā de qíng kuàng.
lines.english: Don't panic everyone. Let me check his condition first.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 醫生，他沒事吧？
lines.pinyin: yī shēng, tā méi shì ba?
lines.english: Doctor, is he okay?

lines.speaker: Doctor
lines.zh: 可能是因為天氣太熱中暑了。救護車到了嗎？
lines.pinyin: kě néng shì yīn wèi tiān qì tài rè zhòng shǔ le. jiù hù chē dào le ma?
lines.english: It might be heatstroke because of the hot weather. Has the ambulance arrived?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 到了，在那兒！
lines.pinyin: dào le, zài nàr!
lines.english: Arrived, it's there!

dialogueSections.title: Lost in the City
dialogueSections.scene: A tourist is lost and asks a local for directions in an emergency.

lines.speaker: Tourist
lines.zh: 不好意思，我好像迷路了。這附近有地標嗎？
lines.pinyin: bù hǎo yì si, wǒ hǎo xiàng mí lù le. zhè fù jìn yǒu dì biāo ma?
lines.english: Excuse me, I think I'm lost. Are there any landmarks nearby?

lines.speaker: Local
lines.zh: 別急，你想去哪裡？
lines.pinyin: bié jí, nǐ xiǎng qù nǎ lǐ?
lines.english: Don't worry, where do you want to go?

lines.speaker: Tourist
lines.zh: 我想回我的酒店，但我手機沒電了。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng huí wǒ de jiǔ diàn, dàn wǒ shǒu jī méi diàn le.
lines.english: I want to go back to my hotel, but my phone is dead.

lines.speaker: Local
lines.zh: 你的酒店叫什麼名字？
lines.pinyin: nǐ de jiǔ diàn jiào shén me míng zi?
lines.english: What is the name of your hotel?

lines.speaker: Tourist
lines.zh: 叫「四季大酒店」。
lines.pinyin: jiào 'sì jì dà jiǔ diàn'.
lines.english: It's called 'Four Seasons Grand Hotel'.

lines.speaker: Local
lines.zh: 我知道那裡，離這裡有點遠。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zhī dào nà lǐ, lí zhè lǐ yǒu diǎn yuǎn.
lines.english: I know that place, it's a bit far from here.

lines.speaker: Tourist
lines.zh: 糟糕，我很急，我有一場會議要遲到了。
lines.pinyin: zāo gāo, wǒ hěn jí, wǒ yǒu yì chǎng huì yì yào chí dào le.
lines.english: Oh no, I'm in a hurry, I'm going to be late for a meeting.

lines.speaker: Local
lines.zh: 那最好坐計程車，那邊就有一個計程車站。
lines.pinyin: nà zuì hǎo zuò jì chéng chē, nà biān jiù yǒu yí gè jì chéng chē zhàn.
lines.english: Then it's best to take a taxi, there's a taxi stand over there.

lines.speaker: Tourist
lines.zh: 我沒帶現金，計程車可以刷卡嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ méi dài xiàn jīn, jì chéng chē kě yǐ shuā kǎ ma?
lines.english: I didn't bring cash, can the taxi take cards?

lines.speaker: Local
lines.zh: 有些可以，但最好先問司機。
lines.pinyin: yǒu xiē kě yǐ, dàn zuì hǎo xiān wèn sī jī.
lines.english: Some can, but better ask the driver first.

lines.speaker: Tourist
lines.zh: 好的，謝謝。這座城市太大了，真危險。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, xiè xie. zhè zuò chéng shì tài dà le, zhēn wēi xiǎn.
lines.english: Okay, thanks. This city is too big, really dangerous (to get lost).

lines.speaker: Local
lines.zh: 別擔心，安全第一。你需要用地圖嗎？
lines.pinyin: bié dān xīn, ān quán dì yī. nǐ xū yào yòng dì tú ma?
lines.english: Don't worry, safety first. Do you need to use a map?

lines.speaker: Tourist
lines.zh: 不用了，我看見計程車了！
lines.pinyin: bú yòng le, wǒ kàn jiàn jì chéng chē le!
lines.english: No thanks, I see a taxi!

lines.speaker: Local
lines.zh: 好，快去吧。祝你開會順利。
lines.pinyin: hǎo, kuài qù ba. zhù nǐ kāi huì shùn lì.
lines.english: Okay, go quickly. Wish your meeting goes smoothly.

lines.speaker: Tourist
lines.zh: 非常感謝你的幫助！
lines.pinyin: fēi cháng gǎn xiè nǐ de bāng zhù!
lines.english: Thank you very much for your help!

lines.speaker: Local
lines.zh: 不客氣。再見！
lines.pinyin: bú kè qi. zài jiàn!
lines.english: You're welcome. Goodbye!

lines.speaker: Tourist
lines.zh: 再見！
lines.pinyin: zài jiàn!
lines.english: Goodbye!

lines.speaker: Tourist
lines.zh: （Entering taxi）師傅，去四季大酒店，急！
lines.pinyin: (Entering taxi) shī fu, qù sì jì dà jiǔ diàn, jí!
lines.english: (Entering taxi) Driver, Four Seasons Grand Hotel, hurry!

lines.speaker: Driver
lines.zh: 沒問題，繫好安全帶，我們出發。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, jì hǎo ān quán dài, wǒ men chū fā.
lines.english: No problem, buckle your seatbelt, let's go.

lines.speaker: Tourist
lines.zh: 謝謝。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie.
lines.english: Thank you.

kuài dǎ yāoyāojiǔ jiào ___ , zhè lǐ zháo huǒ le!

qǐng bǎ zhè fèn bào àn ___ shōu hǎo.

questions.sentence: 這條路很___，晚上不要一個人走。

qǐng bǎ mén chuāng guān hǎo, bǎo zhèng ___.

questions.question: If you are 'looking for help', you are...

title: Social Media & Tech
description: Learn how to talk about apps, internet usage, and social networking.

text.zh: 現在的人每天花很多時間在社群媒體上。
text.pinyin: xiàn zài de rén měi tiān huā hěn duō shí jiān zài shè qún méi tǐ shàng.
text.english: People nowadays spend a lot of time on social media every day.

text.zh: 我們可以透過網路快速得到各種資訊。
text.pinyin: wǒ men kě yǐ tòu guò wǎng lù kuài sù dé dào gè zhǒng zī xùn.
text.english: We can get all kinds of information quickly through the internet.

text.zh: 雖然科技很方便，但也別忘了和身邊的人多多交流。
text.pinyin: suī rán kē jì hěn fāng biàn, dàn yě bié wàng le hé shēn biān de rén duō duō jiāo liú.
text.english: Although technology is convenient, don't forget to communicate more with the people around you.

comprehension.question: Where do people spend a lot of time every day?
comprehension.questionZh: 人們每天在哪裡花很多時間？

comprehension.question: How can we get information quickly?
comprehension.questionZh: 我們怎麼快速得到資訊？
options: 透過網路 Through the internet

comprehension.question: What should we not forget?
comprehension.questionZh: 我們不應該忘記什麼？
options: 和身邊的人交流 Communicate with people around us

dialogueSections.title: Using Social Media
dialogueSections.scene: Two friends talk about their social media accounts and activities.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你看過我昨天分享的照片嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ kàn guò wǒ zuó tiān fēn xiǎng de zhào piàn ma?
lines.english: Did you see the photo I shared yesterday?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 看過了，我還給你點讚了！
lines.pinyin: kàn guò le, wǒ hái gěi nǐ diǎn zàn le!
lines.english: I saw it, and I even liked it!

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝！那是我在上週末旅遊時拍的。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie! nà shì wǒ zài shàng zhōu mò lǚ yóu shí pāi de.
lines.english: Thanks! I took that while traveling last weekend.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 拍得真美。你現在有很多粉絲吧？
lines.pinyin: pāi de zhēn měi. nǐ xiàn zài yǒu hěn duō fěn sī ba?
lines.english: It was taken beautifully. You must have many followers now?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 還好，大概有一千多個關注者。
lines.pinyin: hái hǎo, dà gài yǒu yì qiān duō gè guān zhù zhě.
lines.english: It's okay, about a thousand followers.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你有沒有看過最新的直播？
lines.pinyin: nǐ yǒu méi yǒu kàn guò zuì xīn de zhí bō?
lines.english: Have you seen the latest live stream?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 沒看過，最近我的網路訊號不太好。
lines.pinyin: méi kàn guò, zuì jìn wǒ de wǎng lù xùn hào bú tài hǎo.
lines.english: No, my internet signal hasn't been good lately.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我也覺得最近網速有點慢。你有沒有留言？
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě jué de zuì jìn wǎng sù yǒu diǎn màn. nǐ yǒu méi yǒu liú yán?
lines.english: I also think the internet speed is a bit slow recently. Did you leave a comment?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我留了幾條言，大家討論得很熱烈。
lines.pinyin: wǒ liú le jǐ tiáo yán, dà jiā tǎo lùn de hěn rè liè.
lines.english: I left a few comments; everyone is discussing it warmly.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 社群媒體真的改變了我們的生活。
lines.pinyin: shè qún méi tǐ zhēn de gǎi biàn le wǒ men de shēng huó.
lines.english: Social media has really changed our lives.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 沒錯，但也要注意隱私設定。
lines.pinyin: méi cuò, dàn yě yào zhù yì yǐn sī shè dìng.
lines.english: True, but we also need to pay attention to privacy settings.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對，我不喜歡把所有帳號都公開。
lines.pinyin: duì, wǒ bù xǐ huan bǎ suǒ yǒu zhàng hào dōu gōng kāi.
lines.english: Right, I don't like keeping all my accounts public.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你有沒有下載那個新的應用程式？
lines.pinyin: nǐ yǒu méi yǒu xià zǎi nà gè xīn de yìng yòng chéng shì?
lines.english: Did you download that new app?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 下載了，功能挺強大的。
lines.pinyin: xià zǎi le, gōng néng tǐng qiáng dà de.
lines.english: I did; the features are quite powerful.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 它可以自動上傳影片，很方便。
lines.pinyin: tā kě yǐ zì dòng shàng chuán yǐng piàn, hěn fāng biàn.
lines.english: It can automatically upload videos; it's very convenient.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 但是通知太多了，我關掉了一些。
lines.pinyin: dàn shì tōng zhī tài duō le, wǒ guān diào le yì xiē.
lines.english: But there are too many notifications; I turned some off.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我也一樣。我不喜歡被打擾。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě yí yàng. wǒ bù xǐ huan bèi dǎ rǎo.
lines.english: Me too. I don't like being disturbed.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 科技讓未來充滿了可能性。
lines.pinyin: kē jì ràng wèi lái chōng mǎn le kě néng xìng.
lines.english: Technology fills the future with possibilities.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是啊，特別是人工智慧的發展。
lines.pinyin: shì a, tè bié shì rén gōng zhì huì de fā zhǎn.
lines.english: Yes, especially the development of AI.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我們走吧，去試試那個新軟體。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men zǒu ba, qù shì shì nà gè xīn ruǎn tǐ.
lines.english: Let's go and try that new software.

dialogueSections.title: Tech Trouble
dialogueSections.scene: A student's computer has a problem, and they ask a tech-savvy friend for help.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我的電腦好像出問題了，打不開。
lines.pinyin: wǒ de diàn nǎo hǎo xiàng chū wèn tí le, dǎ bù kāi.
lines.english: My computer seems to have a problem; I can't open it.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是不是沒電了？檢查過硬體嗎？
lines.pinyin: shì bú shì méi diàn le? jiǎn chá guò yì tǐ ma?
lines.english: Is it out of battery? Have you checked the hardware?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 電是滿的，但螢幕一直是黑的。
lines.pinyin: diàn shì mǎn de, dàn yíng mù yì zhí shì hēi de.
lines.english: The battery is full, but the screen is always black.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 可能是中了病毒。你最近下載過什麼嗎？
lines.pinyin: kě néng shì zhòng le bìng dú. nǐ zuì jìn xià zǎi guò shén me ma?
lines.english: It might have a virus. Have you downloaded anything recently?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我昨天下載了一個免費的軟體。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zuó tiān xià zǎi le yí gè miǎn fèi de ruǎn tǐ.
lines.english: I downloaded a free software yesterday.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 以後別隨便下載，很容易帶病毒。
lines.pinyin: yǐ hòu bié suí biàn xià zǎi, hěn róng yì dài bìng dú.
lines.english: Don't download just anything in the future; it's easy to get viruses.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我知道錯了。你能幫我看看嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ zhī dào cuò le. nǐ néng bāng wǒ kàn kan ma?
lines.english: I know I was wrong. Can you take a look for me?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我試試。先進入安全模式。
lines.pinyin: wǒ shì shi. xiān jìn rù ān quán mó shì.
lines.english: I'll try. First, enter safe mode.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這跟人工智慧有關嗎？
lines.pinyin: zhè gēn rén gōng zhì huì yǒu guān ma?
lines.english: Does this have to do with AI?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 無關，這只是基本的硬體和軟體故障。
lines.pinyin: wú guān, zhè zhǐ shì jī běn de yì tǐ hé ruǎn tǐ gù zhàng.
lines.english: No, this is just a basic hardware and software fault.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我的帳號和密碼都在電腦裡，會丟嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ de zhàng hào hé mì mǎ dōu zài diàn nǎo lǐ, huì diū ma?
lines.english: My accounts and passwords are all in the computer; will I lose them?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 如果不重裝系統，應該沒事。
lines.pinyin: rú guǒ bù chóng zhuāng xì tǒng, yīng gāi méi shì.
lines.english: If we don't reinstall the system, they should be fine.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那太好了。網速好像也影響了修復。
lines.pinyin: nà tài hǎo le. wǎng sù hǎo xiàng yě yǐng xiǎng le xiū fù.
lines.english: That's great. Internet speed also seems to affect the repair.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是的，我們需要穩定的網路訊號。
lines.pinyin: shì de, wǒ men xū yào wěn dìng de wǎng lù xùn hào.
lines.english: Yes, we need a stable internet signal.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你看，螢幕亮了！
lines.pinyin: nǐ kàn, yíng mù liàng le!
lines.english: Look, the screen lit up!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 現在在掃描病毒，需要一點時間。
lines.pinyin: xiàn zài zài sǎo miáo bìng dú, xū yào yì diǎn shí jiān.
lines.english: It's scanning for viruses now; it'll take a little time.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我以後一定會注意隱私和安全。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yǐ hòu yí dìng huì zhù yì yǐn sī hé ān quán.
lines.english: I'll definitely pay attention to privacy and security from now on.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 這就對了。還有別忘了定期備份。
lines.pinyin: zhè jiù duì le. hái yǒu bié wàng le dìng qī bèi fèn.
lines.english: That's right. And don't forget to back up regularly.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝你的幫忙。你真是科技達人。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie nǐ de bāng máng. nǐ zhēn shì kē jì dá rén.
lines.english: Thanks for your help. You really are a tech expert.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 小意思，我們是好朋友。
lines.pinyin: xiǎo yì si, wǒ men shì hǎo péng you.
lines.english: No problem, we're good friends.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 走，我請你喝飲料！
lines.pinyin: zǒu, wǒ qǐng nǐ hē yǐn liào!
lines.english: Let's go, my treat for drinks!

dialogueSections.title: Future of AI
dialogueSections.scene: A conversation about the impact of AI and future technologies.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你對人工智慧的未來有什麼看法？
lines.pinyin: nǐ duì rén gōng zhì huì de wèi lái yǒu shén me kàn fǎ?
lines.english: What are your views on the future of AI?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我覺得它會讓我們的生活變得更智慧。
lines.pinyin: wǒ jué de tā huì ràng wǒ men de shēng huó biàn de gèng zhì huì.
lines.english: I think it will make our lives smarter.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 但也可能帶來一些失業問題。
lines.pinyin: dàn yě kě néng dài lái yì xiē shī yè wèn tí.
lines.english: But it might also bring some unemployment issues.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 沒錯，所以我們需要學習新的科技知識。
lines.pinyin: méi cuò, suǒ yǐ wǒ men xū yào xué xí xīn de kē jì zhī shi.
lines.english: Exactly, so we need to learn new technological knowledge.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 現在很多應用程式都加入了AI功能。
lines.pinyin: xiàn zài hěn duō yìng yòng chéng shì dōu jiā rù le AI gōng néng.
lines.english: Many apps have joined AI features now.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是啊，比如自動翻譯和圖像識別。
lines.pinyin: shì a, bǐ rú zì dòng fān yì hé tú xiàng shí bié.
lines.english: Yes, like auto-translation and image recognition.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你覺得以後機器人會取代人類嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ jué de yǐ hòu jī qì rén huì qǔ dài rén lèi ma?
lines.english: Do you think robots will replace humans in the future?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 在某些領域會，但在創造力方面很難。
lines.pinyin: zài mǒu xiē lǐng yù huì, dàn zài chuàng zào lì fāng miàn hěn nán.
lines.english: In some fields yes, but in terms of creativity it's hard.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 未來的科技發展真的很快。
lines.pinyin: wèi lái de kē jì fā zhǎn zhēn de hěn kuài.
lines.english: Future tech development is really fast.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我們要保持開放的心態，不斷進步。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men yào bǎo chí kāi fàng de xīn tài, bú duàn jìn bù.
lines.english: We need to keep an open mind and constantly improve.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我也打算學習一些軟體開發的知識。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě dǎ suàn xué xí yì xiē ruǎn tǐ kāi fā de zhī shi.
lines.english: I also plan to learn some software development knowledge.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那很有前途。加油！
lines.pinyin: nà hěn yǒu qián tú. jiā yóu!
lines.english: That has a great future. Good luck!

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝！你有什麼想學的？
lines.pinyin: xiè xie! nǐ yǒu shén me xiǎng xué de?
lines.english: Thanks! What do you want to learn?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我想研究一下數據分析。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng yán jiū yí xià shù jù fēn xī.
lines.english: I want to research data analysis.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這也是現在非常熱門的職業。
lines.pinyin: zhè yě shì xiàn zài fēi cháng rè mén de zhí yè.
lines.english: This is also a very popular profession now.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是啊。希望我們都能在未來取得成功。
lines.pinyin: shì a. xī wàng wǒ men dōu néng zài wèi lái qǔ dé chéng gōng.
lines.english: Yes. Hope we can both achieve success in the future.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 一定要的！
lines.pinyin: yí dìng yào de!
lines.english: Definitely!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我們一邊喝咖啡一邊繼續聊吧。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men yì biān hē kā fēi yì biān jì xù liáo ba.
lines.english: Let's continue chatting while drinking coffee.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好主意，走吧。
lines.pinyin: hǎo zhǔ yì, zǒu ba.
lines.english: Good idea, let's go.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 走！
lines.pinyin: zǒu!
lines.english: Let's go!
