title: At Home
description: Learn vocabulary for home objects, housework, and daily home life.

text.zh: 家是我們放鬆心情的最佳場所。
text.pinyin: jiā shì wǒ men fàng sōng xīn qíng de zuì jiā chǎng suǒ.
text.english: Home is the best place for us to relax.

text.zh: 保持家裡的整潔和乾淨，能讓心情更愉快。
text.pinyin: bǎo chí jiā lǐ de zhěng jié hé gān jìng, néng ràng xīn qíng gèng yú kuài.
text.english: Keeping the house tidy and clean can make the mood more pleasant.

text.zh: 和家人或是好鄰居保持良好的關係，生活會更幸福。
text.pinyin: hé jiā rén huò shì hǎo lín jū bǎo chí liáng hǎo de guān xì, shēng huó huì gèng xìng fú.
text.english: Maintaining good relationships with family or good neighbors makes life happier.

comprehension.question: What is the best place to relax?
comprehension.questionZh: 放鬆心情的最佳場所是什麼？

comprehension.question: What can make the mood more pleasant?
comprehension.questionZh: 什麼能讓心情更愉快？
options: 把家裡弄髒 Get the house dirty
保持整潔和乾淨 Stay tidy and clean

comprehension.question: Who should you maintain a good relationship with?
comprehension.questionZh: 你應該和誰保持良好關係？
options: 家人和鄰居 Family and neighbors

dialogueSections.title: Tidying Up
dialogueSections.scene: A family is cleaning and tidying up their home on a weekend morning.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 今天週末，我們把家裡打掃一下吧。
lines.pinyin: jīn tiān zhōu mò, wǒ men bǎ jiā lǐ dǎ sǎo yí xià ba.
lines.english: It's the weekend, let's clean the house.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好啊，客廳確實有點髒了。
lines.pinyin: hǎo a, kè tīng què shí yǒu diǎn zāng le.
lines.english: Sure, the living room is indeed a bit dirty.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你負責擦桌子和整理沙發，我來掃地。
lines.pinyin: nǐ fù zé cā zhuō zi hé zhěng lǐ shā fā, wǒ lái sǎo dì.
lines.english: You're responsible for wiping the table and tidying the sofa, I'll sweep the floor.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 沒問題。臥室也需要整理嗎？
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí. wò shì yě xū yào zhěng lǐ ma?
lines.english: No problem. Does the bedroom need tidying too?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 臥室我一會兒去弄，先弄公共區域。
lines.pinyin: wò shì wǒ yì huì r qù nòng, xiān nòng gōng gòng qū yù.
lines.english: I'll do the bedroom in a while, let's do the common areas first.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 廚房的冰箱也要清理一下，裡面有很多過期食品。
lines.pinyin: chú fáng de bīng xiāng yě yào qīng lǐ yí xià, lǐ miàn yǒu hěn duō guò qī shí pǐn.
lines.english: The fridge in the kitchen needs cleaning too; there's a lot of expired food inside.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 對，順便把垃圾倒了。
lines.pinyin: duì, shùn biàn bǎ lā jī dào le.
lines.english: Right, and take out the trash while you're at it.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 浴室的洗衣機好像有點問題，洗不乾淨。
lines.pinyin: yù shì de xǐ yī jī hǎo xiàng yǒu diǎn wèn tí, xǐ bù gān jìng.
lines.english: The washing machine in the bathroom seems to have a problem; it's not washing clean.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 晚點我找人來修理。我們先把能做的做了。
lines.pinyin: wǎn diǎn wǒ zhǎo rén lái xiū lǐ. wǒ men xiān bǎ néng zuò de zuò le.
lines.english: I'll find someone to repair it later. Let's do what we can first.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好的。你看，這張椅子壞了。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de. nǐ kàn, zhè zhāng yǐ zi huài le.
lines.english: Okay. Look, this chair is broken.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那也是家具的一部分，也要修。
lines.pinyin: nà yě shì jiā jù de yí bù fèn, yě yào xiū.
lines.english: That's also part of the furniture; it needs fixing too.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 打掃完家裡感覺舒服多了。
lines.pinyin: dǎ sǎo wán jiā lǐ gǎn jué shū fu duō le.
lines.english: It feels much more comfortable after cleaning the house.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是啊，環境乾淨了，心情也會好。
lines.pinyin: shì a, huán jìng gān jìng le, xīn qíng yě huì hǎo.
lines.english: Yes, a clean environment makes for a better mood.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我現在去澆花，陽台的花乾了。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiàn zài qù jiāo huā, yáng tái de huā gān le.
lines.english: I'm going to water the flowers now; the flowers on the balcony are dry.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好。等一下我們一起做飯。
lines.pinyin: hǎo. děng yí xià wǒ men yì qǐ zuò fàn.
lines.english: Okay. Let's cook together in a bit.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 今天吃什麼？
lines.pinyin: jīn tiān chī shén me?
lines.english: What are we eating today?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 做你最喜歡吃的紅燒肉。
lines.pinyin: zuò nǐ zuì xǐ huan chī de hóng shāo ròu.
lines.english: I'll make your favorite braised pork.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 太棒了！我來洗碗。
lines.pinyin: tài bàng le! wǒ lái xǐ wǎn.
lines.english: Great! I'll do the dishes.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 合作愉快！
lines.pinyin: hé zuò yú kuài!
lines.english: Happy cooperating!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 加油！
lines.pinyin: jiā yóu!
lines.english: Keep it up!

dialogueSections.title: A New Home
dialogueSections.scene: Friends are visiting a new apartment and discussing furniture and decor.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 歡迎來到我的新家！
lines.pinyin: huān yíng lái dào wǒ de xīn jiā!
lines.english: Welcome to my new home!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 哇，這裡好漂亮！你什麼時候搬家的？
lines.pinyin: wā, zhè lǐ hǎo piào liang! nǐ shén me shí hòu bān jiā de?
lines.english: Wow, this place is beautiful! When did you move?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 上個月剛搬過來。裝修花了很長時間。
lines.pinyin: shàng gè yuè gāng bān guò lái. zhuāng xiū huā le hěn cháng shí jiān.
lines.english: Just moved in last month. The renovation took a long time.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 裝修風格很溫馨，我非常喜歡。
lines.pinyin: zhuāng xiū fēng gé hěn wēn xīn, wǒ fēi cháng xǐ huan.
lines.english: The renovation style is very cozy; I like it a lot.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝。客廳的沙發也是新買的。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie. kè tīng de shā fā yě shì xīn mǎi de.
lines.english: Thanks. The sofa in the living room is also newly bought.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 坐著很舒服。這台電視也很大吧？
lines.pinyin: zuò zhe hěn shū fu. zhè tái diàn shì yě hěn dà ba?
lines.english: It's very comfortable to sit on. This TV is quite big, right?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是六十五寸的。空調也是新裝的。
lines.pinyin: shì liù shí wǔ cùn de. kōng tiáo yě shì xīn zhuāng de.
lines.english: It's 65 inches. The AC is also newly installed.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 廚房很大，適合做飯。
lines.pinyin: chú fáng hěn dà, shì hé zuò fàn.
lines.english: The kitchen is large, suitable for cooking.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 對，我也很喜歡那個大冰箱。
lines.pinyin: duì, wǒ yě hěn xǐ huan nà gè dà bīng xiāng.
lines.english: Yes, I also really like that big fridge.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你的鄰居怎麼樣？
lines.pinyin: nǐ de lín jū zěn me yàng?
lines.english: How are your neighbors?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 他們很安靜，人也很友善。
lines.pinyin: tā men hěn ān jìng, rén yě hěn yǒu shàn.
lines.english: They are very quiet and friendly.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 環境安靜真的很重要。臥室在哪邊？
lines.pinyin: huán jìng ān jìng zhēn de hěn zhòng yào. wò shì zài nǎ biān?
lines.english: A quiet environment is really important. Where's the bedroom?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 在那邊。裡面的家具還沒買齊。
lines.pinyin: zài nà biān. lǐ miàn de jiā jù hái méi mǎi qí.
lines.english: Over there. The furniture inside isn't all bought yet.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 慢慢來，家是需要時間整理的。
lines.pinyin: màn màn lái, jiā shì xū yào shí jiān zhěng lǐ de.
lines.english: Take it slow; a home needs time to be organized.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你說得對。以後常來玩。
lines.pinyin: nǐ shuō de duì. yǐ hòu cháng lái wán.
lines.english: You're right. Come visit often in the future.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 一定。你有什麼推薦的家具店嗎？
lines.pinyin: yí dìng. nǐ yǒu shén me tuī jiàn de jiā jù diàn ma?
lines.english: Definitely. Do you have any recommended furniture stores?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 市中心有一家，款式很多。
lines.pinyin: shì zhōng xīn yǒu yì jiā, kuǎn shì hěn duō.
lines.english: There's one in the city center with many styles.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我也打算換個新床。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě dǎ suàn huàn gè xīn chuáng.
lines.english: I also plan to get a new bed.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我們下週末可以一起去逛逛。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men xià zhōu mò kě yǐ yì qǐ qù guàng guàng.
lines.english: We can go browsing together next weekend.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好主意，再見！
lines.pinyin: hǎo zhǔ yì, zài jiàn!
lines.english: Good idea, goodbye!

dialogueSections.title: Home Improvement
dialogueSections.scene: A conversation about repairing home appliances and maintaining a comfortable home.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 客廳的燈壞了，你能修理嗎？
lines.pinyin: kè tīng de dēng huài le, nǐ néng xiū lǐ ma?
lines.english: The light in the living room is broken; can you fix it?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我看看。可能是燈泡壞了。
lines.pinyin: wǒ kàn kan. kě néng shì dēng pào huài le.
lines.english: Let me see. It might be the bulb.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 家裡的電器總是有問題。
lines.pinyin: jiā lǐ de diàn qì zǒng shì yǒu wèn tí.
lines.english: There are always problems with home appliances.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 正常的，用久了都會壞。
lines.pinyin: zhèng cháng de, yòng jiǔ le dōu huì huài.
lines.english: It's normal; they all break after long use.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 冰箱的聲音也很大，是不是也該修了？
lines.pinyin: bīng xiāng de shēng yīn yě hěn dà, shì bú shì yě gāi xiū le?
lines.english: The fridge is also very noisy; should it be fixed too?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我檢查一下。可能需要清理一下後面的灰塵。
lines.pinyin: wǒ jiǎn chá yí xià. kě néng xū yào qīng lǐ yí xià hòu miàn de huī chén.
lines.english: I'll check. Maybe it needs cleaning of the dust in the back.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝。你真的很擅長做這些。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie. nǐ zhēn de hěn shàn cháng zuò zhè xiē.
lines.english: Thanks. You're really good at doing these things.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我也只是學了一點。整理家務也挺累的。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě zhǐ shì xué le yì diǎn. zhěng lǐ jiā wù yě tǐng lèi de.
lines.english: I've only learned a bit. Doing housework is also quite tiring.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是啊，所以我們要分工合作。
lines.pinyin: shì a, suǒ yǐ wǒ men yào fēn gōng hé zuò.
lines.english: Yes, so we need to divide the work.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我把這張桌子搬到臥室去吧。
lines.pinyin: wǒ bǎ zhè zhāng zhuō zi bān dào wò shì qù ba.
lines.english: I'll move this table to the bedroom.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好，小心點，別碰到家具。
lines.pinyin: hǎo, xiǎo xīn diǎn, bié pèng dào jiā jù.
lines.english: Okay, be careful not to hit the furniture.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 臥室的空間現在大多了。
lines.pinyin: wò shì de kōng jiān xiàn zài dà duō le.
lines.english: The bedroom space is much larger now.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 對，這樣住起來更舒服。
lines.pinyin: duì, zhè yàng zhù qǐ lái gèng shū fu.
lines.english: Right, it's more comfortable to live in like this.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你打算什麼時候買新地毯？
lines.pinyin: nǐ dǎ suàn shén me shí hòu mǎi xīn dì tǎn?
lines.english: When do you plan to buy a new carpet?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 下個月吧。我想選一個溫暖的顏色。
lines.pinyin: xià gè yuè ba. wǒ xiǎng xuǎn yí gè wēn nuǎn de yán sè.
lines.english: Next month maybe. I want to choose a warm color.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 溫馨的家能讓人放鬆。
lines.pinyin: wēn xīn de jiā néng ràng rén fàng sōng.
lines.english: A cozy home helps people relax.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 沒錯。我去倒垃圾了。
lines.pinyin: méi cuò. wǒ qù dào lā jī le.
lines.english: Exactly. I'm going to take out the trash.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好，我來收拾工具。
lines.pinyin: hǎo, wǒ lái shōu shí gōng jù.
lines.english: Okay, I'll pack up the tools.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 辛苦了！
lines.pinyin: xīn kǔ le!
lines.english: Thanks for your hard work!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 不辛苦，為了我們的家。
lines.pinyin: bù xīn kǔ, wèi le wǒ men de jiā.
lines.english: It's not hard, for our home.

questions.question: The room is messy. You need to...
How do you say 'I'm moving house next week'?
The TV is broken. You need to...
If you don't like the noise, you want a place that is...
To make a meal, you go to the...
If the environment is 'cozy', it is...
What do you do with trash?
If your home is very dirty, it is...

questions.sentence: 我們打算把舊的___換成新的。
questions.sentencePinyin: wǒ men dǎ suàn bǎ jiù de ___ huàn chéng xīn de.

questions.sentence: 這間房子剛___完，味道有點重。
questions.sentencePinyin: zhè jiān fáng zi gāng ___ wán, wèi dào yǒu diǎn zhòng.
qǐng bāng wǒ bǎ ___ ná dào wài miàn qù.

questions.sentence: 客廳的___坐起來非常舒服。
questions.sentencePinyin: kè tīng de ___ zuò qǐ lái fēi cháng shū fu.
tā zhèng zài chú fáng lǐ wèi dà jiā ___.

questions.sentence: 我們的___對我們非常友好。

zhè gè wū zi de ___ hěn ān jìng.

questions.sentence: 打掃完畢後，家裡變得非常___。

tiān qì tài rè le, qǐng dǎ kāi ___.
zhè zhāng ___ shì mù tou zuò de.

questions.english: Sitting on the sofa is very comfortable.
I am cooking in the kitchen.
He moved to a new house.
The TV needs to be repaired.
The environment here is very cozy.
Spent a lot of money on renovation.

Which of these is used for keeping food cold?

title: Watching the News
description: Learn to understand news reports and discuss current events.

text.zh: 在數位時代，人們獲取新聞的方式發生了巨大的變化。
text.pinyin: zài shù wèi shí dài, rén men huò qǔ xīn wén de fāng shì fā shēng le jù dà de biàn huà.
text.english: In the digital age, the way people obtain news has undergone a huge change.

text.zh: 除了電視和報紙，社群媒體成為了重要的新聞來源。
text.pinyin: chú le diàn shì hé bào zhǐ, shè qún méi tǐ chéng wéi le zhòng yào de xīn wén lái yuán.
text.english: Besides TV and newspapers, social media has become an important news source.

text.zh: 然而，面對海量的資訊，保持批判性思考變得非常重要。
text.pinyin: rán ér, miàn duì hǎi liàng de zī xùn, bǎo chí pī pàn xìng sī kǎo biàn de fēi cháng zhòng yào.
text.english: However, facing a massive amount of information, maintaining critical thinking has become very important.

comprehension.question: What has happened to the way people get news?
comprehension.questionZh: 人們獲取新聞的方式發生了什麼變化？
options: 變得很慢 Became very slow

comprehension.question: What is an important new source of news?
comprehension.questionZh: 什麼是重要的新聞來源？

comprehension.question: What is important when facing a lot of information?
comprehension.questionZh: 面對海量資訊時什麼很重要？

dialogueSections.title: Discussing the Morning News
dialogueSections.scene: Two roommates are drinking coffee and reading the news headlines.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你看到今天的頭條新聞了嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ kàn dào jīn tiān de tóu tiáo xīn wén le ma?
lines.english: Did you see today's headline news?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 還沒，發生了什麼大事嗎？
lines.pinyin: hái méi, fā shēng le shén me dà shì ma?
lines.english: Not yet, did something big happen?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 國際經濟有重大發展，股市大漲。
lines.pinyin: guó jì jīng jì yǒu zhòng dà fā zhǎn, gǔ shì dà zhǎng.
lines.english: There's a major development in the international economy; the stock market surged.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是嗎？這對我們的生活有影響嗎？
lines.pinyin: shì ma? zhè duì wǒ men de shēng huó yǒu yǐng xiǎng ma?
lines.english: Is that so? Will this affect our lives?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 記者說這可能會降低國內的物價。
lines.pinyin: jì zhě shuō zhè kě néng huì jiàng dī guó nèi de wù jià.
lines.english: The reporter said this might lower domestic prices.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那可是個好消息！我得關注一下。
lines.pinyin: nà kě shì gè hǎo xiāo xi! wǒ děi guān zhù yí xià.
lines.english: That's good news! I need to pay attention to that.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 媒體現在都在報導這件事。
lines.pinyin: méi tǐ xiàn zài dōu zài bào dǎo zhè jiàn shì.
lines.english: The media is reporting on this everywhere now.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有沒有關於天氣預報的消息？
lines.pinyin: yǒu méi yǒu guān yú tiān qì yù bào de xiāo xi?
lines.english: Is there any news about the weather forecast?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 有的，聽說週末會下大雨。
lines.pinyin: yǒu de, tīng shuō zhōu mò huì xià dà yǔ.
lines.english: Yes, I heard it will rain heavily this weekend.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 糟糕，我原本打算去郊遊的。
lines.pinyin: zāo gāo, wǒ yuán běn dǎ suàn qù jiāo yóu de.
lines.english: Oh no, I originally planned to go on an outing.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 新聞裡還有一些社會事件的調查。
lines.pinyin: xīn wén lǐ hái yǒu yì xiē shè huì shì jiàn de diào chá.
lines.english: There are also investigations into some social incidents in the news.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我比較喜歡看體育轉播。
lines.pinyin: wǒ bǐ jiào xǐ huan kàn tǐ yù zhuǎn bō.
lines.english: I prefer watching sports broadcasts.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 今晚有足球比賽的現場直播哦。
lines.pinyin: jīn wǎn yǒu zú qiú bǐ sài de xiàn chǎng zhí bō ó.
lines.english: There's a live broadcast of a soccer match tonight.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 太棒了！我一定準時收看。
lines.pinyin: tài bàng le! wǒ yí dìng zhǔn shí shōu kàn.
lines.english: Great! I'll definitely tune in on time.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 現在獲取資訊真的非常方便。
lines.pinyin: xiàn zài huò qǔ zī xùn zhēn de fēi cháng fāng biàn.
lines.english: It's really convenient to get information now.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對啊，只要手機在手，隨時看新聞。
lines.pinyin: duì a, zhǐ yào shǒu jī zài shǒu, suí shí kàn xīn wén.
lines.english: Right, as long as you have a phone, you can check the news anytime.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 但也得學會辨別消息的真假。
lines.pinyin: dàn yě děi xué huì biàn bié xiāo xi de zhēn jiǎ.
lines.english: But one must also learn to distinguish between true and false news.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 沒錯，假新聞太多了。
lines.pinyin: méi cuò, jiǎ xīn wén tài duō le.
lines.english: Exactly, there's too much fake news.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 所以我們要關注可靠的媒體。
lines.pinyin: suǒ yǐ wǒ men yào guān zhù kě kào de méi tǐ.
lines.english: So we should follow reliable media outlets.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 同意。我們先喝完咖啡吧。
lines.pinyin: tóng yì. wǒ men xiān hē wán kā fēi ba.
lines.english: Agreed. Let's finish our coffee first.

dialogueSections.title: A Political Debate
dialogueSections.scene: Friends are debating a political decision mentioned in the news.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你對政府的新政策有什麼評論？
lines.pinyin: nǐ duì zhèng fǔ de xīn zhèng cè yǒu shén me píng lùn?
lines.english: What comments do you have on the government's new policy?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我持反對意見，我覺得這對小企業不利。
lines.pinyin: wǒ chí fǎn duì yì jiàn, wǒ jué de zhè duì xiǎo qǐ yè bù lì.
lines.english: I hold an opposing view; I think it's disadvantageous for small businesses.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 我倒是挺支持的，這能促進長遠發展。
lines.pinyin: wǒ dào shì tǐng zhī chí de, zhè néng cù jìn cháng yuǎn fā zhǎn.
lines.english: I actually support it; it can promote long-term development.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 新聞報導說，很多民眾在現場抗議。
lines.pinyin: xīn wén bào dǎo shuō, hěn duō mín zhòng zài xiàn chǎng kàng yì.
lines.english: The news report said many people are protesting on-site.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 這說明大家都很關注這個事件。
lines.pinyin: zhè shuō míng dà jiā dōu hěn guān zhù zhè gè shì jiàn.
lines.english: This shows that everyone is paying attention to this event.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 我們需要更多的資訊來證實影響。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men xū yào gèng duō de zī xùn lái zhèng shí yǐng xiǎng.
lines.english: We need more information to verify the impact.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 昨晚的採訪中，官員解釋了初衷。
lines.pinyin: zuó wǎn de cǎi fǎng zhōng, guān yuán jiě shì le chū zhōng.
lines.english: In last night's interview, officials explained the original intention.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 官員的話不一定就是真相。
lines.pinyin: guān yuán de huà bù yí dìng jiù shì zhēn xiàng.
lines.english: What officials say isn't necessarily the truth.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 但也得聽聽各方的聲音嘛。
lines.pinyin: dàn yě děi tīng ting gè fāng de shēng yīn ma.
lines.english: But we have to listen to voices from all sides.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 社會各界都在討論，氛圍很緊張。
lines.pinyin: shè huì gè jiè dōu zài tǎo lùn, fēn wéi hěn jǐn zhāng.
lines.english: All sectors of society are discussing it; the atmosphere is tense.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我看了一些媒體評論，爭議很大。
lines.pinyin: wǒ kàn le yì xiē méi tǐ píng lùn, zhēng yì hěn dà.
lines.english: I read some media commentaries; there's a lot of controversy.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 這就是政治，永遠沒有標準答案。
lines.pinyin: zhè jiù shì zhèng zhì, yǒng yuǎn méi yǒu biāo zhǔn dá àn.
lines.english: That's politics; there are never standard answers.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 希望這次事件能得到妥善解決。
lines.pinyin: xī wàng zhè cì shì jiàn néng dé dào tuǒ shàn jiě jué.
lines.english: I hope this incident can be resolved properly.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我們只能繼續關注後續報導了。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men zhǐ néng jì xù guān zhù hòu xù bào dǎo le.
lines.english: We can only continue to follow follow-up reports.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 對，今晚的新聞應該會更新進展。
lines.pinyin: duì, jīn wǎn de xīn wén yīng gāi huì gēng xīn jìn zhǎn.
lines.english: Right, tonight's news should update the progress.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你們有看最新的國際新聞嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ men yǒu kàn zuì xīn de guó jì xīn wén ma?
lines.english: Have you seen the latest international news?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 看到一點，關於環境保護的。
lines.pinyin: kàn dào yì diǎn, guān yú huán jìng bǎo hù de.
lines.english: Saw a bit, regarding environmental protection.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 那也是現在全球關注的重點。
lines.pinyin: nà yě shì xiàn zài quán qiú guān zhù de zhòng diǎn.
lines.english: That's also a major focus of global attention now.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 沒錯，每個消息都可能影響未來。
lines.pinyin: méi cuò, měi gè xiāo xi dōu kě néng yǐng xiǎng wèi lái.
lines.english: Exactly, every piece of news might affect the future.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 大家還是保持冷靜，客觀分析吧。
lines.pinyin: dà jiā hái shì bǎo chí lěng jìng, kè guān fēn xī ba.
lines.english: Everyone should stay calm and analyze objectively.

dialogueSections.title: Entertainment & Sports Highlights
dialogueSections.scene: A conversation about lighter news topics like movies and athletics.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 別光看政治經濟，娛樂新聞也挺有意思。
lines.pinyin: bié guāng kàn zhèng zhì jīng jì, yú lè xīn wén yě tǐng yǒu yì si.
lines.english: Don't just look at politics and economy; entertainment news is also quite interesting.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 哦？最近有什麼明星的大消息？
lines.pinyin: ó? zuì jìn yǒu shén me míng xīng de dà xiāo xi?
lines.english: Oh? What big news is there about celebrities recently?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 聽說某位有名演員要來我們城市拍戲。
lines.pinyin: tīng shuō mǒu wèi yǒu míng yǎn yuán yào lái wǒ men chéng shì pāi xì.
lines.english: I heard a famous actor is coming to our city to film.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 真的嗎？那現場一定會有很多粉絲。
lines.pinyin: zhēn de ma? nà xiàn chǎng yí dìng huì yǒu hěn duō fěn sī.
lines.english: Really? Then there will definitely be many fans on-site.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 媒體已經開始轉播籌備情況了。
lines.pinyin: méi tǐ yǐ jīng kāi shǐ zhuǎn bō chóu bèi qíng kuàng le.
lines.english: The media has already started broadcasting the preparations.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我也得去現場看看能不能遇到他。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě děi qù xiàn chǎng kàn kan néng bù néng yù dào tā.
lines.english: I also have to go to the site to see if I can meet him.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你還關注體育新聞嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ hái guān zhù tǐ yù xīn wén ma?
lines.english: Do you still follow sports news?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 當然！我剛看完昨晚的比賽精華。
lines.pinyin: dāng rán! wǒ gāng kàn wán zuó wǎn de bǐ sài jīng huá.
lines.english: Of course! I just finished watching the highlights of last night's game.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 哪隊贏了？我沒看直播。
lines.pinyin: nǎ duì yíng le? wǒ méi kàn zhí bō.
lines.english: Which team won? I didn't watch the live stream.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 主隊在最後一分鐘反超，非常精彩！
lines.pinyin: zhǔ duì zài zuì hòu yì fēn zhōng fǎn chāo, fēi cháng jīng cǎi!
lines.english: The home team made a comeback in the last minute; it was brilliant!

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那真是不容易。記者有採訪隊長嗎？
lines.pinyin: nà zhēn shì bù róng yì. jì zhě yǒu cǎi fǎng duì zhǎng ma?
lines.english: That wasn't easy. Did the reporter interview the captain?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 採訪了，隊長說這是團隊合作的結果。
lines.pinyin: cǎi fǎng le, duì zhǎng shuō zhè shì tuán duì hé zuò de jié guǒ.
lines.english: Yes, the captain said it was a result of teamwork.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這種正能量的消息我喜歡看。
lines.pinyin: zhè zhǒng zhèng néng liàng de xiāo xi wǒ xǐ huan kàn.
lines.english: I like reading this kind of positive news.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 比看那些複雜的政治調查輕鬆多了。
lines.pinyin: bǐ kàn nà xiē fù zá de zhèng zhì diào chá qīng sōng duō le.
lines.english: It's much more relaxing than looking at those complex political investigations.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是啊，生活中需要一些娛樂。
lines.pinyin: shì a, shēng huó zhōng xū yào yì xiē yú lè.
lines.english: True, life needs some entertainment.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對了，最新的電影評論你也看看吧。
lines.pinyin: duì le, zuì xīn de diàn yǐng píng lùn nǐ yě kàn kan ba.
lines.english: By the way, you should also look at the latest movie reviews.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好啊，週末我們一起去電影院？
lines.pinyin: hǎo a, zhōu mò wǒ men yì qǐ qù diàn yǐng yuàn?
lines.english: Sure, shall we go to the cinema together this weekend?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 沒問題，只要天氣預報說不下雨就行。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, zhǐ yào tiān qì yù bào shuō bù xià yǔ jiù xíng.
lines.english: No problem, as long as the weather forecast says it won't rain.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那我們就這麼決定了。
lines.pinyin: nà wǒ men jiù zhè me jué dìng le.
lines.english: Then we've decided on that.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好，保持聯絡！
lines.pinyin: hǎo, bǎo chí lián luò!
lines.english: Good, keep in touch!

questions.question: If you are 'against' a move, you are...

title: Business Meetings
description: Learn professional language for chairing and participating in meetings.

text.zh: 一個成功的會議需要明確的議程和高效的主持。
text.pinyin: yí gè chéng gōng de huì yì xū yào míng què de yì chéng hé gāo xiào de zhǔ chí.
text.english: A successful meeting requires a clear agenda and efficient chairing.

text.zh: 每位參與者都應該有機會發言，並尊重不同的意見。
text.pinyin: měi wèi cān yù zhě dōu yīng gāi yǒu jī huì fā yán, bìng zūn zhòng bù tóng de yì jiàn.
text.english: Every participant should have the opportunity to speak and respect different opinions.

text.zh: 會議後的會議記錄能確保決策得到執行，避免誤解。
text.pinyin: huì yì hòu de huì yì jì lù néng què bǎo jué cè dé dào zhí xíng, bì miǎn wù jiě.
text.english: Meeting minutes after the meeting ensure that decisions are implemented and avoid misunderstandings.

comprehension.question: What does a successful meeting need?
comprehension.questionZh: 一個成功的會議需要什麼？
options: 明確議程和高效主持 Clear agenda and efficient chairing
很長的時間 Very long time

comprehension.question: What should participants do during a meeting?
comprehension.questionZh: 參與者在會議中應該做什麼？
options: 發言並尊重不同意見 Speak and respect opinions

comprehension.question: What is the function of meeting minutes?
comprehension.questionZh: 會議記錄的功能是什麼？
options: 用來畫畫 Used for drawing
確保決策執行並避免誤解 Ensure execution and avoid misunderstanding

dialogueSections.title: Starting the Meeting
dialogueSections.scene: A project manager opens a business meeting and introduces the agenda.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 大家早上好！感謝大家準時參加今天的會議。
lines.pinyin: dà jiā zǎo shang hǎo! gǎn xiè dà jiā zhǔn shí cān jiā jīn tiān de huì yì.
lines.english: Good morning everyone! Thank you all for joining today's meeting on time.

lines.speaker: Colleague A
lines.zh: 早安。今天的議程是什麼？
lines.pinyin: zǎo ān. jīn tiān de yì chéng shì shén me?
lines.english: Good morning. What's the agenda for today?

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 我們今天要討論新產品的市場策略和預算。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men jīn tiān yào tǎo lùn xīn chǎn pǐn de shì chǎng cè lüè hé yù suàn.
lines.english: We're going to discuss the market strategy and budget for the new product today.

lines.speaker: Colleague B
lines.zh: 我也準備了一份銷售報告，希望能得到大家的建議。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě zhǔn bèi le yí fèn xiāo shòu bào gào, xī wàng néng dé dào dà jiā de jiàn yì.
lines.english: I've also prepared a sales report and hope to get everyone's suggestions.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 好的。我們的目標是今年提升百分之二十的利潤。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de. wǒ men de mù biāo shì jīn nián tí shēng bǎi fēn zhī èr shí de lì rùn.
lines.english: Good. Our goal is to increase profit by 20% this year.

lines.speaker: Colleague A
lines.zh: 這是一個很大的挑戰，但也是一個機會。
lines.pinyin: zhè shì yí gè hěn dà de tiǎo zhàn, dàn yě shì yí gè jī huì.
lines.english: This is a big challenge, but also an opportunity.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 沒錯，所以我們需要加強團隊合作。
lines.pinyin: méi cuò, suǒ yǐ wǒ men xū yào jiā qiáng tuán duì hé zuò.
lines.english: Exactly, so we need to strengthen teamwork.

lines.speaker: Colleague B
lines.zh: 競爭對手最近也推出了類似的產品。
lines.pinyin: jìng zhēng duì shǒu zuì jìn yě tuī chū le lèi sì de chǎn pǐn.
lines.english: Our competitors have also launched similar products recently.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 這就是為什麼我們要進行專業的展示和提案。
lines.pinyin: zhè jiù shì wèi shén me wǒ men yào jìn xíng zhuān yè de zhǎn shì hé tí àn.
lines.english: That's why we need to have a professional presentation and proposal.

lines.speaker: Colleague A
lines.zh: 會議室的投影機準備好了嗎？
lines.pinyin: huì yì shì de tóu yǐng jī zhǔn bèi hǎo le ma?
lines.english: Is the projector in the meeting room ready?

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 準備好了。我們現在開始第一項議程。
lines.pinyin: zhǔn bèi hǎo le. wǒ men xiàn zài kāi shǐ dì yī xiàng yì chéng.
lines.english: It's ready. Let's start the first item on the agenda.

lines.speaker: Colleague B
lines.zh: 大家對成本控制有什麼反饋？
lines.pinyin: dà jiā duì chéng běn kòng zhì yǒu shén me fǎn kuì?
lines.english: Does anyone have feedback on cost control?

lines.speaker: Colleague A
lines.zh: 我覺得我們需要重新評估預算分配。
lines.pinyin: wǒ jué de wǒ men xū yào chóng xīn píng gū yù suàn fēn pèi.
lines.english: I think we need to re-evaluate the budget allocation.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 好主意，我們需要提高決策的效率。
lines.pinyin: hǎo zhǔ yì, wǒ men xū yào tí gāo jué cè de xiào lǜ.
lines.english: Good idea; we need to improve decision-making efficiency.

lines.speaker: Colleague B
lines.zh: 希望能盡快達成共識。
lines.pinyin: xī wàng néng jǐn kuài dá chéng gòng shí.
lines.english: I hope we can reach a consensus as soon as possible.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 我們會的。接下來請看產品展示。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men huì de. jiē xià lái qǐng kàn chǎn pǐn zhǎn shì.
lines.english: We will. Next, please look at the product presentation.

lines.speaker: Colleague A
lines.zh: 這個功能看起來很吸引人。
lines.pinyin: zhè gè gōng néng kàn qǐ lái hěn xī yǐn rén.
lines.english: This feature looks very attractive.

lines.speaker: Colleague B
lines.zh: 對，應該能在市場上取得成功。
lines.pinyin: duì, yīng gāi néng zài shì chǎng shàng qǔ dé chéng gōng.
lines.english: Right; it should achieve success in the market.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 很好。讓我們繼續討論下一個話題。
lines.pinyin: hěn hǎo. ràng wǒ men jì xù tǎo lùn xià yí gè huà tí.
lines.english: Very good. Let's continue discussing the next topic.

lines.speaker: Colleague A
lines.zh: 好的，我已經準備好記錄了。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, wǒ yǐ jīng zhǔn bèi hǎo jì lù le.
lines.english: Okay, I'm ready to take notes.

dialogueSections.title: Negotiating a Deal
dialogueSections.scene: A business owner is negotiating a contract with a potential partner.

lines.speaker: Owner
lines.zh: 感謝您抽出時間與我進行談判。
lines.pinyin: gǎn xiè nín chōu chū shí jiān yǔ wǒ jìn xíng tán pàn.
lines.english: Thank you for taking the time to negotiate with me.

lines.speaker: Partner
lines.zh: 客氣了，我對貴公司的產品非常感興趣。
lines.pinyin: kè qi le, wǒ duì guì gōng sī de chǎn pǐn fēi cháng gǎn xìng qù.
lines.english: You're welcome; I'm very interested in your company's products.

lines.speaker: Owner
lines.zh: 我們希望能建立長期的合作夥伴關係。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men xī wàng néng jiàn lì cháng qī de hé zuò huǒ bàn guān xì.
lines.english: We hope to establish a long-term partnership.

lines.speaker: Partner
lines.zh: 這也是我們的想法。但我們需要討論一下價格。
lines.pinyin: zhè yě shì wǒ men de xiǎng fǎ. dàn wǒ men xū yào tǎo lùn yí xià jià gé.
lines.english: That's our thought too. But we need to discuss the price.

lines.speaker: Owner
lines.zh: 目前的定價已經考慮了研發成本。
lines.pinyin: mù qián de dìng jià yǐ jīng kǎo lǜ le yán fā chéng běn.
lines.english: The current pricing already considers R&D costs.

lines.speaker: Partner
lines.zh: 如果您能再降百分之五，我們就可以簽署協議。
lines.pinyin: rú guǒ nín néng zài jiàng bǎi fēn zhī wǔ, wǒ men jiù kě yǐ qiān shǔ xié yì.
lines.english: If you can lower it by another 5%, we can sign the agreement.

lines.speaker: Owner
lines.zh: 百分之五有點多，百分之三怎麼樣？
lines.pinyin: bǎi fēn zhī wǔ yǒu diǎn duō, bǎi fēn zhī sān zěn me yàng?
lines.english: 5% is a bit much; how about 3%?

lines.speaker: Partner
lines.zh: 成交！我們也要保證一定的銷售額。
lines.pinyin: chéng jiāo! wǒ men yě yào bǎo zhèng yí dìng de xiāo shòu é.
lines.english: Deal! We also need to guarantee a certain sales volume.

lines.speaker: Owner
lines.zh: 太好了。這是我們的正式合同草案。
lines.pinyin: tài hǎo le. zhè shì wǒ men de zhèng shì hé tong cǎo àn.
lines.english: Great. Here is our formal draft contract.

lines.speaker: Partner
lines.zh: 我需要帶回去給我們的律師看。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xū yào dài huí qù gěi wǒ men de lǜ shī kàn.
lines.english: I need to take it back for our lawyer to look at.

lines.speaker: Owner
lines.zh: 沒問題。我們希望能盡快簽署。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí. wǒ men xī wàng néng jǐn kuài qiān shǔ.
lines.english: No problem. We hope to sign as soon as possible.

lines.speaker: Partner
lines.zh: 只要法律條款沒問題，下週就可以簽。
lines.pinyin: zhǐ yào fǎ lǜ tiáo kuǎn méi wèn tí, xià zhōu jiù kě yǐ qiān.
lines.english: As long as the legal terms are fine, we can sign next week.

lines.speaker: Owner
lines.zh: 這是一個雙贏的合作。
lines.pinyin: zhè shì yí gè shuāng yíng de hé zuò.
lines.english: This is a win-win cooperation.

lines.speaker: Partner
lines.zh: 是的。這將幫助我們擴大市場。
lines.pinyin: shì de. zhè jiāng bāng zhù wǒ men kuò dà shì chǎng.
lines.english: Yes. This will help us expand the market.

lines.speaker: Owner
lines.zh: 我們也會提供最好的售後服務。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men yě huì tí gōng zuì hǎo de shòu hòu fú wù.
lines.english: We will also provide the best after-sales service.

lines.speaker: Partner
lines.zh: 這點對我們很重要。
lines.pinyin: zhè diǎn duì wǒ men hěn zhòng yào.
lines.english: This point is very important to us.

lines.speaker: Owner
lines.zh: 合作愉快！
lines.pinyin: hé zuò yú kuài!
lines.english: Happy cooperating!

lines.speaker: Partner
lines.zh: 合作愉快！我們走吧，一起去吃午餐。
lines.pinyin: hé zuò yú kuài! wǒ men zǒu ba, yì qǐ qù chī wǔ cān.
lines.english: Happy cooperating! Let's go and have lunch together.

lines.speaker: Owner
lines.zh: 好啊，我請客慶祝一下。
lines.pinyin: hǎo a, wǒ qǐng kè qìng zhù yí xià.
lines.english: Sure, my treat to celebrate a bit.

lines.speaker: Partner
lines.zh: 那我就不客氣了。
lines.pinyin: nà wǒ jiù bù kè qi le.
lines.english: Then I won't be polite.

dialogueSections.title: Meeting Feedback
dialogueSections.scene: After a meeting, team members discuss the outcomes and individual tasks.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 大家對剛才的會議有什麼看法？
lines.pinyin: dà jiā duì gāng cái de huì yì yǒu shén me kàn fǎ?
lines.english: What are your views on the meeting we just had?

lines.speaker: Colleague A
lines.zh: 我覺得會議效率很高，達成了解決方案。
lines.pinyin: wǒ jué de huì yì xiào lǜ hěn gāo, dá chéng le jiě jué fāng àn.
lines.english: I think the meeting was very efficient; we reached a solution.

lines.speaker: Colleague B
lines.zh: 但我對預算分配還有一些疑慮。
lines.pinyin: dàn wǒ duì yù suàn fēn pèi hái yǒu yì xiē yí lǜ.
lines.english: But I still have some doubts about the budget allocation.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 請說，我們需要具體的反饋。
lines.pinyin: qǐng shuō, wǒ men xū yào jù tǐ de fǎn kuì.
lines.english: Please go ahead; we need specific feedback.

lines.speaker: Colleague B
lines.zh: 市場推廣的經費似乎不夠。
lines.pinyin: shì chǎng tuī guǎng de jīng fèi sì hū bú gòu.
lines.english: The funds for marketing promotion seem insufficient.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 我會考慮你的建議，看看能不能調整。
lines.pinyin: wǒ huì kǎo lǜ nǐ de jiàn yì, kàn kan néng bù néng tiáo zhěng.
lines.english: I'll consider your suggestion and see if we can adjust.

lines.speaker: Colleague A
lines.zh: 我們需要儘快把報告發給客戶。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men xū yào jǐn kuài bǎ bào gào fā gěi kè hù.
lines.english: We need to send the report to the customer as soon as possible.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 好的，老張，你負責整理會議記錄。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, lǎo zhāng, nǐ fù zé zhěng lǐ huì yì jì lù.
lines.english: Okay, Old Zhang, you're responsible for organizing the meeting minutes.

lines.speaker: Colleague B
lines.zh: 沒問題，我下午三點前完成。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, wǒ xià wǔ sān diǎn qián wán chéng.
lines.english: No problem, I'll finish before 3 PM.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 小王，你跟進一下夥伴公司的進展。
lines.pinyin: xiǎo wáng, nǐ gēn jìn yí xià huǒ bàn gōng sī de jìn zhǎn.
lines.english: Little Wang, follow up on the progress of the partner company.

lines.speaker: Colleague A
lines.zh: 我已經在聯繫他們了。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yǐ jīng zài lián xì tā men le.
lines.english: I'm already in contact with them.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 專業的跟進是成功的關鍵。
lines.pinyin: zhuān yè de gēn jìn shì chéng gōng de guān jiàn.
lines.english: Professional follow-up is the key to success.

lines.speaker: Colleague B
lines.zh: 我們也得關注競爭對手的動態。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men yě děi guān zhù jìng zhēng duì shǒu de dòng tài.
lines.english: We also have to pay attention to our competitors' movements.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 沒錯，這是一場長期的戰鬥。
lines.pinyin: méi cuò, zhè shì yì chǎng cháng qī de zhàn dòu.
lines.english: Exactly, this is a long-term battle.

lines.speaker: Colleague A
lines.zh: 大家加油，我相信我們能做到。
lines.pinyin: dà jiā jiā yóu, wǒ xiāng xìn wǒ men néng zuò dào.
lines.english: Keep it up everyone; I believe we can do it.

lines.speaker: Colleague B
lines.zh: 沒錯，團隊的力量是強大的。
lines.pinyin: méi cuò, tuán duì de lì liàng shì qiáng dà de.
lines.english: Right, the power of a team is strong.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 好了，散會吧。大家回辦公室工作。
lines.pinyin: hǎo le, sàn huì ba. dà jiā huí bàn gōng shì gōng zuò.
lines.english: Alright, meeting adjourned. Everyone head back to the office to work.

lines.speaker: Colleague A
lines.zh: 經理再見。
lines.pinyin: jīng lǐ zài jiàn.
lines.english: Goodbye, Manager.

lines.speaker: Colleague B
lines.zh: 再見。
lines.pinyin: zài jiàn.
lines.english: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Manager
lines.zh: 加油，大家辛苦了。
lines.pinyin: jiā yóu, dà jiā xīn kǔ le.
lines.english: Keep it up; thanks for your hard work, everyone.

title: Cultural Differences
description: Learn to discuss cultural habits, taboos, and traditions.

text.zh: 全球化讓不同文化的人有更多交流的機會。
text.pinyin: quán qiú huà ràng bù tóng wén huà de rén yǒu gèng duō jiāo liú de jī huì.
text.english: Globalization gives people of different cultures more opportunities to communicate.

text.zh: 尊重各地的風俗習慣，是進行有效跨文化交流的基礎。
text.pinyin: zūn zhòng gè dì de fēng sú xí guàn, shì jìn xíng yǒu xiào kuà wén huà jiāo liú de jī chǔ.
text.english: Respecting local customs and habits is the basis for effective cross-cultural communication.

text.zh: 我們可以透過學習語言，更深入地了解一種文化的價值觀。
text.pinyin: wǒ men kě yǐ tòu guò xué xí yǔ yán, gèng shēn rù de liǎo jiě yì zhǒng wén huà de jià zhí guān.
text.english: We can gain a deeper understanding of a culture's values through language learning.

comprehension.question: What has globalization provided?
comprehension.questionZh: 全球化提供了什麼？
options: 更多交流機會 More communication opportunities

comprehension.question: What is the basis for effective cross-cultural communication?
comprehension.questionZh: 有效跨文化交流的基礎是什麼？
options: 尊重各地的風俗習慣 Respecting local customs
說同樣的語言 Speaking same language

comprehension.question: How can we understand a culture's values more deeply?
comprehension.questionZh: 如何更深入了解一種文化的價值觀？

dialogueSections.title: Sharing Traditions
dialogueSections.scene: A student from abroad and a local student discuss their traditional festivals.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你們國家最重要的節日是什麼？
lines.pinyin: nǐ men guó jiā zuì zhòng yào de jié rì shì shén me?
lines.english: What's the most important festival in your country?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是春節，我們有很多獨特的風俗。
lines.pinyin: shì chūn jié, wǒ men yǒu hěn duō dú tè de fēng sú.
lines.english: It's the Spring Festival; we have many unique customs.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 文化差異真的很有趣。我們那邊是過聖誕節。
lines.pinyin: wén huà chā yì zhēn de hěn yǒu qù. wǒ men nà biān shì guò shèng dàn jié.
lines.english: Cultural differences are really interesting. We celebrate Christmas over there.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 春節時，全家人會聚在一起吃年夜飯。
lines.pinyin: chūn jié shí, quán jiā rén huì jù zài yì qǐ chī nián yè fàn.
lines.english: During the Spring Festival, the whole family gathers to have New Year's Eve dinner.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這跟我們的習慣很像，我們也會全家團聚。
lines.pinyin: zhè gēn wǒ men de xí guàn hěn xiàng, wǒ men yě huì quán jiā tuán jù.
lines.english: This is very similar to our habit; we also have family reunions.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 雖然節日不同，但核心價值觀是一樣的。
lines.pinyin: suī rán jié rì bù tóng, dàn hé xīn jià zhí guān shì yí yàng de.
lines.english: Although the festivals are different, the core values are the same.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 對，就是尊重傳統和愛護家人。
lines.pinyin: duì, jiù shì zūn zhòng chuán tǒng hé ài hù jiā rén.
lines.english: Right, which is respecting tradition and loving family.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 在交流中，我發現各國的禮儀也有差別。
lines.pinyin: zài jiāo liú zhōng, wǒ fā xiàn gè guó de lǐ yí yě yǒu chā bié.
lines.english: Through communication, I've found that etiquette in various countries also differs.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是的，有時候如果不了解，會產生誤會。
lines.pinyin: shì de, yǒu shí hòu rú guǒ bù liǎo jiě, huì chǎn shēng wù huì.
lines.english: Yes, sometimes if you don't understand, misunderstandings will arise.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 所以我們要保持開放的心態去理解。
lines.pinyin: suǒ yǐ wǒ men yào bǎo chí kāi fàng de xīn tài qù lǐ jiě.
lines.english: So we should maintain an open mind to understand.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你剛來這裡時，適應得快嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ gāng lái zhè lǐ shí, shì yìng de kuài ma?
lines.english: When you first came here, did you adapt quickly?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 還好，當地人都很友善，願意幫我。
lines.pinyin: hái hǎo, dāng dì rén dōu hěn yǒu shàn, yuàn yì bāng wǒ.
lines.english: It was okay; local people are very friendly and willing to help me.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 多樣性讓世界變得更精彩。
lines.pinyin: duō yàng xìng ràng shì jiè biàn de gèng jīng cǎi.
lines.english: Diversity makes the world more wonderful.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 沒錯。我很享受這種文化的融合。
lines.pinyin: méi cuò. wǒ hěn xiǎng shòu zhè zhǒng wén huà de róng hé.
lines.english: Exactly. I really enjoy this fusion of cultures.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你有沒有遇到什麼有趣的禁忌？
lines.pinyin: nǐ yǒu méi yǒu yù dào shén me yǒu qù de jìn jì?
lines.english: Have you encountered any interesting taboos?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有一些，比如吃飯時筷子不能插在米飯上。
lines.pinyin: yǒu yì xiē, bǐ rú chī fàn shí kuài zi bù néng chā zài mǐ fàn shàng.
lines.english: There are some, like not sticking chopsticks into rice while eating.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 哦！我記住了。這就是當地的禮貌。
lines.pinyin: ó! wǒ jì zhù le. zhè jiù shì dāng dì de lǐ mào.
lines.english: Oh! I've noted that. That's local politeness.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 謝謝你的包容和好奇心。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie nǐ de bāo róng hé hào qí xīn.
lines.english: Thank you for your tolerance and curiosity.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我們以後多交流，互相學習。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men yǐ hòu duō jiāo liú, hù xiāng xué xí.
lines.english: Let's communicate more in the future and learn from each other.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 一定。探索不同文化真的很棒。
lines.pinyin: yí dìng. tàn suǒ bù tóng wén huà zhēn de hěn bàng.
lines.english: Definitely. Exploring different cultures is really great.

dialogueSections.title: A Cultural Misunderstanding
dialogueSections.scene: Two colleagues discuss a small misunderstanding caused by different social norms.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 抱歉，昨天開會我好像讓你誤會了。
lines.pinyin: bào qiàn, zuó tiān kāi huì wǒ hǎo xiàng ràng nǐ wù huì le.
lines.english: Sorry, I seem to have caused a misunderstanding during yesterday's meeting.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 沒關係，我知道那是因為文化差異。
lines.pinyin: méi guān xi, wǒ zhī dào nà shì yīn wèi wén huà chā yì.
lines.english: It's okay; I know that was because of cultural differences.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 在我們國家，直接表達意見是很平常的。
lines.pinyin: zài wǒ men guó jiā, zhí jiē biǎo dá yì jiàn shì hěn píng cháng de.
lines.english: In our country, expressing opinions directly is very common.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 在我們這裡，我們會更含蓄一些，要注意禮儀。
lines.pinyin: zài wǒ men zhè lǐ, wǒ men huì gèng hán xù yì xiē, yào zhù yì lǐ yí.
lines.english: Over here, we are a bit more reserved and pay attention to etiquette.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我現在理解了，謝謝你的解釋。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiàn zài lǐ jiě le, xiè xie nǐ de jiě shì.
lines.english: I understand now; thanks for your explanation.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 互相尊重對方的背景很重要。
lines.pinyin: hù xiāng zūn zhòng duì fāng de bèi jǐng hěn zhòng yào.
lines.english: It's important to respect each other's backgrounds.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 對，我也在努力適應這裡的生活方式。
lines.pinyin: duì, wǒ yě zài nǔ lì shì yìng zhè lǐ de shēng huó fāng shì.
lines.english: Right, I'm also trying hard to adapt to the lifestyle here.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 這裡的飲食習慣你也習慣了嗎？
lines.pinyin: zhè lǐ de yǐn shí xí guàn nǐ yě xí guàn le ma?
lines.english: Have you gotten used to the eating habits here too?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 還在嘗試，有些東西太辣了。
lines.pinyin: hái zài cháng shì, yǒu xiē dōng xi tài là le.
lines.english: Still trying; some things are too spicy.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 慢慢來，每種文化都有它獨特的地方。
lines.pinyin: màn màn lái, měi zhǒng wén huà dōu yǒu tā dú tè de dì fāng.
lines.english: Take it slow; every culture has its unique aspects.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我對這裡的傳統節日也很感興趣。
lines.pinyin: wǒ duì zhè lǐ de chuán tǒng jié rì yě hěn gǎn xìng qù.
lines.english: I'm also very interested in the traditional festivals here.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 下次有節日時，我帶你去體驗。
lines.pinyin: xià cì yǒu jié rì shí, wǒ dài nǐ qù tǐ yàn.
lines.english: When there's a festival next time, I'll take you to experience it.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 太好了，我非常期待。
lines.pinyin: tài hǎo le, wǒ fēi cháng qī dài.
lines.english: Great, I'm really looking forward to it.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 這就是文化交流的魅力。
lines.pinyin: zhè jiù shì wén huà jiāo liú de mèi lì.
lines.english: That's the charm of cultural exchange.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我們應該消除偏見，更多地溝通。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men yīng gāi xiāo chú piān jiàn, gèng duō de gōu tōng.
lines.english: We should eliminate prejudice and communicate more.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 完全同意。世界需要更多的包容。
lines.pinyin: wán quán tóng yì. shì jiè xū yào gèng duō de bāo róng.
lines.english: Completely agree. The world needs more tolerance.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 很高興能有你這樣的同事。
lines.pinyin: hěn gāo xìng néng yǒu nǐ zhè yàng de tóng shì.
lines.english: I'm very happy to have a colleague like you.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我也是。我們一起為了團隊的和諧努力吧。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě shì. wǒ men yì qǐ wèi le tuán duì de hé xié nǔ lì ba.
lines.english: Me too. Let's work together for the harmony of the team.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好，加油！
lines.pinyin: hǎo, jiā yóu!
lines.english: Okay, keep it up!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 加油！
lines.pinyin: jiā yóu!
lines.english: Keep it up!

dialogueSections.title: Global Perspective
dialogueSections.scene: A group of international friends discuss the impact of globalization on their cultures.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 全球化讓我們的文化越來越融合了。
lines.pinyin: quán qiú huà ràng wǒ men de wén huà yuè lái yuè róng hé le.
lines.english: Globalization is making our cultures more and more fused.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是啊，現在在世界各地都能吃到各國美食。
lines.pinyin: shì a, xiàn zài zài shì jiè gè dì dōu néng chī dào gè guó měi shí.
lines.english: Yes, you can eat international cuisine all over the world now.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 但我也擔心這會讓我們失去獨特的傳統。
lines.pinyin: dàn wǒ yě dān xīn zhè huì ràng wǒ men shī qù dú tè de chuán tǒng.
lines.english: But I also worry this will make us lose unique traditions.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這就需要我們在發展中保護好風俗。
lines.pinyin: zhè jiù xū yào wǒ men zài fā zhǎn zhōng bǎo hù hǎo fēng sú.
lines.english: This requires us to protect our customs while developing.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 尊重不同背景的價值觀非常重要。
lines.pinyin: zūn zhòng bù tóng bèi jǐng de jià zhí guān fēi cháng zhòng yào.
lines.english: Respecting values from different backgrounds is very important.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 我發現年輕一代對外國文化更開放。
lines.pinyin: wǒ fā xiàn nián qīng yí dài duì wài guó wén huà gèng kāi fàng.
lines.english: I've found the younger generation is more open to foreign cultures.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這是一件好事，能促進世界的和諧。
lines.pinyin: zhè shì yí jiàn hǎo shì, néng cù jìn shì jiè de hé xié.
lines.english: That's a good thing; it can promote world harmony.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你們覺得信仰對文化的影響大嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ men jué de xìn yǎng duì wén huà de yǐng xiǎng dà ma?
lines.english: Do you think belief has a big impact on culture?

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 非常大，它決定了很多人的習慣和生活方式。
lines.pinyin: fēi cháng dà, tā jué dìng le hěn duō rén de xí guàn hé shēng huó fāng shì.
lines.english: Very much so; it determines many people's habits and lifestyles.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 在交流中展現禮貌，是跨文化溝通的第一步。
lines.pinyin: zài jiāo liú zhōng zhǎn xiàn lǐ mào, shì kuà wén huà gōu tōng de dì yī bù.
lines.english: Showing politeness during communication is the first step in cross-cultural communication.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對，理解萬歲！
lines.pinyin: duì, lǐ jiě wàn suì!
lines.english: Right, long live understanding!

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 我有時候對某些國家的禁忌還是很感興趣。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yǒu shí hòu duì mǒu xiē guó jiā de jìn jì hái shì hěn gǎn xìng qù.
lines.english: I'm still very interested in taboos of certain countries sometimes.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好奇心能帶領我們去探索未知的世界。
lines.pinyin: hào qí xīn néng dài lǐng wǒ men qù tàn suǒ wèi zhī de shì jiè.
lines.english: Curiosity can lead us to explore the unknown world.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 別讓偏見阻礙了我們交朋友。
lines.pinyin: bié ràng piān jiàn zǔ ài le wǒ men jiāo péng you.
lines.english: Don't let prejudice hinder us from making friends.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 說得好。我們應該擁抱多樣性。
lines.pinyin: shuō de hǎo. wǒ men yīng gāi yōng bào duō yàng xìng.
lines.english: Well said. We should embrace diversity.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 看看這座城市的當地人，他們也適應得很好。
lines.pinyin: kàn kan zhè zuò chéng shì de dāng dì rén, tā men yě shì yìng de hěn hǎo.
lines.english: Look at the locals in this city; they are also adapting very well.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是的，這就是現代社會的特點。
lines.pinyin: shì de, zhè jiù shì xiàn dài shè huì de tè diǎn.
lines.english: Yes, that's a characteristic of modern society.

lines.speaker: C
lines.zh: 讓我們為這種融合乾杯吧！
lines.pinyin: ràng wǒ men wèi zhè zhǒng róng hé gān bēi ba!
lines.english: Let's toast to this fusion!

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 乾杯！
lines.pinyin: gān bēi!
lines.english: Cheers!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 乾杯！祝大家在異國他鄉生活愉快。
lines.pinyin: gān bēi! zhù dà jiā zài yì guó tā xiāng shēng huó yú kuài.
lines.english: Cheers! Wish everyone a pleasant life in foreign lands.

title: Personal History
description: Talk about your life experiences, childhood memories, and major events.

text.zh: 每個人都有自己獨特的生命故事。
text.pinyin: měi gè rén dōu yǒu zì jǐ dú tè de shēng mìng gù shì.
text.english: Everyone has their own unique life story.

text.zh: 從童年到成年，我們經歷了很多改變。
text.pinyin: cóng tóng nián dào chéng nián, wǒ men jīng lì le hěn duō gǎi biàn.
text.english: From childhood to adulthood, we go through many changes.

text.zh: 這些經歷讓我們變得更堅強、更有智慧。
text.pinyin: zhè xiē jīng lì ràng wǒ men biàn de gèng jiān qiáng, gèng yǒu zhì huì.
text.english: These experiences make us stronger and wiser.

comprehension.question: What does everyone have?
comprehension.questionZh: 每個人都有什麼？
options: 獨特的生命故事 Unique life story
很多錢 A lot of money

comprehension.question: When do we experience changes?
comprehension.questionZh: 我們什麼時候會經歷改變？
options: 從童年到成年 From childhood to adulthood

comprehension.question: What do experiences make us?
comprehension.questionZh: 經歷讓我們變得如何？
options: 更堅強與有智慧 Stronger and wiser

dialogueSections.title: Childhood Memories
dialogueSections.scene: Two adults reminisce about their childhood experiences and where they grew up.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你小時候住在哪裡？
lines.pinyin: nǐ xiǎo shí hòu zhù zài nǎ lǐ?
lines.english: Where did you live when you were a child?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我是在一個安靜的小鎮成長的。
lines.pinyin: wǒ shì zài yí gè ān jìng de xiǎo zhèn chéng zhǎng de.
lines.english: I grew up in a quiet little town.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那一定有很多美好的童年回憶吧。
lines.pinyin: nà yí dìng yǒu hěn duō měi hǎo de tóng nián huí yì ba.
lines.english: There must be many beautiful childhood memories.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是的，我記得常去河邊玩耍。
lines.pinyin: shì de, wǒ jì dé cháng qù hé biān wán shuǎ.
lines.english: Yes, I remember often going to play by the river.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我的童年很不一樣，我是在大城市長大的。
lines.pinyin: wǒ de tóng nián hěn bù yí yàng, wǒ shì zài dà chéng shì zhǎng dà de.
lines.english: My childhood was very different; I grew up in a big city.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 大城市的教育資源應該更好吧？
lines.pinyin: dà chéng shì de jiào yù zī yuán yīng gāi gèng hǎo ba?
lines.english: Educational resources in a big city should be better, right?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 對，但我那時的壓力也很大。
lines.pinyin: duì, dàn wǒ nà shí de yā lì yě hěn dà.
lines.english: Yes, but my pressure was also quite high then.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你那時的夢想是什麼？
lines.pinyin: nǐ nà shí de mèng xiǎng shì shén me?
lines.english: What was your dream back then?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我想當一名飛行員，探索世界。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng dāng yì míng fēi xíng yuán, tàn suǒ shì jiè.
lines.english: I wanted to be a pilot and explore the world.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那是個很酷的目標！可惜我後來選擇了法律。
lines.pinyin: nà shì gè hěn kù de mù biāo! kě xī wǒ hòu lái xuǎn zé le fǎ lǜ.
lines.english: That's a cool goal! Unfortunately, I later chose law.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 每個人的人生都有不同的轉折點。
lines.pinyin: měi gè rén de rén shēng dōu yǒu bù tóng de zhuǎn zhé diǎn.
lines.english: Everyone's life has different turning points.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 沒錯。雖然有遺憾，但我現在很滿足。
lines.pinyin: méi cuò. suī rán yǒu yí hàn, dàn wǒ xiàn zài hěn mǎn zú.
lines.english: True. Although there are regrets, I'm very satisfied now.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你的個人經歷一定很豐富。
lines.pinyin: nǐ de gè rén jīng lì yí dìng hěn fēng fù.
lines.english: Your personal experience must be very rich.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 還好，主要是克服了一些困難。
lines.pinyin: hái hǎo, zhǔ yào shì kè fú le yì xiē kùn nán.
lines.english: It's okay, mainly just overcame some difficulties.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 分享故事能啟發他人，這很有意義。
lines.pinyin: fēn xiǎng gù shi néng qǐ fā tā rén, zhè hěn yǒu yì yì.
lines.english: Sharing stories can inspire others; that's very meaningful.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對，我也常被別人的故事影響。
lines.pinyin: duì, wǒ yě cháng bèi bié rén de gù shi yǐng xiǎng.
lines.english: Yes, I'm also often influenced by other people's stories.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我們都在不斷地成長和改變。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men dōu zài bú duàn de chéng zhǎng hé gǎi biàn.
lines.english: We are all constantly growing and changing.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 為了更好的未來努力吧。
lines.pinyin: wèi le gèng hǎo de wèi lái nǔ lì ba.
lines.english: Let's work hard for a better future.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 加油！
lines.pinyin: jiā yóu!
lines.english: Keep it up!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 加油！
lines.pinyin: jiā yóu!
lines.english: Keep it up!

dialogueSections.title: Overcoming Challenges
dialogueSections.scene: A person talks about a major challenge they faced and how they overcame it.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 聽說你去年遇到了一個很大的挑戰？
lines.pinyin: tīng shuō nǐ qù nián yù dào le yí gè hěn dà de tiǎo zhàn?
lines.english: I heard you encountered a big challenge last year?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是的，我的創業項目失敗了。
lines.pinyin: shì de, wǒ de chuàng yè xiàng mù shī bài le.
lines.english: Yes, my startup project failed.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那一定很難受。你是怎麼走出來的？
lines.pinyin: nà yí dìng hěn nán shòu. nǐ shì zěn me zǒu chū lái de?
lines.english: That must have been hard. How did you get through it?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 一開始我想過放棄，但後來決定再試一次。
lines.pinyin: yì kāi shǐ wǒ xiǎng guò fàng qì, dàn hòu lái jué dìng zài shì yí cì.
lines.english: At first I thought about giving up, but later I decided to try again.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你的堅持真讓人自豪。
lines.pinyin: nǐ de jiān chí zhēn ràng rén zì háo.
lines.english: Your persistence really makes one proud.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 失敗也是人生的一部分，它教了我很多。
lines.pinyin: shī bài yě shì rén shēng de yí bù fèn, tā jiāo le wǒ hěn duō.
lines.english: Failure is also part of life; it taught me a lot.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你克服了哪些具體的困難？
lines.pinyin: nǐ kè fú le nǎ xiē jù tǐ de kùn nán?
lines.english: What specific difficulties did you overcome?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 主要是資金和團隊管理方面的問題。
lines.pinyin: zhǔ yào shì zī jīn hé tuán duì guǎn lǐ fāng miàn de wèn tí.
lines.english: Mainly issues regarding funding and team management.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 現在項目進展順利嗎？
lines.pinyin: xiàn zài xiàng mù jìn zhǎn shùn lì ma?
lines.english: Is the project progressing smoothly now?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 很順利，我們獲得了新的投資機會。
lines.pinyin: hěn shùn lì, wǒ men huò dé le xīn de tóu zī jī huì.
lines.english: Very smoothly; we got a new investment opportunity.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 太棒了，這就是成功的開始。
lines.pinyin: tài bàng le, zhè jiù shì chéng gōng de kāi shǐ.
lines.english: Great, that's the beginning of success.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 謝謝你的支持。這段經歷改變了我的性格。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie nǐ de zhī chí. zhè duàn jīng lì gǎi biàn le wǒ de xìng gé.
lines.english: Thanks for your support. This experience changed my personality.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你變得更成熟、更冷靜了。
lines.pinyin: nǐ biàn de gèng chéng shú, gèng lěng jìng le.
lines.english: You've become more mature and calmer.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是啊，有時候挫折也是一種啟發。
lines.pinyin: shì a, yǒu shí hòu cuò zhé yě shì yì zhǒng qǐ fā.
lines.english: Yes, sometimes setbacks are also a kind of inspiration.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 希望你的故事能影響更多的人。
lines.pinyin: xī wàng nǐ de gù shi néng yǐng xiǎng gèng duō de rén.
lines.english: I hope your story can influence more people.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我也希望能幫助那些處於困難中的人。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě xī wàng néng bāng zhù nà xiē chǔ yú kùn nán zhōng de rén.
lines.english: I also hope to help those who are in difficulty.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你的努力一定會有回報的。
lines.pinyin: nǐ de nǔ lì yí dìng huì yǒu huí bào de.
lines.english: Your hard work will definitely pay off.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我也這麼相信。我們一起努力！
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě zhè me xiāng xìn. wǒ men yì qǐ nǔ lì!
lines.english: I believe that too. Let's work hard together!

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 為了理想，不懈奮鬥。
lines.pinyin: wèi le lǐ xiǎng, bú xiè fèn dòu.
lines.english: Strive untiringly for our ideals.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 加油！
lines.pinyin: jiā yóu!
lines.english: Keep it up!

dialogueSections.title: Reflecting on Life
dialogueSections.scene: A mentor and a student reflect on life choices and personal growth.

lines.speaker: Mentor
lines.zh: 回顧你過去的人生，你有什麼遺憾嗎？
lines.pinyin: huí gù nǐ guò qù de rén shēng, nǐ yǒu shén me yí hàn ma?
lines.english: Looking back on your past life, do you have any regrets?

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 有一些，比如沒有在大學多學一門語言。
lines.pinyin: yǒu yì xiē, bǐ rú méi yǒu zài dà xué duō xué yì mén yǔ yán.
lines.english: There are some, like not learning another language in college.

lines.speaker: Mentor
lines.zh: 遺憾也是一種經歷，它讓你更珍惜現在。
lines.pinyin: yí hàn yě shì yì zhǒng jīng lì, tā ràng nǐ gèng zhēn xī xiàn zài.
lines.english: Regret is also a kind of experience; it makes you cherish the present more.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 您說得對。但我對自己的職業選擇感到很自豪。
lines.pinyin: nín shuō de duì. dàn wǒ duì zì jǐ de zhí yè xuǎn zé gǎn dào hěn zì háo.
lines.english: You're right. But I feel very proud of my career choice.

lines.speaker: Mentor
lines.zh: 那是因為你付出了巨大的努力。
lines.pinyin: nà shì yīn wèi nǐ fù chū le jù dà de nǔ lì.
lines.english: That's because you've put in a tremendous amount of effort.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 我覺得每一步成長都伴隨著挑戰。
lines.pinyin: wǒ jué de měi yí bù chéng zhǎng dōu bàn suí zhe tiǎo zhàn.
lines.english: I feel that every step of growth is accompanied by challenges.

lines.speaker: Mentor
lines.zh: 沒錯，沒有挑戰就沒有進步。
lines.pinyin: méi cuò, méi yǒu tiǎo zhàn jiù méi yǒu jìn bù.
lines.english: Exactly, there is no progress without challenges.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 您是怎麼看待成功的？
lines.pinyin: nín shì zěn me kàn dài chéng gōng de?
lines.english: How do you view success?

lines.speaker: Mentor
lines.zh: 成功不僅是達成目標，更是實現自我價值。
lines.pinyin: chéng gōng bù jǐn shì dá chéng mù biāo, gèng shì shí xiàn zì wǒ jià zhí.
lines.english: Success is not just reaching goals, but also realizing one's self-worth.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 這對我很有啟發。我也想實現我的夢想。
lines.pinyin: zhè duì wǒ hěn qǐ fā. wǒ yě xiǎng shí xiàn wǒ de mèng xiǎng.
lines.english: That's very inspiring to me. I also want to realize my dreams.

lines.speaker: Mentor
lines.zh: 只要你不放棄，機會總會出現的。
lines.pinyin: zhǐ yào nǐ bú fàng qì, jī huì zǒng huì chū xiàn de.
lines.english: As long as you don't give up, opportunities will always appear.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 我會堅持下去的，不管遇到什麼困難。
lines.pinyin: wǒ huì jiān chí xià qù de, bù guǎn yù dào shén me kùn nán.
lines.english: I will persist, no matter what difficulties I encounter.

lines.speaker: Mentor
lines.zh: 你的背景和經歷會成為你強大的武器。
lines.pinyin: nǐ de bèi jǐng hé jīng lì huì chéng wéi nǐ qiáng dà de wǔ qì.
lines.english: Your background and experiences will become your powerful weapons.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 我明白了，我會好好利用這些資源。
lines.pinyin: wǒ míng bái le, wǒ huì hǎo hǎo lì yòng zhè xiē zī yuán.
lines.english: I understand; I will make good use of these resources.

lines.speaker: Mentor
lines.zh: 多和別人分享你的故事，這也是一種學習。
lines.pinyin: duō hé bié rén fēn xiǎng nǐ de gù shi, zhè yě shì yì zhǒng xué xí.
lines.english: Sharing your story with others often is also a kind of learning.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 好的，我會嘗試多去交流。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, wǒ huì cháng shì duō qù jiāo liú.
lines.english: Okay, I'll try to communicate more.

lines.speaker: Mentor
lines.zh: 人生就像一本書，每一章都很重要。
lines.pinyin: rén shēng jiù xiàng yì běn shū, měi yì zhāng dōu hěn zhòng yào.
lines.english: Life is like a book; every chapter is very important.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 謝謝您的教導，我會記在心裡的。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie nín de jiào dǎo, wǒ huì jì zài xīn lǐ de.
lines.english: Thank you for your guidance; I will keep it in my heart.

lines.speaker: Mentor
lines.zh: 不客氣，祝你未來一切順利。
lines.pinyin: bú kè qi, zhù nǐ wèi lái yí qiè shùn lì.
lines.english: You're welcome; wish you all the best in the future.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 謝謝老師，再見。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie lǎo shī, zài jiàn.
lines.english: Thank you, teacher, goodbye.

title: Environment & Nature
description: Discuss climate change, recycling, and how to protect nature.

text.zh: 地球是我們唯一的家，保護環境非常重要。
text.pinyin: dì qiú shì wǒ men wéi yī de jiā, bǎo hù huán jìng fēi cháng zhòng yào.
text.english: Earth is our only home, and protecting the environment is very important.

text.zh: 垃圾回收和節能減塑是每個人都能做的小事。
text.pinyin: lè sè huí shōu hé jié néng jiǎn sù shì měi gè rén dōu néng zuò de xiǎo shì.
text.english: Garbage recycling and energy saving/plastic reduction are small things everyone can do.

text.zh: 只要大家一起努力，就能改善全球暖化的問題。
text.pinyin: zhǐ yào dà jiā yì qǐ nǔ lì, jiù néng gǎi shàn quán qiú nuǎn huà de wèn tí.
text.english: As long as everyone works together, we can improve the problem of global warming.

comprehension.question: What is our only home?
comprehension.questionZh: 我們唯一的家是什麼？

comprehension.question: What are things everyone can do?
comprehension.questionZh: 每個人都能做的事是什麼？
options: 回收與節能 Recycling and saving energy

comprehension.question: How can we improve global warming?
comprehension.questionZh: 我們怎麼改善全球暖化？
options: 大家一起努力 Everyone work together
開更多冷氣 Turn on more AC
多買塑膠袋 Buy more plastic bags

dialogueSections.title: Protecting our Earth
dialogueSections.scene: A conversation about environmental protection and what individuals can do to help.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你對現在的環境問題怎麼看？
lines.pinyin: nǐ duì xiàn zài de huán jìng wèn tí zěn me kàn?
lines.english: What do you think about current environmental issues?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我覺得污染越來越嚴重了，特別是空氣。
lines.pinyin: wǒ jué de wū rǎn yuè lái yuè yán zhòng le, tè bié shì kōng qì.
lines.english: I think pollution is becoming more and more serious, especially the air.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 是啊，氣候變化也讓暖化問題加劇。
lines.pinyin: shì a, qì hòu biàn huà yě ràng nuǎn huà wèn tí jiā jù.
lines.english: Yes, and climate change is also exacerbating the warming problem.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我們必須採取行動來保護自然。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men bì xū cǎi qǔ xíng dòng lái bǎo hù zì rán.
lines.english: We must take action to protect nature.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 沒錯，我們可以從節約資源開始。
lines.pinyin: méi cuò, wǒ men kě yǐ cóng jié yuē zī yuán kāi shǐ.
lines.english: Exactly, we can start by conserving resources.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我現在每天都回收塑膠和紙張。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiàn zài měi tiān dōu huí shōu sù jiāo hé zhǐ zhāng.
lines.english: I recycle plastic and paper every day now.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我也盡量減少使用一次性產品。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě jìn liàng jiǎn shǎo shǐ yòng yí cì xìng chǎn pǐn.
lines.english: I also try my best to reduce the use of single-use products.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 提高環保意識是非常關鍵的。
lines.pinyin: tí gāo huán bǎo yì shí shì fēi cháng guān jiàn de.
lines.english: Raising environmental awareness is very key.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 森林和海洋也需要我們的關注。
lines.pinyin: sēn lín hé hǎi yáng yě xū yào wǒ men de guān zhù.
lines.english: Forests and oceans also need our attention.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 很多動物因為棲息地破壞而滅絕了。
lines.pinyin: hěn duō dòng wù yīn wèi qī xī dì pò huài ér miè jué le.
lines.english: Many animals have gone extinct because of habitat destruction.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我們應該支持永續發展。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men yīng gāi zhī chí yǒng xù fā zhǎn.
lines.english: We should support sustainable development.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對，利用太陽能和風能是不錯的選擇。
lines.pinyin: duì, lì yòng tài yáng néng hé fēng néng shì bú cuò de xuǎn zé.
lines.english: Right, using solar and wind energy are good choices.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 生態平衡對地球的未來很重要。
lines.pinyin: shēng tài píng héng duì dì qiú de wèi lái hěn zhòng yào.
lines.english: Ecological balance is very important for the future of the Earth.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 每個人都出一份力，環境就會變好。
lines.pinyin: měi gè rén dōu chū yí fèn lì, huán jìng jiù huì biàn hǎo.
lines.english: If everyone contributes, the environment will improve.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我想加入一個當地的環保組織。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng jiā rù yí gè dāng dì de huán bǎo zǔ zhī.
lines.english: I want to join a local environmental organization.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好主意，我可以陪你一起去。
lines.pinyin: hǎo zhǔ yì, wǒ kě yǐ péi nǐ yì qǐ qù.
lines.english: Good idea; I can go with you.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我們要保護這個漂亮的地球。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men yào bǎo hù zhè gè piào liang de dì qiú.
lines.english: We need to protect this beautiful Earth.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 為了下一代，我們必須堅持下去。
lines.pinyin: wèi le xià yí dài, wǒ men bì xū jiān chí xià qù.
lines.english: For the next generation, we must persist.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那我們先從垃圾分類開始吧。
lines.pinyin: nà wǒ men xiān cóng lā jī fēn lèi kāi shǐ ba.
lines.english: Then let's start with garbage sorting first.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 走吧！
lines.pinyin: zǒu ba!
lines.english: Let's go!

dialogueSections.title: A Walk in the National Park
dialogueSections.scene: Friends enjoy the natural scenery while discussing the importance of nature.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這裡的空氣真新鮮！
lines.pinyin: zhè lǐ de kōng qì zhēn xīn xiān!
lines.english: The air here is so fresh!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是啊，遠離城市的污染，感覺真好。
lines.pinyin: shì a, yuǎn lí chéng shì de wū rǎn, gǎn jué zhēn hǎo.
lines.english: Yes, it feels so good to be away from city pollution.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你看那些植物，長得真茂盛。
lines.pinyin: nǐ kàn nà xiē zhí wù, zhǎng de zhēn mào shèng.
lines.english: Look at those plants; they're growing so lushly.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 自然風景總是能讓人放鬆心情。
lines.pinyin: zì rán fēng jǐng zǒng shì néng ràng rén fàng sōng xīn qíng.
lines.english: Natural scenery always helps people relax.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我們應該多花時間與自然接觸。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men yīng gāi duō huā shí jiān yǔ zì rán jiē chù.
lines.english: We should spend more time in contact with nature.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 但我們也要注意保護這片森林。
lines.pinyin: dàn wǒ men yě yào zhù yì bǎo hù zhè piàn sēn lín.
lines.english: But we also need to pay attention to protecting this forest.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那是當然，不能在景點亂丟垃圾。
lines.pinyin: nà shì dāng rán, bù néng zài jǐng diǎn luàn diū lā jī.
lines.english: Of course, we can't litter at scenic spots.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 這就是為什麼國家公園有這麼多規定。
lines.pinyin: zhè jiù shì wèi shén me guó jiā gōng yuán yǒu zhè me duō guī dìng.
lines.english: That's why national parks have so many regulations.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 為了維持生態平衡，每個人都要遵守。
lines.pinyin: wèi le wéi chí shēng tài píng héng, měi gè rén dōu yào zūn shǒu.
lines.english: To maintain ecological balance, everyone needs to comply.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 剛才我看見了一些稀有的鳥類。
lines.pinyin: gāng cái wǒ kàn jiàn le yì xiē xī yǒu de niǎo lèi.
lines.english: I just saw some rare bird species.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 真的嗎？能在自然界看到它們真不容易。
lines.pinyin: zhēn de ma? néng zài zì rán jiè kàn dào tā men zhēn bù róng yì.
lines.english: Really? It's not easy to see them in the natural world.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 希望這些資源能被好好保存下來。
lines.pinyin: xī wàng zhè xiē zī yuán néng bèi hǎo hǎo bǎo cún xià lái.
lines.english: I hope these resources can be well preserved.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你喜歡吃有機蔬菜嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ xǐ huan chī yǒu jī shū cài ma?
lines.english: Do you like eating organic vegetables?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 喜歡，有機食物對身體和環境都好。
lines.pinyin: xǐ huan, yǒu jī shí wù duì shēn tǐ hé huán jìng dōu hǎo.
lines.english: Yes, organic food is good for both the body and the environment.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這裡的水也很清澈。
lines.pinyin: zhè lǐ de shuǐ yě hěn qīng chè.
lines.english: The water here is also very clear.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 大自然的每一部分都是寶貴的。
lines.pinyin: dà zì rán de měi yí bù fèn dōu shì bǎo guì de.
lines.english: Every part of nature is precious.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 讓我們在那邊休息一下，拍幾張照片吧。
lines.pinyin: ràng wǒ men zài nà biān xiū xi yí xià, pāi jǐ zhāng zhào piàn ba.
lines.english: Let's rest over there for a bit and take some photos.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好啊，這風景太美了，一定要拍下來。
lines.pinyin: hǎo a, zhè fēng jǐng tài měi le, yí dìng yào pāi xià lái.
lines.english: Sure, this scenery is so beautiful; we must capture it.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝你今天邀請我來。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie nǐ jīn tiān yāo qǐng wǒ lái.
lines.english: Thank you for inviting me today.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 不客氣，我們下次再去探索別的地方。
lines.pinyin: bú kè qi, wǒ men xià cì zài qù tàn suǒ bié de dì fāng.
lines.english: You're welcome; let's go explore somewhere else next time.

dialogueSections.title: Sustainable Living
dialogueSections.scene: A discussion on lifestyle changes to support sustainability and reduce waste.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我決定嘗試過一種永續的生活方式。
lines.pinyin: wǒ jué dìng cháng shì guò yì zhǒng yǒng xù de shēng huó fāng shì.
lines.english: I've decided to try living a sustainable lifestyle.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 聽起來很有挑戰。你打算怎麼做？
lines.pinyin: tīng qǐ lái hěn yǒu tiǎo zhàn. nǐ dǎ suàn zěn me zuò?
lines.english: Sounds challenging. How do you plan to do it?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 首先，我會減少塑膠的使用。
lines.pinyin: shǒu xiān, wǒ huì jiǎn shǎo sù jiāo de shǐ yòng.
lines.english: First, I'll reduce the use of plastic.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那很重要，塑膠污染是一個大問題。
lines.pinyin: nà hěn zhòng yào, sù jiāo wū rǎn shì yí gè dà wèn tí.
lines.english: That's important; plastic pollution is a big problem.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我也會盡量使用再生能源。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě huì jìn liàng shǐ yòng zài shēng néng yuán.
lines.english: I'll also try to use renewable energy as much as possible.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你家裡有裝太陽能板嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ jiā lǐ yǒu zhuāng tài yáng néng bǎn ma?
lines.english: Do you have solar panels installed at home?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 打算下個月裝。這能節約很多能源。
lines.pinyin: dǎ suàn xià gè yuè zhuāng. zhè néng jié yuē hěn duō néng yuán.
lines.english: Planning to install them next month. This can save a lot of energy.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 節約用電也是每個人的責任。
lines.pinyin: jié yuē yòng diàn yě shì měi gè rén de zé rèn.
lines.english: Conserving electricity is also everyone's responsibility.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 對，而且我現在出門都自備水杯。
lines.pinyin: duì, ér qiě wǒ xiàn zài chū mén dōu zì bèi shuǐ bēi.
lines.english: Right, and I bring my own water cup when I go out now.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 這是一個很好的習慣。回收也很關鍵。
lines.pinyin: zhè shì yí gè hěn hǎo de xí guàn. huí shōu yě hěn guān jiàn.
lines.english: That's a good habit. Recycling is also key.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我們應該多關注產品的整個生命週期。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men yīng gāi duō guān zhù chǎn pǐn de zhěng gè shēng mìng zhōu qī.
lines.english: We should pay more attention to the entire life cycle of products.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 沒錯，選擇那些環保材料做的產品。
lines.pinyin: méi cuò, xuǎn zé nà xiē huán bǎo cái liào zuò de chǎn pǐn.
lines.english: Exactly, choose products made of environmentally friendly materials.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 提高公眾意識需要時間。
lines.pinyin: tí gāo gōng zhòng yì shí xū yào shí jiān.
lines.english: Raising public awareness takes time.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 但只要有人開始做，就會有影響。
lines.pinyin: dàn zhǐ yào yǒu rén kāi shǐ zuò, jiù huì yǒu yǐng xiǎng.
lines.english: But as long as someone starts doing it, there will be an impact.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我希望能為了地球的未來做點什麼。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xī wàng néng wèi le dì qiú de wèi lái zuò diǎn shén me.
lines.english: I hope I can do something for the future of the Earth.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你的行動已經是一個很好的榜樣了。
lines.pinyin: nǐ de xíng dòng yǐ jīng shì yí gè hěn hǎo de bǎng yàng le.
lines.english: Your actions are already a good example.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝你的鼓勵。我們一起加油吧。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie nǐ de gǔ lì. wǒ men yì qǐ jiā yóu ba.
lines.english: Thanks for your encouragement. Let's work hard together.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好，我也打算從明天開始減少浪費。
lines.pinyin: hǎo, wǒ yě dǎ suàn cóng míng tiān kāi shǐ jiǎn shǎo làng fèi.
lines.english: Okay, I also plan to start reducing waste from tomorrow.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 太棒了！讓我們共同保護環境。
lines.pinyin: tài bàng le! ràng wǒ men gòng tóng bǎo hù huán jìng.
lines.english: Great! Let's protect the environment together.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 共同努力！
lines.pinyin: gòng tóng nǔ lì!
lines.english: Work together!
