questions.question: If you are 'environmentally friendly', you are...

title: Fitness & Lifestyle
description: Talk about exercise routines, healthy eating, and daily habits.

text.zh: 健康的身體需要規律的運動和均衡的飲食。
text.pinyin: jiàn kāng de shēn tǐ xū yào guī lǜ de yùn dòng hé jūn héng de yǐn shí.
text.english: A healthy body requires regular exercise and a balanced diet.

text.zh: 除了健身，保持良好的睡眠習慣也同樣重要。
text.pinyin: chú le jiàn shēn, bǎo chí liáng hǎo de shuì mián xí guàn yě tóng yàng zhòng yào.
text.english: Besides working out, maintaining good sleep habits is equally important.

text.zh: 現代人壓力大，學會如何放鬆心情也是健康的一部分。
text.pinyin: xiàn dài rén yā lì dà, xué huì rú hé fàng sōng xīn qíng yě shì jiàn kāng de yí bù fèn.
text.english: Modern people have a lot of pressure; learning how to relax is also a part of health.

comprehension.question: What does a healthy body need?
comprehension.questionZh: 健康的身體需要什麼？
options: 規律運動和均衡飲食 Regular exercise and balanced diet

comprehension.question: What else is important besides exercise?
comprehension.questionZh: 除了運動還有什麼很重要？
options: 買漂亮衣服 Buy beautiful clothes
良好的睡眠習慣 Good sleep habits

comprehension.question: What should modern people learn to do?
comprehension.questionZh: 現代人應該學會做什麼？
options: 吃油膩食物 Eat greasy food

dialogueSections.title: Joining a Gym
dialogueSections.scene: A person goes to a gym to inquire about membership and personal training.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 你好，我想了解一下這裡的健身課程。
lines.pinyin: nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng liǎo jiě yī xià zhè lǐ de jiàn shēn kè chéng.
lines.english: Hello, I'd like to learn about the fitness classes here.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 歡迎！我們有瑜伽、跑步和重量鍛煉課程。
lines.pinyin: huān yíng! wǒ men yǒu yú jiā, pǎo bù hé zhòng liàng duàn liàn kè chéng.
lines.english: Welcome! We have yoga, running, and weight training classes.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 我的目標是減肥，有什麼好的建議嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ de mù biāo shì jiǎn féi, yǒu shén me hǎo de jiàn yì ma?
lines.english: My goal is to lose weight, any good suggestions?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 我建議您找一位專業教練來制定鍛煉計劃。
lines.pinyin: wǒ jiàn yì nín zhǎo yī wèi zhuān yè jiào liàn lái zhì dìng duàn liàn jì huà.
lines.english: I suggest you find a professional coach to create a workout plan.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 教練可以幫我監控體重和肌肉增長嗎？
lines.pinyin: jiào liàn kě yǐ bāng wǒ jiān kòng tǐ zhòng hé jī ròu zēng zhǎng ma?
lines.english: Can the coach help me monitor my weight and muscle growth?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 當然可以。合理的飲食和營養也非常重要。
lines.pinyin: dāng rán kě yǐ. hé lǐ de yǐn shí hé yíng yǎng yě fēi cháng zhòng yào.
lines.english: Of course. Proper diet and nutrition are also very important.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 我現在的生活方式不太規律，經常熬夜。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiàn zài de shēng huó fāng shì bú tài guī lǜ, jīng cháng áo yè.
lines.english: My current lifestyle isn't very regular, I often stay up late.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 那您需要改善睡眠，保持良好的體能。
lines.pinyin: nà nín xū yào gǎi shàn shuì mián, bǎo chí liáng hǎo de tǐ néng.
lines.english: Then you need to improve your sleep to maintain good physical condition.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 這裡有跑步機嗎？我平時喜歡跑步。
lines.pinyin: zhè lǐ yǒu pǎo bù jī ma? wǒ píng shí xǐ huan pǎo bù.
lines.english: Are there treadmills here? I usually like running.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 有的，就在那邊。每天鍛煉一小時很有活力。
lines.pinyin: yǒu de, jiù zài nà biān. měi tiān duàn liàn yī xiǎo shí hěn yǒu huó lì.
lines.english: Yes, right over there. Working out for an hour a day gives you a lot of vigor.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 我打算下週開始，希望能堅持下去。
lines.pinyin: wǒ dǎ suàn xià zhōu kāi shǐ, xī wàng néng jiān chí xià qù.
lines.english: I plan to start next week, hope I can persist.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 只要您有決心，一定能看到效果的。
lines.pinyin: zhǐ yào nín yǒu jué xīn, yī dìng néng kàn dào xiào guǒ de.
lines.english: As long as you have determination, you will definitely see results.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 會員費是多少？包含洗澡的地方嗎？
lines.pinyin: huì yuán fèi shì duō shǎo? bāo hán xǐ zǎo de dì fāng ma?
lines.english: How much is the membership fee? Does it include showers?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 每個月兩千塊，設施齊全，還有浴室。
lines.pinyin: měi gè yuè liǎng qiān kuài, shè shī qí quán, hái yǒu yù shì.
lines.english: 2,000 per month, full facilities, including bathrooms.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 好的，我現在就辦理入會。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, wǒ xiàn zài jiù bàn lǐ rù huì.
lines.english: Okay, I'll sign up for the membership now.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 請在這裡填寫您的基本資訊。
lines.pinyin: qǐng zài zhè lǐ tián xiě nín de jī běn zī xùn.
lines.english: Please fill in your basic information here.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 沒問題。謝謝你的幫忙。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí. xiè xie nǐ de bāng máng.
lines.english: No problem. Thanks for your help.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 不客氣。期待在健身房見到您。
lines.pinyin: bú kè qi. qī dài zài jiàn shēn fáng jiàn dào nín.
lines.english: You're welcome. Looking forward to seeing you at the gym.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 再見。
lines.pinyin: zài jiàn.
lines.english: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 再見，祝您健康！
lines.pinyin: zài jiàn, zhù nín jiàn kāng!
lines.english: Goodbye, wish you health!

dialogueSections.title: Healthy Habits
dialogueSections.scene: Friends discuss their dietary habits and how they maintain a healthy weight.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你最近看起來精神很好，有什麼秘密嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ zuì jìn kàn qǐ lái jīng shén hěn hǎo, yǒu shén me mì mì ma?
lines.english: You look very energetic lately, any secrets?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我最近開始嘗試素食，感覺身體輕盈多了。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zuì jìn kāi shǐ cháng shì sù shí, gǎn jué shēn tǐ qīng yíng duō le.
lines.english: I recently started trying a vegetarian diet, and my body feels much lighter.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 真的嗎？營養足夠嗎？
lines.pinyin: zhēn de ma? yíng yǎng zú gòu ma?
lines.english: Really? Is it nutritionally sufficient?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 只要搭配好各種蔬菜和豆類，營養很均衡。
lines.pinyin: zhǐ yào dā pèi hǎo gè zhǒng shū cài hé dòu lèi, yíng yǎng hěn jūn héng.
lines.english: As long as you pair various vegetables and beans well, the nutrition is balanced.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我也想減肥，但我太愛吃甜食了。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě xiǎng jiǎn féi, dàn wǒ tài ài chī tián shí le.
lines.english: I want to lose weight too, but I love sweets too much.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你可以慢慢減少熱量的攝取，不要一下子放棄。
lines.pinyin: nǐ kě yǐ mǎn mǎn jiǎn shǎo rè liàng de shè qǔ, bú yào yí xià zi fàng qì.
lines.english: You can slowly reduce calorie intake; don't give up all at once.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我現在每天都去公園散步，這算鍛煉嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiàn zài měi tiān dōu qù gōng yuán sàn bù, zhè suàn duàn liàn ma?
lines.english: I go for a walk in the park every day now, does that count as exercise?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 當然算，保持運動的習慣最重要。
lines.pinyin: dāng rán suàn, bǎo chí yùn dòng de xí guàn zuì zhòng yào.
lines.english: Of course, maintaining the habit of exercising is most important.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我還打算試試瑜伽，聽說能放鬆壓力和肌肉。
lines.pinyin: wǒ hái dǎ suàn shì shi yú jiā, tīng shuō néng fàng sōng yā lì hé jī ròu.
lines.english: I also plan to try yoga; I heard it can relax stress and muscles.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對，瑜伽對平衡身心很有幫助。
lines.pinyin: duì, yú jiā duì píng héng shēn xīn hěn yǒu bāng zhù.
lines.english: Yes, yoga is very helpful for balancing mind and body.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你的教練對你要求嚴格嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ de jiào liàn duì nǐ yāo qiú yán gé ma?
lines.english: Is your coach strict with you?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 挺嚴格的，但這讓我更有動力堅持。
lines.pinyin: tǐng yán gé de, dàn zhè ràng wǒ gèng yǒu dòng lì jiān chí.
lines.english: Quite strict, but it gives me more motivation to persist.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我希望我也能擁有你那樣的活力。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xī wàng wǒ yě néng yōng yǒu nǐ nà yàng de huó lì.
lines.english: I hope I can have vigor like yours.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 只要你肯開始，你也可以做到的。
lines.pinyin: zhǐ yào nǐ kěn kāi shǐ, nǐ yě kě yǐ zuò dào de.
lines.english: As long as you're willing to start, you can do it too.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我們週末一起去健身房怎麼樣？
lines.pinyin: wǒ men zhōu mò yì qǐ qù jiàn shēn fáng zěn me yàng?
lines.english: How about we go to the gym together this weekend?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好主意！順便教你一些基本的動作。
lines.pinyin: hǎo zhǔ yì! shùn biàn jiāo nǐ yì xiē jī běn de dòng zuò.
lines.english: Good idea! I'll teach you some basic moves while we're at it.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 太好了，我現在就去買雙新的運動鞋。
lines.pinyin: tài hǎo le, wǒ xiàn zài jiù qù mǎi shuāng xīn de yùn dòng xié.
lines.english: Great, I'm going to buy a new pair of sneakers now.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 別忘了帶水壺，出汗後要補充水分。
lines.pinyin: bié wàng le dài shuǐ hú, chū hàn hòu yào bǔ chōng shuǐ fèn.
lines.english: Don't forget to bring a water bottle; you need to replenish fluids after sweating.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我記住了。週六上午十點見！
lines.pinyin: wǒ jì zhù le. zhōu liù shàng wǔ shí diǎn jiàn!
lines.english: I've noted that. See you Saturday at 10 AM!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 不見不散！
lines.pinyin: bú jiàn bú sàn!
lines.english: Be there or be square!

dialogueSections.title: A Productive Morning
dialogueSections.scene: A discussion on creating a morning routine that balances fitness and productivity.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我發現規律的睡眠真的能提升工作效率。
lines.pinyin: wǒ fā xiàn guī lǜ de shuì mián zhēn de néng tí shēng gōng zuò xiào lǜ.
lines.english: I found that regular sleep really can boost work efficiency.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 沒錯，早起鍛煉一會兒，整天都很有精力。
lines.pinyin: méi cuò, zǎo qǐ duàn liàn yì huì r, zhěng tiān dōu hěn yǒu jīng lì.
lines.english: Exactly, exercising for a bit after waking up early makes you energetic all day.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你早上幾點起床？
lines.pinyin: nǐ zǎo shang jǐ diǎn qǐ chuáng?
lines.english: What time do you wake up in the morning?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我每天六點起床，先做三十分鐘瑜伽。
lines.pinyin: wǒ měi tiān liù diǎn qǐ chuáng, xiān zuò sān shí fēn zhōng yú jiā.
lines.english: I wake up at six every day and do 30 minutes of yoga first.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 六點！那太早了。我通常七點半才醒。
lines.pinyin: liù diǎn! nà tài zǎo le. wǒ tōng cháng qī diǎn bàn cái xǐng.
lines.english: Six! That's too early. I usually don't wake up until 7:30.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 慢慢適應就好了。這是一種健康的健康方式。
lines.pinyin: màn màn shì yìng jiù hǎo le. zhè shì yì zhǒng jiàn kāng de jiàn kāng fāng shì.
lines.english: You'll get used to it slowly. It's a healthy way of life.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 除了瑜伽，你還會做什麼？
lines.pinyin: chú le yú jiā, nǐ hái huì zuò shén me?
lines.english: Besides yoga, what else do you do?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我還會喝一杯新鮮的果汁，補充營養。
lines.pinyin: wǒ hái huì hē yì bēi xīn xiān de guǒ zhī, bǔ chōng yíng yǎng.
lines.english: I also drink a glass of fresh juice to replenish nutrition.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我以前不吃早飯，現在覺得這習慣不好。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yǐ qián bù chī zǎo fàn, xiàn zài jué de zhè xí guàn bù hǎo.
lines.english: I didn't use to eat breakfast, but now I think that's a bad habit.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 對，早飯能給你提供上午所需的熱量。
lines.pinyin: duì, zǎo fàn néng gěi nǐ tí gōng shàng wǔ suǒ xū de rè liàng.
lines.english: Right, breakfast provides the calories you need for the morning.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我的目標是這個月內讓體能有明顯改善。
lines.pinyin: wǒ de mù biāo shì zhè gè yuè nèi ràng tǐ néng yǒu míng xiǎn gǎi shàn.
lines.english: My goal is to have a noticeable improvement in my physical condition within this month.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 只要堅持下去，預防生病也不是難事。
lines.pinyin: zhǐ yào jiān chí xià qù, yù fáng shēng bìng yě bú shì nán shì.
lines.english: As long as you persist, preventing illness isn't difficult either.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 生活平衡真的很重要。
lines.pinyin: shēng huó píng héng zhēn de hěn zhòng yào.
lines.english: Life balance is really important.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是的，工作和休息要分開。
lines.pinyin: shì de, gōng zuò hé xiū xi yào fēn kāi.
lines.english: Yes, work and rest should be separated.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝你的分享，我明天也試著早起。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie nǐ de fēn xiǎng, wǒ míng tiān yě shì zhe zǎo qǐ.
lines.english: Thanks for sharing; I'll try to wake up early tomorrow too.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 加油，希望你能感受到早晨的美好。
lines.pinyin: jiā yóu, xī wàng nǐ néng gǎn shòu dào zǎo chén de měi hǎo.
lines.english: Keep it up; hope you can feel the beauty of the morning.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 一定會的。我現在感覺很有活力。
lines.pinyin: yí dìng huì de. wǒ xiàn gǎn jué hěn yǒu huó lì.
lines.english: I definitely will. I feel very vigorous now.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 這就是正確的生活方式帶來的改變。
lines.pinyin: zhè jiù shì zhèng què de shēng huó fāng shì dài lái de gǎi biàn.
lines.english: That's the change brought by a correct lifestyle.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我們一起努力保持健康吧。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men yì qǐ nǔ lì bǎo chí jiàn kāng ba.
lines.english: Let's work together to stay healthy.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 沒問題，加油！
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, jiā yóu!
lines.english: No problem, keep it up!

title: Renting an Apartment
description: Learn vocabulary for leasing, apartment hunting, and describing neighborhoods.

text.zh: 租房子時，地理位置和交通方便性是首要考慮。
text.pinyin: zū fáng zi shí, dì lǐ wèi zhì hé jiāo tōng fāng biàn xìng shì shǒu yào kǎo lǜ.
text.english: When renting an apartment, location and transportation convenience are primary considerations.

text.zh: 在簽合約之前，一定要仔細檢查房屋的狀況和家具。
text.pinyin: zài qiān hé yuē zhī qián, yí dìng yào zǐ xì jiǎn chá fáng wū de zhuàng kuàng hé jiā jù.
text.english: Before signing the contract, be sure to carefully check the condition of the house and furniture.

text.zh: 了解押金和租金的包含內容，能避免未來的糾紛。
text.pinyin: liǎo jiě yā jīn hé zū jīn de bāo hán nèi róng, néng bì miǎn wèi lái de jiū fēn.
text.english: Understanding what the deposit and rent include can avoid future disputes.

comprehension.question: What are the primary considerations when renting?
comprehension.questionZh: 租房子的首要考慮是什麼？
options: 地理位置和交通 Location and transportation
有沒有電視 If there is a TV

comprehension.question: What should you do before signing a contract?
comprehension.questionZh: 簽合約前應該做什麼？
options: 仔細檢查房屋狀況 Carefully check house condition
請朋友吃飯 Invite friends to dinner

comprehension.question: Why should you understand the rent inclusions?
comprehension.questionZh: 為什麼要了解租金包含的內容？
options: 為了省錢 To save money
為了避免糾紛 To avoid disputes

dialogueSections.title: Viewing an Apartment
dialogueSections.scene: A potential tenant is viewing an apartment with a real estate agent.

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.zh: 林小姐，這就是我們電話裡聊過的公寓。
lines.pinyin: lín xiǎo jiě, zhè jiù shì wǒ men diàn huà lǐ liáo guò de gōng yù.
lines.english: Ms. Lin, this is the apartment we talked about on the phone.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 看起來很寬敞，光線也很明亮。
lines.pinyin: kàn qǐ lái hěn kuān chǎng, guāng xiàn yě hěn míng liàng.
lines.english: It looks very spacious, and the light is very bright.

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.zh: 是的，這間房子的朝向非常好。請進。
lines.pinyin: shì de, zhè jiān fáng zi de cháo xiàng fēi cháng hǎo. qǐng jìn.
lines.english: Yes, the orientation of this house is very good. Please come in.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 客廳很大，家具包含在租金裡嗎？
lines.pinyin: kè tīng hěn dà, jiā jù bāo hán zài zū jīn lǐ ma?
lines.english: The living room is big; is the furniture included in the rent?

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.zh: 包含基本的家具和電器，比如沙發和冰箱。
lines.pinyin: bāo hán jī běn de jiā jù hé diàn qì, bǐ rú shā fā hé bīng xiāng.
lines.english: Basic furniture and appliances are included, like the sofa and fridge.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 租金每個月多少錢？
lines.pinyin: zū jīn měi gè yuè duō shǎo qián?
lines.english: How much is the rent per month?

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.zh: 每個月一萬八千塊，不包含水電費。
lines.pinyin: měi gè yuè yī wàn bā qiān kuài, bù bāo hán shuǐ diàn fèi.
lines.english: 18,000 per month, utility bills not included.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 那管理費是多少？這棟樓有電梯嗎？
lines.pinyin: nà guǎn lǐ fèi shì duō shǎo? zhè dòng lóu yǒu diàn tī ma?
lines.english: Then what's the management fee? Does this building have an elevator?

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.zh: 管理費每月一千塊。有兩部電梯，非常方便。
lines.pinyin: guǎn lǐ fèi měi yuè yī qiān kuài. yǒu liǎng bù diàn tī, fēi cháng fāng biàn.
lines.english: The management fee is 1,000 per month. There are two elevators; it's very convenient.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 附近環境安靜嗎？我怕晚上太熱鬧。
lines.pinyin: fù jìn huán jìng ān jìng ma? wǒ pà wǎn shang tài rè nào.
lines.english: Is the surrounding environment quiet? I'm afraid it might be too lively at night.

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.zh: 這區主要是住宅區，非常安靜。附近有超市嗎？
lines.pinyin: zhè qū zhǔ yào shì zhù zhái qū, fēi cháng ān jìng. fù jìn yǒu chāo shì ma?
lines.english: This area is mainly residential, very quiet. Is there a supermarket nearby?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 走五分鐘就有一個全聯超市。
lines.pinyin: zǒu wǔ fēn zhōng jiù yǒu yí gè quán lián chāo shì.
lines.english: There's a PX Mart supermarket just a 5-minute walk away.

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.zh: 交通也很便利，地鐵站在路口。
lines.pinyin: jiāo tōng yě hěn biàn lì, dì tiě zhàn zài lù kǒu.
lines.english: Transportation is also very convenient; the subway station is at the intersection.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 聽起來不錯。押金要付幾個月？
lines.pinyin: tīng qǐ lái bú cuò. yā jīn yào fù jǐ gè yuè?
lines.english: Sounds good. How many months of deposit is required?

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.zh: 通常是兩個月的押金。合約簽一年。
lines.pinyin: tōng cháng shì liǎng gè yuè de yā jīn. hé yuē qiān yì nián.
lines.english: Usually two months' deposit. The lease is for one year.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 我可以看下合約草案嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ kě yǐ kàn xià hé yuē cǎo àn ma?
lines.english: Can I look at the draft contract?

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.zh: 沒問題，我待會兒發電子郵件給您。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, wǒ dāi huì r fā diàn zǐ yóu jiàn gěi nín.
lines.english: No problem; I'll email it to you in a bit.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 如果合約到期，我可以續約嗎？
lines.pinyin: rú guǒ hé yuē dào qī, wǒ kě yǐ xù yuē ma?
lines.english: If the lease expires, can I renew it?

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.zh: 當然可以，只要提前一個月告知房東。
lines.pinyin: dāng rán kě yǐ, zhǐ yào tí qián yí gè yuè gào zhī fáng dōng.
lines.english: Of course; just notify the landlord one month in advance.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 好的，我回去考慮一下。謝謝。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, wǒ huí qù kǎo lǜ yí xià. xiè xie.
lines.english: Okay, I'll go back and consider it. Thanks.

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.zh: 不客氣，隨時聯繫我。
lines.pinyin: bú kè qi, suí shí lián xì wǒ.
lines.english: You're welcome; contact me anytime.

dialogueSections.title: Negotiating with the Landlord
dialogueSections.scene: A tenant is negotiating rent and repairs with the landlord.

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.zh: 房東先生，我對您的公寓很滿意。
lines.pinyin: fáng dōng xiān sheng, wǒ duì nín de gōng yù hěn mǎn yì.
lines.english: Mr. Landlord, I'm very satisfied with your apartment.

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.zh: 很高興你喜歡。你想什麼時候搬家？
lines.pinyin: hěn gāo xìng nǐ xǐ huan. nǐ shén me shí hòu bān jiā de?
lines.english: Glad you like it. When would you like to move in?

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.zh: 我想下個月初搬過來。但租金能再談談嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng xià gè yuè chū bān guò lái. dàn zū jīn néng zài tán tan ma?
lines.english: I'd like to move in early next month. But can we talk about the rent again?

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.zh: 一萬八已經很便宜了，這區的環境很好。
lines.pinyin: yī wàn bā yǐ jīng hěn pián yi le, zhè qū de huán jìng hěn hǎo.
lines.english: 18,000 is already very cheap; the environment in this area is very good.

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.zh: 我知道。如果我一次付半年的租金，能打折嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ zhī dào. rú guǒ wǒ yí cì fù bàn nián de zū jīn, néng dǎ zhé ma?
lines.english: I know. If I pay half a year's rent at once, can I get a discount?

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.zh: 如果你一次付半年，我可以算你一萬七。
lines.pinyin: rú guǒ nǐ yí cì fù bàn nián, wǒ kě yǐ suàn nǐ yī wàn qī.
lines.english: If you pay half a year at once, I can count it as 17,000.

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.zh: 那太好了！另外，浴室的燈好像壞了。
lines.pinyin: nà tài hǎo le! lìng wài, yù shì de dēng hǎo xiàng huài le.
lines.english: That's great! Also, the light in the bathroom seems broken.

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.zh: 沒問題，在你入住前我會找人修理。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, zài nǐ rù zhù qián wǒ huì zhǎo rén xiū lǐ.
lines.english: No problem, I'll find someone to repair it before you check in.

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.zh: 合約裡包含網路嗎？
lines.pinyin: hé yuē lǐ bāo hán wǎng lù ma?
lines.english: Does the contract include internet?

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.zh: 不包含，網路和水電費需要你自己付。
lines.pinyin: bù bāo hán, wǎng lù hé shuǐ diàn fèi xū yào nǐ zì jǐ fù.
lines.english: It doesn't; internet and utility bills need to be paid by you.

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.zh: 這棟公寓的管理費包含什麼？
lines.pinyin: zhè dòng gōng yù de guǎn lǐ fèi bāo hán shén me?
lines.english: What does the management fee for this apartment include?

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.zh: 包含垃圾處理和公共設施的維護。
lines.pinyin: bāo hán lā jī chǔ lǐ hé gōng gòng shè shī de wéi hù.
lines.english: Includes trash disposal and maintenance of public facilities.

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.zh: 有停車位嗎？我有開車。
lines.pinyin: yǒu tíng chē wèi ma? wǒ yǒu kāi chē.
lines.english: Is there a parking space? I have a car.

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.zh: 地下室有停車位，但需要另外租。
lines.pinyin: dì xià shì yǒu tíng chē wèi, dàn xū yào lìng wài zū.
lines.english: There are parking spaces in the basement, but they need to be rented separately.

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.zh: 好的。我能帶寵物嗎？
lines.pinyin: hǎo de. wǒ néng dài chǒng wù ma?
lines.english: Okay. Can I bring pets?

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.zh: 可以，但請保證環境衛生和安靜。
lines.pinyin: kě yǐ, dàn qǐng bǎo zhèng huán jìng wèi shēng hé ān jìng.
lines.english: Yes, but please ensure environmental hygiene and quietness.

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.zh: 沒問題。那我們現在簽合約吧。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí. nà wǒ men xiàn zài qiān hé yuē ba.
lines.english: No problem. Let's sign the contract now.

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.zh: 好。請在這裡簽名，然後付押金。
lines.pinyin: hǎo. qǐng zài zhè lǐ qiān míng, rán hòu fù yā jīn.
lines.english: Good. Please sign here, then pay the deposit.

lines.speaker: Tenant
lines.zh: 簽好了。希望我們合作愉快。
lines.pinyin: qiān hǎo le. xī wàng wǒ men hé zuò yú kuài.
lines.english: Signed. Hope we have a pleasant cooperation.

lines.speaker: Landlord
lines.zh: 歡迎你成為我的房客！
lines.pinyin: huān yíng nǐ chéng wéi wǒ de fáng kè!
lines.english: Welcome to be my tenant!

dialogueSections.title: Shared Rental Experience
dialogueSections.scene: Two roommates discuss living together and splitting house chores.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你能接受合租嗎？我想找個人分擔租金。
lines.pinyin: nǐ néng jiē shòu hé zū ma? wǒ xiǎng zhǎo gè rén fēn dān zū jīn.
lines.english: Can you accept a shared rental? I want to find someone to share the rent.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我也在找房子，合租是個不錯的主意。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě zài zhǎo fáng zi, hé zū shì gè bú cuò de zhǔ yì.
lines.english: I'm also looking for a house; sharing is a good idea.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這間公寓有兩間臥室，客廳和廚房是公共空間。
lines.pinyin: zhè jiān gōng yù yǒu liǎng jiān wò shì, kè tīng hé chú fáng shì gōng gòng kōng jiān.
lines.english: This apartment has two bedrooms; the living room and kitchen are common spaces.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 水電費和網路費我們怎麼分？
lines.pinyin: shuǐ diàn fèi hé wǎng lù fèi wǒ men zěn me fēn?
lines.english: How do we split the utilities and internet fees?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我們可以平均分擔，這樣最公平。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men kě yǐ píng jūn fēn dān, zhè yàng zuì gōng píng.
lines.english: We can split them equally; that's the fairest.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 沒問題。誰來負責打掃公共區域？
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí. shéi lái fù zé dǎ sǎo gōng gòng qū yù?
lines.english: No problem. Who will be responsible for cleaning the common areas?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我們可以制定一個值日表，每週輪流。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men kě yǐ zhì dìng yí gè zhí rì biǎo, měi zhōu lún liú.
lines.english: We can make a duty roster and rotate every week.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好，保持環境乾淨對大家都好。
lines.pinyin: hǎo, bǎo chí huán jìng gān jìng duì dà jiā dōu hǎo.
lines.english: Good; keeping the environment clean is good for everyone.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你有什麼忌口或是特殊習慣嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ yǒu shén me jì kǒu huò shì tè shū xí guàn ma?
lines.english: Do you have any dietary restrictions or special habits?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我睡得很早，希望晚上能保持安靜。
lines.pinyin: wǒ shuì de hěn zǎo, xī wàng wǎn shang néng bǎo chí ān jìng.
lines.english: I sleep very early; hope it can be kept quiet at night.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我知道了。我也喜歡安靜的環境。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zhī dào le. wǒ yě xǐ huan ān jìng de huán jìng.
lines.english: I see. I also like a quiet environment.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 這附近交通方便嗎？我每天要坐巴士上班。
lines.pinyin: zhè fù jìn jiāo tōng fāng biàn ma? wǒ měi tiān yào zuò bā shì shàng bān.
lines.english: Is transportation convenient nearby? I have to take the bus to work every day.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 很方便，樓下就是巴士站，附近還有捷運。
lines.pinyin: hěn fāng biàn, lóu xià jiù shì bā shì zhàn, fù jìn hái yǒu jié yùn.
lines.english: Very convenient; the bus stop is downstairs, and there's a MRT nearby.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那太完美了。房東人怎麼樣？
lines.pinyin: nà tài wán měi le. fáng dōng rén zěn me yàng?
lines.english: That's perfect. How is the landlord?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 房東人很好，有什麼設施壞了都會及時修理。
lines.pinyin: fáng dōng rén hěn hǎo, yǒu shén me shè shī huài le dōu huì jí shí xiū lǐ.
lines.english: The landlord is nice; if any facilities break, they repair them promptly.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 聽起來我們能在那裡住得很舒服。
lines.pinyin: tīng qǐ lái wǒ men néng zài nà lǐ zhù de hěn shū fu.
lines.english: Sounds like we'll be able to live there very comfortably.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我也這麼覺得。那我們明天一起去簽合約？
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě zhè me jué de. nà wǒ men míng tiān yì qǐ qù qiān hé yuē?
lines.english: I think so too. Shall we go sign the contract together tomorrow?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好的。我現在就去整理行李。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de. wǒ xiàn zài jiù qù zhěng lǐ xíng li.
lines.english: Okay. I'm going to pack my bags now.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 加油，期待我們的合租生活。
lines.pinyin: jiā yóu, qī dài wǒ men de hé zū shēng huó.
lines.english: Good luck; looking forward to our shared rental life.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我也是，明天見！
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě shì, míng tiān jiàn!
lines.english: Me too, see you tomorrow!

title: Giving & Receiving Advice
description: Learn how to discuss problems, offer solutions, and use modal verbs for suggestions.

text.zh: 生活中遇到困難時，找朋友商量是一個好辦法。
text.pinyin: shēng huó zhòng yù dào kùn nan shí, zhǎo péng you shāng liang shì gè hǎo bàn fǎ.
text.english: When encountering difficulties in life, consulting with friends is a good way.

text.zh: 給予建議時要誠實，也要考慮對方的感受。
text.pinyin: gěi yǔ jiàn yì shí yào chéng shí, yě yào kǎo lǜ duì fāng de gǎn shòu.
text.english: Be honest when giving advice, and also consider the other person's feelings.

text.zh: 有時候，一句簡單的安慰就能讓人重新獲得勇氣。
text.pinyin: yǒu shí hou, yí jù jiǎn dān de ān wèi jiù néng ràng rén chóng xīn huò dé yǒng qì.
text.english: Sometimes, a simple word of comfort can make a person regain their courage.

comprehension.question: What is a good way to handle difficulties?
comprehension.questionZh: 遇到困難時的好辦法是什麼？
options: 找朋友商量 Consult with friends
放棄工作 Give up job

comprehension.question: What should you consider when giving advice?
comprehension.questionZh: 給建議時應該考慮什麼？
options: 對方的感受 The other's feelings

comprehension.question: What can a simple comfort do?
comprehension.questionZh: 簡單的安慰有什麼作用？
options: 讓人變累 Make people tired
讓人重新獲得勇氣 Regain courage
讓人想睡覺 Make people want to sleep

dialogueSections.title: Seeking Relationship Advice
dialogueSections.scene: A friend is going through a tough time in their relationship and seeks advice.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我有個困擾，能聽聽你的意見嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ yǒu gè kùn rǎo, néng tīng ting nǐ de yì jiàn ma?
lines.english: I have a trouble, can I hear your opinion?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 當然可以，發生了什麼事？
lines.pinyin: dāng rán kě yǐ, fā shēng le shén me shì?
lines.english: Of course, what happened?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我和男朋友最近經常吵架，我不知道該怎麼辦。
lines.pinyin: wǒ hé nán péng you zuì jìn jīng cháng chǎo jià, wǒ bù zhī dào gāi zěn me bàn.
lines.english: My boyfriend and I have been arguing a lot lately; I don't know what to do.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你有嘗試和他溝通嗎？誠實的交流很重要。
lines.pinyin: nǐ yǒu cháng shì hé tā gōu tōng ma? chéng shí de jiāo liú hěn zhòng yào.
lines.english: Have you tried communicating with him? Honest exchange is very important.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 嘗試過，但他似乎不想聽我的考慮。
lines.pinyin: cháng shì guò, dàn tā sì hū bù xiǎng tīng wǒ de kǎo lǜ.
lines.english: I've tried, but he doesn't seem to want to hear my considerations.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我建議你先冷靜幾天，然後再找機會談談。
lines.pinyin: wǒ jiàn yì nǐ xiān lěng jìng jǐ tiān, rán hòu zài zhǎo jī huì tán tan.
lines.english: I suggest you stay calm for a few days first, and then find an opportunity to talk.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我真的很擔心我們的未來。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zhēn de hěn dān xīn wǒ men de wèi lái.
lines.english: I'm really worried about our future.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 別太悲觀，每個關係都會遇到挑戰。
lines.pinyin: bié tài bēi guān, měi gè guān xì dōu huì yù dào tiǎo zhàn.
lines.english: Don't be too pessimistic; every relationship faces challenges.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你覺得我應該放棄這段感情嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ jué de wǒ yīng gāi fàng qì zhè duàn gǎn qíng ma?
lines.english: Do you think I should give up on this relationship?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 這個決定只能你自己做，但我會支持你的選擇。
lines.pinyin: zhè gè jué dìng zhǐ néng nǐ zì jǐ zuò, dàn wǒ huì zhī chí nǐ de xuǎn zé.
lines.english: Only you can make this decision, but I will support your choice.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝你的鼓勵。我會好好想想的。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie nǐ de gǔ lì. wǒ huì hǎo hǎo xiǎng xiǎng de.
lines.english: Thanks for your encouragement. I'll think it over carefully.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 也要理智地分析問題的根源。
lines.pinyin: yě yào lǐ zhì de fēn xī wèn tí de gēn yuán.
lines.english: Also, analyze the root of the problem rationally.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我明白。這對我來說是個成長的過程。
lines.pinyin: wǒ míng bái. zhè duì wǒ lái shuō shì gè chéng zhǎng de guò chéng.
lines.english: I understand. This is a growth process for me.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 沒錯，成熟的人生需要學會處理情感。
lines.pinyin: méi cuò, chéng shú de rén shēng xū yào xué huì chǔ lǐ qíng gǎn.
lines.english: Exactly, a mature life requires learning how to handle emotions.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 如果他還是不願意改變怎麼辦？
lines.pinyin: rú guǒ tā hái shì bú yuàn yì gǎi biàn zěn me bàn?
lines.english: What if he's still unwilling to change?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那你就得判斷這段關係是否還值得信任。
lines.pinyin: nà nǐ jiù děi pàn duàn zhè duàn guān xì shì fǒu hái zhí dé xìn rèn.
lines.english: Then you'll have to judge whether this relationship is still worth trusting.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你說得對。謝謝你分享你的經驗。
lines.pinyin: nǐ shuō de duì. xiè xie nǐ fēn xiǎng nǐ de jīng yàn.
lines.english: You're right. Thanks for sharing your experience.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 不客氣，我們是朋友嘛。加油！
lines.pinyin: bú kè qi, wǒ men shì péng you ma. jiā yóu!
lines.english: You're welcome, we're friends. Good luck!

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我會勇敢地面對的。
lines.pinyin: wǒ huì yǒng gǎn de miàn duì de.
lines.english: I will face it bravely.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好樣的！保持樂觀的心態。
lines.pinyin: hǎo yàng de! bǎo chí lè guān de xīn tài.
lines.english: Good job! Maintain an optimistic mindset.

dialogueSections.title: Career Path Choices
dialogueSections.scene: A mentor gives career advice to a student deciding between two job offers.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 老師，我有兩個工作機會，不知道該選哪個。
lines.pinyin: lǎo shī, wǒ yǒu liǎng gè gōng zuò jī huì, bù zhī dào gāi xuǎn nǎ ge.
lines.english: Teacher, I have two job opportunities and don't know which to choose.

lines.speaker: Mentor
lines.zh: 說說看，它們分別是什麼樣的職位？
lines.pinyin: shuō shuō kàn, tā men fēn bié shì shén me yàng de zhí wèi?
lines.english: Tell me, what kind of positions are they respectively?

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 一個薪水高但壓力大，另一個穩定但沒什麼發展空間。
lines.pinyin: yí gè xīn shuǐ gāo dàn yā lì dà, lìng yí gè wěn dìng dàn méi shén me fā zhǎn kōng jiān.
lines.english: One has a high salary but high pressure, the other is stable but has little room for growth.

lines.speaker: Mentor
lines.zh: 你現在的職業發展方向是什麼？
lines.pinyin: nǐ xiàn zài de zhí yè fā zhǎn fāng xiàng shì shén me?
lines.english: What is your current career development direction?

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 我希望能學到更多專業知識，快速成長。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xī wàng néng xué dào gèng duō zhuān yè zhī shi, kuài sù chéng zhǎng.
lines.english: I hope to learn more professional knowledge and grow quickly.

lines.speaker: Mentor
lines.zh: 那我建議你選擇那個有挑戰性的，哪怕壓力大點。
lines.pinyin: nà wǒ jiàn yì nǐ xuǎn zé nà ge yǒu tiǎo zhàn xìng de, nǎ pà yā lì dà diǎn.
lines.english: Then I suggest you choose the challenging one, even if the pressure is a bit higher.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 但我擔心我應付不來，最後失敗。
lines.pinyin: dàn wǒ dān xīn wǒ yìng fu bù lái, zuì hòu shī bài.
lines.english: But I'm worried I won't be able to handle it and will fail in the end.

lines.speaker: Mentor
lines.zh: 別害怕失敗，年輕就是嘗試的最佳時機。
lines.pinyin: bié hài pà shī bài, nián qīng jiù shì cháng shì de zuì jiā shí jī.
lines.english: Don't be afraid of failure; youth is the best time to try.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 您說得對。我也在考慮長遠的利益。
lines.pinyin: nín shuō de duì. wǒ yě zài kǎo lǜ cháng yuǎn de lì yì.
lines.english: You're right. I'm also considering long-term interests.

lines.speaker: Mentor
lines.zh: 你要信任自己的能力，你是個很努力的人。
lines.pinyin: nǐ yào xìn rèn zì jǐ de néng lì, nǐ shì gè hěn nǔ lì de rén.
lines.english: You need to trust your own ability; you are a very hard-working person.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 謝謝老師的提醒。我以前總是太保守。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie lǎo shī de tí xǐng. wǒ yǐ qián zǒng shì tài bǎo shǒu.
lines.english: Thanks for the reminder, teacher. I used to be too conservative.

lines.speaker: Mentor
lines.zh: 這就是你人生的重要選擇點。
lines.pinyin: zhè jiù shì nǐ rén shēng de zhòng yào xuǎn zé diǎn.
lines.english: This is an important choice point in your life.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 我決定嘗試那個高薪且具挑戰性的工作。
lines.pinyin: wǒ jué dìng cháng shì nà ge gāo xīn qiě jù tiǎo zhàn xìng de gōng zuò.
lines.english: I've decided to try that high-paying and challenging job.

lines.speaker: Mentor
lines.zh: 很好！我為你的勇氣感到自豪。
lines.pinyin: hěn hǎo! wǒ wèi nǐ de yǒng qì gǎn dào zì háo.
lines.english: Very good! I feel proud of your courage.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 我不會後悔這個決定的。
lines.pinyin: wǒ bú huì hòu huǐ zhè gè jué dìng de.
lines.english: I won't regret this decision.

lines.speaker: Mentor
lines.zh: 這就是理智和情感結合的結果。
lines.pinyin: zhè jiù shì lǐ zhì hé qíng gǎn jié hé de jié guǒ.
lines.english: That's the result of a combination of rationality and emotion.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 我也會解決過程中遇到的任何困難。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě huì jiě jué guò chéng zhōng yù dào de rèn hé kùn nán.
lines.english: I will also solve any difficulties encountered in the process.

lines.speaker: Mentor
lines.zh: 如果有任何不順利，隨時找我討論。
lines.pinyin: rú guǒ yǒu rèn hé bù shùn lì, suí shí zhǎo wǒ tǎo lùn.
lines.english: If anything doesn't go smoothly, feel free to discuss it with me anytime.

lines.speaker: Student
lines.zh: 謝謝老師的支持！
lines.pinyin: xiè xie lǎo shī de zhī chí!
lines.english: Thank you for your support, teacher!

lines.speaker: Mentor
lines.zh: 加油，祝你成功！
lines.pinyin: jiā yóu, zhù nǐ chéng gōng!
lines.english: Keep it up, wish you success!

dialogueSections.title: Solving a Conflict
dialogueSections.scene: Two colleagues have a conflict over a project and work through it with advice.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 關於那個項目，我覺得我們的想法有很大分歧。
lines.pinyin: guān yú nà ge xiàng mù, wǒ jué de wǒ men de xiǎng fǎ yǒu hěn dà fēn qí.
lines.english: Regarding that project, I think our ideas have a big divergence.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我知道。這讓我感到很困擾，我們得找個辦法解決。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zhī dào. zhè ràng wǒ gǎn dào hěn kùn rǎo, wǒ men děi zhǎo gè bàn fǎ jiě jué.
lines.english: I know. It's bothering me, and we need to find a way to solve it.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你對我的提案有什麼具體的反對意見？
lines.pinyin: nǐ duì wǒ de tí àn yǒu shén me jù tǐ de fǎn duì yì jiàn?
lines.english: What specific opposing opinions do you have about my proposal?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我主要是擔心成本太高，不夠理智。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zhǔ yào shì dān xīn chéng běn tài gāo, bú gòu lǐ zhì.
lines.english: I'm mainly worried the cost is too high; it's not rational enough.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我明白你的考慮。那你建議怎麼調整？
lines.pinyin: wǒ míng bái nǐ de kǎo lǜ. nà nǐ jiàn yì zěn me tiáo zhěng?
lines.english: I understand your consideration. Then how do you suggest we adjust?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 或許我們可以減少一些不必要的裝飾功能。
lines.pinyin: huò xǔ wǒ men kě yǐ jiǎn shǎo yì xiē bù bì yào de zhuāng shì gōng néng.
lines.english: Perhaps we can reduce some unnecessary decorative features.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這倒是個好主意。我們需要更多的數據分析。
lines.pinyin: zhè dào shì gè hǎo zhǔ yì. wǒ men xū yào gèng duō de shù jù fēn xī.
lines.english: That's a good idea. We need more data analysis.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我同意。溝通是解決衝突的最佳方式。
lines.pinyin: wǒ tóng yì. gōu tōng shì jiě jué chōng tū de zuì jiā fāng shì.
lines.english: I agree. Communication is the best way to resolve conflict.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝你願意和我坐下來談談。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie nǐ yuàn yì hé wǒ zuò xià lái tán tan.
lines.english: Thank you for being willing to sit down and talk with me.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 不客氣，團隊的和諧最重要。
lines.pinyin: bú kè qi, tuán duì de hé xié zuì zhòng yào.
lines.english: You're welcome; team harmony is most important.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我們應該互相支持，而不是互相競爭。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men yīng gāi hù xiāng zhī chí, ér bú shì hù xiāng jìng zhēng.
lines.english: We should support each other, not compete against each other.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 沒錯。這對我們大家都是一種成長。
lines.pinyin: méi cuò. zhè duì wǒ men dà jiā dōu shì yì zhǒng chéng zhǎng.
lines.english: Exactly. This is a kind of growth for all of us.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我會重新修改我的提案，參考你的意見。
lines.pinyin: wǒ huì chóng xīn xiū gǎi wǒ de tí àn, cān kǎo nǐ de yì jiàn.
lines.english: I will revise my proposal again, referring to your opinions.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我也會盡力配合你的工作。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě huì jìn lì pèi hé nǐ de gōng zuò.
lines.english: I will also do my best to cooperate with your work.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 讓我們為了成功的結果努力吧。
lines.pinyin: ràng wǒ men wèi le chéng gōng de jié guǒ nǔ lì ba.
lines.english: Let's work hard for a successful result.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 加油！我信任你的判斷。
lines.pinyin: jiā yóu! wǒ xìn rèn nǐ de pàn duàn.
lines.english: Good luck! I trust your judgment.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我也信任你。再次感謝你的建議。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yě xìn rèn nǐ. zài cì gǎn xiè nǐ de jiàn yì.
lines.english: I trust you too. Thanks again for your advice.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 客氣了。我們去喝杯咖啡吧。
lines.pinyin: kè qi le. wǒ men qù hē bēi kā fēi ba.
lines.english: You're welcome. Let's go have a cup of coffee.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好啊，我請客！
lines.pinyin: hǎo a, wǒ qǐng kè!
lines.english: Sure, my treat!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 走吧！
lines.pinyin: zǒu ba!
lines.english: Let's go!

questions.question: If you are 'attempting' something, you are...

title: Customer Service & Complaints
description: Learn professional language for handling problems with products and requesting refunds.

text.zh: 良好的客戶服務是企業成功的關鍵之一。
text.pinyin: liáng hǎo de kè fú shì qǐ yè chéng gōng de guān jiàn zhī yī.
text.english: Good customer service is one of the keys to corporate success.

text.zh: 面對顧客的投訴，冷靜和禮貌地處理非常重要。
text.pinyin: miàn duì gù kè de tóu sù, lěng jìng hé lǐ mào de chǔ lǐ fēi cháng zhòng yào.
text.english: When facing customer complaints, handling them calmly and politely is very important.

text.zh: 提供合理的解決方案和賠償，能重新獲得顧客的信任。
text.pinyin: tí gōng hé lǐ de jiě jué fāng àn hé péi cháng, néng chóng xīn huò qǔ gù kè de xìn rèn.
text.english: Providing reasonable solutions and compensation can regain customer trust.

comprehension.question: What is a key to corporate success?
comprehension.questionZh: 企業成功的關鍵之一是什麼？
options: 有很多錢 Have a lot of money
良好的客戶服務 Good customer service
只賣貴的東西 Only sell expensive things

comprehension.question: How should complaints be handled?
comprehension.questionZh: 應該如何處理投訴？
options: 冷靜和禮貌地處理 Handle calmly and politely
大聲吵架 Shout and fight

comprehension.question: How can customer trust be regained?
comprehension.questionZh: 如何重新獲得顧客信任？
options: 提供合理解決方案 Provide reasonable solutions

dialogueSections.title: Complaining About a Product
dialogueSections.scene: A customer calls the service hotline to complain about a faulty product.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 喂，你好。我要投訴你們的產品。
lines.pinyin: wéi, nǐ hǎo. wǒ yào tóu sù nǐ men de chǎn pǐn.
lines.english: Hello. I want to complain about your product.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 您好，很抱歉給您帶來不便。請問出了什麼問題？
lines.pinyin: nín hǎo, hěn bào qiàn gěi nín dài lái bú biàn. qǐng wèn chū le shén me wèn tí?
lines.english: Hello, very sorry for the inconvenience. What's the problem?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 我上週買的電腦有故障，開不了機。
lines.pinyin: wǒ shàng zhōu mǎi de diàn nǎo yǒu gù zhàng, kāi bù liǎo jī.
lines.english: The computer I bought last week has a malfunction; it won't start.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 請提供您的訂單號碼和聯絡資訊。
lines.pinyin: qǐng tí gōng nín de dìng dān hào mǎ hé lián luò zī xùn.
lines.english: Please provide your order number and contact information.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 訂單號碼是 123456。我對你們的產品質量很不滿意。
lines.pinyin: dìng dān hào mǎ shì yāoyì sān sì wǔ liù. wǒ duì nǐ men de chǎn pǐn zhì liàng hěn bù mǎn yì.
lines.english: Order number is 123456. I'm very unsatisfied with your product quality.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 我們非常理解。這是我們的責任。請問您想換貨還是退款？
lines.pinyin: wǒ men fēi cháng lǐ jiě. zhè shì wǒ men de zé rèn. qǐng wèn nín xiǎng huàn huò hái shì tuì kuǎn?
lines.english: We understand completely. This is our responsibility. Would you like an exchange or a refund?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 我想退款。我已經不信任這個品牌了。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng tuì kuǎn. wǒ yǐ jīng bú xìn rèn zhè gè pǐn pái le.
lines.english: I want a refund. I don't trust this brand anymore.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 好的，我會幫您啟動退款流程。請耐心等待。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, wǒ huì bāng nín qǐ dòng tuì kuǎn liú chéng. qǐng nài xīn děng dài.
lines.english: Okay, I'll start the refund process for you. Please wait patiently.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 退款需要多久？我希望效率能高一點。
lines.pinyin: tuì kuǎn xū yào duō jiǔ? wǒ xī wàng xiào lǜ néng gāo yì diǎn.
lines.english: How long will the refund take? I hope the efficiency can be higher.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 大約需要三到五個工作日。我們會儘快處理。
lines.pinyin: dà yuē xū yào sān dào wǔ gè gōng zuò rì. wǒ men huì jǐn kuài chǔ lǐ.
lines.english: About three to five working days. We will process it as soon as possible.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 我還需要把電腦寄回去嗎？
lines.pinyin: wǒ hái xū yào bǎ diàn nǎo jì huí qù ma?
lines.english: Do I still need to mail the computer back?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 是的，售後服務會安排快遞去您家取件。
lines.pinyin: shì de, shòu hòu fú wù huì ān pái kuài dì qù nín jiā qǔ jiàn.
lines.english: Yes, after-sales service will arrange for a courier to pick it up from your house.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 好吧。希望這次能順利解決。
lines.pinyin: hǎo ba. xī wàng zhè cì néng shùn lì jiě jué.
lines.english: Alright. Hope it can be resolved smoothly this time.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 再次向您道歉。為了補償，我們送您一張優惠券。
lines.pinyin: zài cì xiàng nín dào qiàn. wèi le bǔ cháng, wǒ men sòng nín yì zhāng yōu huì quàn.
lines.english: Apologies once again. For compensation, we're giving you a discount coupon.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 謝謝。你們的服務態度還算不錯。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie. nǐ men de fú wù tài du hái suàn bú cuò.
lines.english: Thanks. Your service attitude is fairly decent.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 謝謝您的反饋。我們會不斷改進。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie nín de fǎn kuì. wǒ men huì bú duàn gǎi jìn.
lines.english: Thanks for your feedback. We will continue to improve.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 那就好。期待收到退款通知。
lines.pinyin: nà jiù hǎo. qī dài shōu dào tuì kuǎn tōng zhī.
lines.english: That's good. Looking forward to the refund notification.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 沒問題。祝您生活愉快。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí. zhù nín shēng huó yú kuài.
lines.english: No problem. Wish you a pleasant life.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 再見。
lines.pinyin: zài jiàn.
lines.english: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 再見。
lines.pinyin: zài jiàn.
lines.english: Goodbye.

dialogueSections.title: Inquiring About Warranty
dialogueSections.scene: A customer is at a service center asking about technical support and warranty for a device.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 你好，我想諮詢一下這台相機的保修。
lines.pinyin: nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng zī xún yí xià zhè tái xiàng jī de bǎo xiū.
lines.english: Hello, I'd like to consult about the warranty of this camera.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 您好。請出示您的保修卡或是購買憑證。
lines.pinyin: nín hǎo. qǐng chū shì nín de bǎo xiū kǎ huò shì gòu mǎi píng zhèng.
lines.english: Hello. Please show your warranty card or proof of purchase.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 這台相機還在保修期內嗎？
lines.pinyin: zhè tái xiàng jī hái zài bǎo xiū qī nèi ma?
lines.english: Is this camera still within the warranty period?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 我查一下系統。是的，還剩下三個月。
lines.pinyin: wǒ chá yí xià xì tǒng. shì de, hái shèng xià sān gè yuè.
lines.english: Let me check the system. Yes, there are three months left.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 鏡頭對焦有問題，維修需要多久？
lines.pinyin: jìng tóu duì jiāo yǒu wèn tí, wéi xiū xū yào duō jiǔ?
lines.english: The lens focus has a problem; how long will maintenance take?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 大約需要一週時間進行技術檢測和修理。
lines.pinyin: dà yuē xū yào yì zhōu shí jiān jìn xíng jì shù jiǎn cè hé xiū lǐ.
lines.english: About one week for technical testing and repair.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 維修是免費的嗎？
lines.pinyin: wéi xiū shì miǎn fèi de ma?
lines.english: Is the repair free?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 如果是硬體故障且在保修內，是免費的。
lines.pinyin: rú guǒ shì yìng tǐ gù zhàng qiě zài bǎo xiū nèi, shì miǎn fèi de.
lines.english: If it's a hardware fault and within warranty, it's free.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 那就好。你們的評價挺高的，希望能修好。
lines.pinyin: nà jiù hǎo. nǐ men de píng jià tǐng gāo de, xī wàng néng xiū hǎo.
lines.english: That's good. Your reviews are quite high; I hope it can be fixed.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 請放心，我們的技術人員非常專業。
lines.pinyin: qǐng fàng xīn, wǒ men de jì shù rén yuán fēi cháng zhuān yè.
lines.english: Please rest assured; our technical staff are very professional.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 謝謝。我可以換一台新的嗎？
lines.pinyin: xiè xie. wǒ kě yǐ huàn yì tái xīn de ma?
lines.english: Thanks. Can I exchange it for a new one?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 根據流程，我們先嘗試維修。如果修不好，再考慮換貨。
lines.pinyin: gēn jù liú chéng, wǒ men xiān cháng shì wéi xiū. rú guǒ xiū bù hǎo, zài kǎo lǜ huàn huò.
lines.english: According to the procedure, we'll try to repair it first. If it can't be fixed, then we'll consider an exchange.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 我明白了。請儘快給我反饋。
lines.pinyin: wǒ míng bái le. qǐng jǐn kuài gěi wǒ fǎn kuì.
lines.english: I understand. Please give me feedback as soon as possible.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 沒問題，一有消息我們會打電話通知您。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí, yì yǒu xiāo xi wǒ men huì dǎ diàn huà tōng zhī nín.
lines.english: No problem; as soon as there's news, we'll call to notify you.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 你們這裡有提供代用機嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ men zhè lǐ yǒu tí gōng dài yòng jī ma?
lines.english: Do you offer loaner units here?

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 抱歉，我們目前沒有這項服務。
lines.pinyin: bào qiàn, wǒ men mù qián méi yǒu zhè xiàng fú wù.
lines.english: Sorry, we don't have that service currently.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 好吧。那請一定要保護好我的數據。
lines.pinyin: hǎo ba. nà qǐng yí dìng yào bǎo hù hǎo wǒ de shù jù.
lines.english: Alright. Then please definitely protect my data.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 我們會注意的。這是您的受理單據。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men huì zhù yì de. zhè shì nín de shòu lǐ dān jù.
lines.english: We will pay attention to that. Here is your service receipt.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.zh: 謝謝。辛苦了。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie. xīn kǔ le.
lines.english: Thanks. Thanks for your hard work.

lines.speaker: Staff
lines.zh: 不客氣。再見。
lines.pinyin: bú kè qi. zài jiàn.
lines.english: You're welcome. Goodbye.

dialogueSections.title: Praising Excellent Service
dialogueSections.scene: A customer shares positive feedback about their experience with customer service.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我要給你們的客戶服務一個好評！
lines.pinyin: wǒ yào gěi nǐ men de kè hù fú wù yí gè hǎo píng!
lines.english: I want to give your customer service a positive review!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 真的嗎？非常感謝！能告訴我們具體的原因嗎？
lines.pinyin: zhēn de ma? fēi cháng gǎn xiè! néng gào sù wǒ men jù tǐ de yuán yīn ma?
lines.english: Really? Thank you very much! Can you tell us the specific reason?

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 剛才那位工作人員非常有耐心，解決了我的所有問題。
lines.pinyin: gāng cái nà wèi gōng zuò rén yuán fēi cháng yǒu nài xīn, jiě jué le wǒ de suǒ yǒu wèn tí.
lines.english: The staff member just now was very patient and solved all my problems.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 很高興聽到這個消息。我們的宗旨就是讓客戶滿意。
lines.pinyin: hěn gāo xìng tīng dào zhè gè xiāo xi. wǒ men de zōng zhǐ jiù shì ràng kè hù mǎn yì.
lines.english: Glad to hear that. Our mission is to make customers satisfied.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 處理效率也非常高，沒有讓我等太久。
lines.pinyin: chǔ lǐ xiào lǜ yě fēi cháng gāo, méi yǒu ràng wǒ děng tài jiǔ.
lines.english: The processing efficiency was also very high; I didn't wait too long.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我們會把您的反饋轉達給那位員工。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men huì bǎ nín de fǎn kuì zhuǎn dá gěi nà wèi yuán gōng.
lines.english: We will convey your feedback to that employee.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這才是專業的售後服務應有的態度。
lines.pinyin: zhè cái shì zhuān yè de shòu hòu fú wù yīng yǒu de tài du.
lines.english: This is exactly the attitude a professional after-sales service should have.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 謝謝您的肯定。這對我們是很大的鼓勵。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie nín de kěn dìng. zhè duì wǒ men shì hěn dà de gǔ lì.
lines.english: Thank you for the affirmation. This is great encouragement for us.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我會在網路上給你們寫一個五星評價。
lines.pinyin: wǒ huì zài wǎng lù shàng gěi nǐ men xiě yí gè wǔ xīng píng jià.
lines.english: I'll write a five-star review for you online.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 太感謝了！如果您以後還有任何諮詢，隨時找我們。
lines.pinyin: tài gǎn xiè le! rú guǒ nín yǐ hòu hái yǒu rèn hé zī xún, suí shí zhǎo wǒ men.
lines.english: Thank you so much! If you have any inquiries in the future, find us anytime.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 沒問題。我會向我的朋友推薦你們的。
lines.pinyin: méi wèn tí. wǒ huì xiàng wǒ de péng you tuī jiàn nǐ men de.
lines.english: No problem. I will recommend you to my friends.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那是我們最大的榮幸。
lines.pinyin: nà shì wǒ men zuì dà de róng xìng.
lines.english: That is our greatest honor.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 對了，你們的系統最近更新了嗎？變得更好用了。
lines.pinyin: duì le, nǐ men de xì tǒng zuì jìn gēng xīn le ma? biàn de gèng hǎo yòng le.
lines.english: By the way, did your system update recently? It's become more user-friendly.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是的，我們上個月剛優化了用戶流程。
lines.pinyin: shì de, wǒ men shàng gè yuè gāng yōu huà le yòng hù liú chéng.
lines.english: Yes, we just optimized the user workflow last month.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 科技確實讓服務變得更簡單了。
lines.pinyin: kē jì què shí ràng fú wù biàn de gèng jiǎn dān le.
lines.english: Technology indeed makes service simpler.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我們也一直在學習新技術，以提供更好的支持。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men yě yì zhí zài xué xí xīn jì shù, yǐ tí gōng gèng hǎo de zhī chí.
lines.english: We are also constantly learning new technologies to provide better support.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 再次感謝。再見！
lines.pinyin: zài cì gǎn xiè. zài jiàn!
lines.english: Thanks again. Goodbye!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 再見，祝您有美好的一天。
lines.pinyin: zài jiàn, zhù nín yǒu měi hǎo de yì tiān.
lines.english: Goodbye, wish you a wonderful day.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你也是。
lines.pinyin: nǐ yě shì.
lines.english: You too.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 拜拜。
lines.pinyin: bái bái.
lines.english: Bye.

title: Future Plans & Dreams
description: Discuss ambitions, long-term goals, and what you hope to achieve in the future.

text.zh: 每個人對未來都有不同的期待和夢想。
text.pinyin: měi gè rén duì wèi lái dōu yǒu bù tóng de qī dài hé mèng xiǎng.
text.english: Everyone has different expectations and dreams for the future.

text.zh: 設定清晰的目標並制定計畫，是實現夢想的第一步。
text.pinyin: shè dìng qīng xī de mù biāo bìng zhì dìng jì huà, shì shí xiàn mèng xiǎng de dì yī bù.
text.english: Setting clear goals and making a plan is the first step to realizing your dreams.

text.zh: 勇敢面對挑戰，不斷學習和進步，未來一定會更美好。
text.pinyin: yǒng gǎn miàn duì tiǎo zhàn, bú duàn xué xí hé jìn bù, wèi lái yí dìng huì gèng měi hǎo.
text.english: Bravely facing challenges and constantly learning and improving will surely make the future better.

comprehension.question: What is the first step to realizing dreams?
comprehension.questionZh: 實現夢想的第一步是什麼？
options: 每天睡覺 Sleep every day
設定目標並制定計畫 Set goals and make plans
放棄努力 Give up effort

comprehension.question: What should we do when facing challenges?
comprehension.questionZh: 面對挑戰時應該怎麼辦？
options: 勇敢面對 Bravely face it
趕快逃跑 Run away quickly

comprehension.question: How can we make the future better?
comprehension.questionZh: 如何讓未來更美好？
options: 不斷學習和進步 Constantly learn and improve

dialogueSections.title: My Dream Career
dialogueSections.scene: A young student shares their dreams and career goals with a friend.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你對未來有什麼計畫？
lines.pinyin: nǐ duì wèi lái yǒu shén me jì huà?
lines.english: What are your plans for the future?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我的夢想是成為一名科學家，研究人工智慧。
lines.pinyin: wǒ de mèng xiǎng shì chéng wéi yì míng kē xué jiā, yán jiū rén gōng zhì huì.
lines.english: My dream is to become a scientist and research AI.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那是個很偉大的理想。你打算怎麼實現它？
lines.pinyin: nà shì gè hěn wěi dà de lǐ xiǎng. nǐ dǎ suàn zěn me shí xiàn tā?
lines.english: That's a very grand ideal. How do you plan to achieve it?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我現在正在努力學習數學和程式開發。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiàn zài zhèng zài nǔ lì xué xí shù xué hé chéng shì kāi fā.
lines.english: I'm currently working hard on studying math and programming.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 這確實需要長期的奮鬥和堅持。
lines.pinyin: zhè què shí xū yào cháng qī de fèn dòu hé jiān chí.
lines.english: It indeed requires long-term struggle and persistence.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我知道。雖然有很多挑戰，但我對自己有自信。
lines.pinyin: wǒ zhī dào. suī rán yǒu hěn duō tiǎo zhàn, dàn wǒ duì zì jǐ yǒu zì xìn.
lines.english: I know. Although there are many challenges, I have confidence in myself.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你的熱情真讓人佩服。你有什麼具體的目標嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ de rè qíng zhēn ràng rén pèi fú. nǐ yǒu shén me jù tǐ de mù biāo ma?
lines.english: Your passion is really admirable. Do you have any specific goals?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我希望在五年內能拿到碩士學位。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xī wàng zài wǔ nián nèi néng ná dào shuò shì xué wèi.
lines.english: I hope to get a master's degree within five years.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那是一個很好的起點。我也在規劃我的未來。
lines.pinyin: nà shì yí gè hěn hǎo de qǐ diǎn. wǒ yě zài guī huà wǒ de wèi lái.
lines.english: That's a good starting point. I'm also planning my future.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你的計畫是什麼？分享一下吧。
lines.pinyin: nǐ de jì huà shì shén me? fēn xiǎng yí xià ba.
lines.english: What is your plan? Share it for a bit.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我希望能去世界各地冒險，拍很多風景照片。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xī wàng néng qù shì jiè gè dì mào xiǎn, pāi hěn duō fēng jǐng zhào piàn.
lines.english: I hope to go on adventures all over the world and take many landscape photos.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 聽起來很自由。你有很多潛力。
lines.pinyin: tīng qǐ lái hěn zì yóu. nǐ yǒu hěn duō qián lì.
lines.english: Sounds very free. You have a lot of potential.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 每個人都在追求自己的幸福。
lines.pinyin: měi gè rén dōu zài zhuī qiú zì jǐ de xìng fú.
lines.english: Everyone is pursuing their own happiness.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是的，只要不斷進步，就能實現價值。
lines.pinyin: shì de, zhǐ yào bú duàn jìn bù, jiù néng shí xiàn jià zhí.
lines.english: Yes, as long as you keep progressing, you can realize your value.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我們一起為理想而奮鬥吧。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men yì qǐ wèi lǐ xiǎng ér fèn dòu ba.
lines.english: Let's strive together for our ideals.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 加油！相信成功就在不遠處。
lines.pinyin: jiā yóu! xiāng xìn chéng gōng jiù zài bù yuǎn chù.
lines.english: Keep it up! Believe that success isn't far away.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你有寫清單的習慣嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ yǒu xiě qīng dān de xí guàn ma?
lines.english: Do you have the habit of writing lists?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 有，我有一份「未來十年清單」。
lines.pinyin: yǒu, wǒ yǒu yí fèn 'wèi lái shí nián qīng dān'.
lines.english: Yes, I have a 'Next Ten Years List'.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 太棒了，我也要去寫一份。
lines.pinyin: tài bàng le, wǒ yě yào qù xiě yí fèn.
lines.english: Great, I'm going to write one too.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 好的，我們下次再互相展望未來。
lines.pinyin: hǎo de, wǒ men xià cì zài hù xiāng zhǎn wàng wèi lái.
lines.english: Okay, let's look forward to the future with each other again next time.

dialogueSections.title: A 10-Year Plan
dialogueSections.scene: Two colleagues discuss their long-term professional and personal goals during a lunch break.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 老張，你有想過十年後你在做什麼嗎？
lines.pinyin: lǎo zhāng, nǐ yǒu xiǎng guò shí nián hòu nǐ zài zuò shén me ma?
lines.english: Old Zhang, have you thought about what you'll be doing in ten years?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 那時我可能已經退休了，在鄉下過穩定的生活。
lines.pinyin: nà shí wǒ kě néng yǐ jīng tuì xiū le, zài xiāng xià guò wěn dìng de shēng huó.
lines.english: By then I might have already retired, living a stable life in the countryside.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那很愜意。但我還想在事業上有所成就。
lines.pinyin: nà hěn qiè yì. dàn wǒ hái xiǎng zài shì yè shàng yǒu suǒ chéng jiù.
lines.english: That's very pleasant. But I still want to achieve something in my career.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你年輕有為，有很多發展機遇。
lines.pinyin: nǐ nián qīng yǒu wéi, yǒu hěn duō fā zhǎn jī yù.
lines.english: You're young and capable; you have many development opportunities.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我希望能為社會做出一些貢獻。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xī wàng néng wèi shè huì zuò chū yì xiē gòng xiàn.
lines.english: I hope to make some contributions to society.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 這是一個很高尚的目標。你要好好規劃。
lines.pinyin: zhè shì yí gè hěn gāo shàng de mù biāo. nǐ yào hǎo hǎo guī huà.
lines.english: That's a very noble goal. You should plan it well.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我打算在未來三年內創業。
lines.pinyin: wǒ dǎ suàn zài wèi lái sān nián nèi chuàng yè.
lines.english: I plan to start a business within the next three years.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 創業很有挑戰，也很有趣。我支持你。
lines.pinyin: chuàng yè hěn yǒu tiǎo zhàn, yě hěn yǒu qù. wǒ zhī chí nǐ.
lines.english: Entrepreneurship is very challenging and also very interesting. I support you.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 謝謝。我希望我的努力能有豐厚的回報。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie. wǒ xī wàng wǒ de nǔ lì néng yǒu fēng hòu de huí bào.
lines.english: Thanks. I hope my efforts will have generous returns.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 回報不只是金錢，還有內心的成就感。
lines.pinyin: huí bào bù zhǐ shì jīn qián, hái yǒu nèi xīn de chéng jiù gǎn.
lines.english: Returns are not just money, but also internal satisfaction.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 您說得對。我也在學習如何保持熱情。
lines.pinyin: nín shuō de duì. wǒ yě zài xué xí rú hé bǎo chí rè qíng.
lines.english: You're right. I'm also learning how to maintain passion.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 熱情是前進的動力。別讓壓力影響了它。
lines.pinyin: rè qíng shì qián jìn de dòng lì. bié ràng yā lì yǐng xiǎng le tā.
lines.english: Passion is the motivation to move forward. Don't let pressure affect it.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我會注意的。對了，您退休後打算做什麼？
lines.pinyin: wǒ huì zhù yì de. duì le, nín tuì xiū hòu dǎ suàn zuò shén me?
lines.english: I will take note of that. By the way, what do you plan to do after you retire?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我想寫一本關於我個人經歷的小說。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xiǎng xiě yì běn guān yú wǒ gè rén jīng lì de xiǎo shuō.
lines.english: I want to write a novel about my personal experiences.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 那太棒了！我一定會去讀的。
lines.pinyin: nà tài bàng le! wǒ yí dìng huì qù dú de.
lines.english: That's great! I'll definitely read it.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 這也是我一直以來的夢想。
lines.pinyin: zhè yě shì wǒ yì zhí yǐ lái de mèng xiǎng.
lines.english: This has also been a dream of mine for a long time.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 夢想是不分年齡的。
lines.pinyin: mèng xiǎng shì bù fēn nián líng de.
lines.english: Dreams are not divided by age.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是的。為了理想，我們都要不斷改變和進步。
lines.pinyin: shì de. wèi le lǐ xiǎng, wǒ men dōu yào bú duàn gǎi biàn hé jìn bù.
lines.english: Yes. For our ideals, we must all constantly change and progress.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 共同加油！
lines.pinyin: gòng tóng jiā yóu!
lines.english: Let's keep it up together!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 加油！
lines.pinyin: jiā yóu!
lines.english: Keep it up!

dialogueSections.title: A Life Bucket List
dialogueSections.scene: Two friends share their bucket lists and the things they hope to achieve in their lives.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你有「人生清單」嗎？就是那些死前想做的事。
lines.pinyin: nǐ yǒu 'rén shēng qīng dān' ma? jiù shì nà xiē sǐ qián xiǎng zuò de shì.
lines.english: Do you have a 'life list'? The things you want to do before you die.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我有啊！第一件事就是去跳傘。
lines.pinyin: wǒ yǒu a! dì yī jiàn shì jiù shì qù tiào sǎn.
lines.english: I do! The first thing is to go skydiving.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 跳傘！那太冒險了吧？
lines.pinyin: tiào sǎn! nà tài mào xiǎn le ba?
lines.english: Skydiving! Isn't that too adventurous?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 就是因為有挑戰，才想去實現啊。
lines.pinyin: jiù shì yīn wèi yǒu tiǎo zhàn, cái xiǎng qù shí xiàn a.
lines.english: Precisely because it's a challenge, I want to realize it.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我的清單第一項是學會三種語言。
lines.pinyin: wǒ de qīng dān dì yī xiàng shì xué huì sān zhǒng yǔ yán.
lines.english: The first item on my list is to learn three languages.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 這很有意義，能幫你更好地探索世界。
lines.pinyin: zhè hěn yǒu yì yì, néng bāng nǐ gèng hǎo de tàn suǒ shì jiè.
lines.english: That's very meaningful; it can help you explore the world better.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 對，我也想去非洲做志工服務。
lines.pinyin: duì, wǒ yě xiǎng qù fēi zhōu zuò zhì gōng fú wù.
lines.english: Right, I also want to go to Africa for volunteer service.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 你的心腸真好，這是一個很棒的貢獻。
lines.pinyin: nǐ de xīn cháng zhēn hǎo, zhè shì yí gè hěn bàng de gòng xiàn.
lines.english: You're very kindhearted; that's a great contribution.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我希望我的生命能有一些正面的影響。
lines.pinyin: wǒ xī wàng wǒ de shēng mìng néng yǒu yì xiē zhèng miàn de yǐng xiǎng.
lines.english: I hope my life can have some positive influence.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我們都在為了理想而奮鬥。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men dōu zài wèi le lǐ xiǎng ér fèn dòu.
lines.english: We're all striving for our ideals.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你對未來充滿希望嗎？
lines.pinyin: nǐ duì wèi lái chōng mǎn xī wàng ma?
lines.english: Are you full of hope for the future?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 是的，我相信只要努力，目標就能實現。
lines.pinyin: shì de, wǒ xiāng xìn zhǐ yào nǔ lì, mù biāo jiù néng shí xiàn.
lines.english: Yes, I believe as long as we work hard, goals can be achieved.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 自信真的能讓人發光。
lines.pinyin: zì xìn zhēn de néng ràng rén fā guāng.
lines.english: Self-confidence really can make a person shine.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 我們要保持對生活的熱情。
lines.pinyin: wǒ men yào bǎo chí duì shēng huó de rè qíng.
lines.english: We need to maintain a passion for life.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 你打算什麼時候開始你的第一項計畫？
lines.pinyin: nǐ dǎ suàn shén me shí hòu kāi shǐ nǐ de dì yī xiàng jì huà?
lines.english: When do you plan to start your first plan?

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 明年春天吧，我現在正在存錢。
lines.pinyin: míng nián chūn tiān ba, wǒ xiàn zài zhèng zài cún qián.
lines.english: Next spring, maybe; I'm saving money now.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 好，到時候我一定支持你。
lines.pinyin: hǎo, dào shí hou wǒ yí dìng zhī chí nǐ.
lines.english: Good, I'll definitely support you then.

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 謝謝你。讓我們互相鼓勵，共同成長。
lines.pinyin: xiè xie nǐ. ràng wǒ men hù xiāng gǔ lì, gòng tóng chéng zhǎng.
lines.english: Thank you. Let's encourage each other and grow together.

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 為了夢想，前進吧！
lines.pinyin: wèi le mèng xiǎng, qián jìn ba!
lines.english: For our dreams, forward!

lines.speaker: B
lines.zh: 前進！
lines.pinyin: qián jìn!
lines.english: Forward!
